**_QUOTE OF THE DAY_** _I have been very fortunate as to escape through another day's very severe fighting and escaped unhurt.
_ **― John Hunt Morgan**

[**July 9****, 1776:** On July 9th, in New York, Washington had the Declaration read to his gathered troops. Later that night, the Americans took down a bronze and lead statue of King George III (1738-1820), situated at the Bowling Green's base on Broadway, symbolizing their defiance. Washington's own copy of the Dunlap printing of the Declaration of Independence is now preserved in the Manuscript Division's George Washington Papers.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5b2e00e374124705ae32910cbb30da5c&_e=XFdw6hdtq9-sA4iAb5UMUdPnnN9NkyWG02h-XiW7osOhGginIT0u2bUKATE8pL_nRJrSpWDRT_t3H0UElo7LLm0JugCbi9ofo8aiPFghCuIBBeJDBM7KPPwD1VugTLutdBXLurtSgxRdyb3axHysZOo0h-nOC-fxQEzRlLHwcm2BW7h4_J8R_riJrTyp4gT0AvYk5SgcKoKrqsjTF-6YUPZ95Vj6fcqXx2QGP30DwgSRJ8cXvd4Z8BwiIPVXTit0XDrkg-MVUUSqyaoEykoHNy9i2ot6jxcFIXJdiwPJ5A2d37Xj7cJmaI-gc9SIG-aM) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5b2e00e374124705ae32910cbb30da5c&_e=XFdw6hdtq9-sA4iAb5UMUdPnnN9NkyWG02h-XiW7osOhGginIT0u2bUKATE8pL_nRJrSpWDRT_t3H0UElo7LLm0JugCbi9ofo8aiPFghCuIBBeJDBM7KPPwD1VugTLutdBXLurtSgxRdyb3axHysZM_N99SgJEPkmIgFTj29rwYKlPnhAnM-FDaAsYvKOIzAyUqREPYt8CMi0gt32jixxW3Iu_j9sGpvBjt2XO5xC2JRWJY3ckIjMP7XoOjZN8CuraBa9lQG-moxN-JVSQpAI5XlpHD3G8DQNdgUdWqyki9dwTLZZaaNar67GUxkLh0D)**

[**July 9, 1862:** Morgan's Raiders embarked on their raid into Kentucky, having crossed over from Tennessee. They launched an attack on the 9th Pennsylvania Cavalry stationed at a USA garrison. During the assault, the Raiders managed to capture 30 soldiers who were retreating, while also causing significant damage by destroying tents and stores Eventually, they returned to Tennessee, leaving a trail of disruption in their wake.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5b2e00e374124705ae32910cbb30da5c&_e=XFdw6hdtq9-sA4iAb5UMUdPnnN9NkyWG02h-XiW7osPN_kk1X4SP9fIvhdeR4WLeAZt5IxexNBDAkTRR9EXNla6QM28ICA9RN3AdeMZ0qKPIsGPBUyAE6kU1SmFiDcq4k2Bwrhq4uCN4GPPjVFHDXhgkwSuUvXYT4sTu5qcm80Qu-OFGmmYRB7GtNcMavA_sToVrLE5hCAMSOEWRq0JDDm4bLzbDiEsb47ijr3P3fFonmUJAlqMpXjoMu-Cta6g8YLrlbGJ1fPnTGLdvWurfT63IL7aGEBgvKSO5_bCgYyU%3D) **Source -[explorekyhistory.ky.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5b2e00e374124705ae32910cbb30da5c&_e=XFdw6hdtq9-sA4iAb5UMUdPnnN9NkyWG02h-XiW7osPN_kk1X4SP9fIvhdeR4WLeAZt5IxexNBDAkTRR9EXNla6QM28ICA9RN3AdeMZ0qKPIsGPBUyAE6kU1SmFiDcq4VOO8ZxXeV1Qfdr7LvCY6d_8joOc29wDGxTcihC4KmS0Ptt32M4WNwUkUv8S92NoKyMQz_q-4F4qtXc1noTV30J5X-GoZBUSLZacaO--rDoY4RM8IDQ7q2ACpMW1eRbIlMqFnZgtl6cuMVMNtOmST7iMFHV56MKrV0tzsu24qLD8%3D)**

[**July 9,****2002****:** The annual MLB All-Star Game took place, which later became known as the "All-Star Game fiasco." The game ended in a 7-7 tie after 11 innings, as both teams ran out of available pitchers. This unprecedented result sparked controversy and disappointment among players, fans, and officials, as the game was meant to determine home-field advantage in the World Series. The tie led to significant changes in the All-Star Game format, ensuring that such a situation would not occur again in the future.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5b2e00e374124705ae32910cbb30da5c&_e=XFdw6hdtq9-sA4iAb5UMUdPnnN9NkyWG02h-XiW7osPB3AyjOCQFBvi4l-xNuQ3jWjH4ZUHo9qEoa2Mvh5ofBS-CVFQfRg1PZPqlZET6ZgsNeC2aRGBnu0jBfQ8vtuGZw_9qnNsP5exPEFCknT4Ikor-llHtJa6CnHBlUha0rZZrxruLDAOG8dvUdOXOneuU3bYE8DFIbuhBkyu1c7cxB_lFIGvADLjfOOZsBD1_bWJJczK3yq4Lal8fVW1c7EM2FbTauCHUYQirw-rwz8oykT1pN9C6VNV0XmRNWFLeY_mwocF9OU1G7egUVtobHl1AqD_jYi2epKj53-3RlbgAQg%3D%3D) **Source -[espn.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5b2e00e374124705ae32910cbb30da5c&_e=XFdw6hdtq9-sA4iAb5UMUdPnnN9NkyWG02h-XiW7osPB3AyjOCQFBvi4l-xNuQ3jWjH4ZUHo9qEoa2Mvh5ofBS-CVFQfRg1PZPqlZET6ZgsNeC2aRGBnu0jBfQ8vtuGZw_9qnNsP5exPEFCknT4Ikor-llHtJa6CnHBlUha0rZZrxruLDAOG8dvUdOXOneuUhsdT51LbGwOGUBmuEPk_QnB8WiL9iVuNaq-7jY1EXUI6j5XtCQ2dJPbWyFWimnk1Gy-IvLs36jS_6x6Rmj7GbpgP3qbDf4k7Eizyo6kRg_PnBL23-KsyEkTppYhI-oG74twGD-jbgzumb6EH1shW5w%3D%3D)**

Recent news from Ohio has sent shockwaves through the redistricting landscape. The Ohio congressional redistricting case has been bouncing back and forth like a political hot potato, with the fate of fair maps hanging in the balance. Just recently, the United States Supreme Court sent the case back to the Ohio Supreme Court, leaving the future of Ohio's districts in the hands of seven justices.
* * *
**_“This is an important validation of our system of checks and balances, and the Ohio Supreme Court should move quickly to reaffirm the state’s constitutional prohibition against partisan gerrymandering. Ohio voters, who went to the ballot box in 2018 and overwhelmingly demanded reform for their state’s congressional redistricting process -- the very same reform the Republican petitioners in this case initially supported -- deserve to have that reform upheld and enforced.”_**
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
* * *
It's clear that our fight for fair maps is far from over, and we need your help to ensure that every American's voice is heard, no matter their political affiliation. How the Ohio’s Supreme Court decides this case will shape the future of representation for millions of Ohioans. We cannot stand idly by and allow partisan gerrymandering attempts to undermine the very foundation of our democracy.
And this is where you come in, team. By supporting All On The Line, you are joining a movement that is working tirelessly to end the partisan manipulation of maps and restore power to the people. body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, July 9th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKWQfZXhzjJsJJss3eapS7QFoy8ryUne7omGJ7dN-s2-LnKGOm5Ad-ZOPHmfJl-16ZX2yiDP_jwPaD95wIDUaC0KONjJtP4SPfcoAgPfzRbBQqCAdDlzgT96kvcL_P3tTAKAYUYQw-TsUI1SI0S2QnSSWm1kZFuwcmRgdRKJV0Kgr_tkEh1Y4TAIbRFkmxIB2gg65pIjUIEnJDlfoJOsT1wtnKDCAd2wbg2lK1kkQbsFBbDy7XpZQC_78csTYwvleV4SKV_r_ZVeyFQwbx2_b1omw7nLCG74TtbF5eQEa__IyxLp6lCMr0x1iP8uv91bSlvuS_vxC5vmeFTGERUpbG4is3HxQGSmqwYmTGy9iDmTZZakVsgFg9WIkeFGbBCDkcJR3O2TpO9I_vNfgLrgz_nkLNKY74VOVZXdbjTqA6GR09oZdzlTBKNYzWDYB2E-5c/3xr/80deF427Roi61CNoNOjoSg/h0/B2s8k74vbsitne_Vro9CAdjRNo7JOOBhBx-d4V8dxEo)
---
1️⃣ **_Iowa:_ GOP governor calls special session, aiming to pass statewide abortion ban**
In Iowa, Republican Governor Kim Reynolds called a special session with the goal of [**passing new, dangerous abortion restrictions in the state →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDNClnthegaegMbidLNE7CRFK37neGdQthExWKGMP7HpY8yW_0y19B7fAM4ZA2u8pQSek_k0kSQJkoHdu8wPz73SfdM0B2pJ9qX8x2HGosrhCd6Q07Uj7WZEs3G0KvzGq6U3wP7Ige5WFyIPf_cS2egbW526O-dgFqSLE2bY8dmsyBgXjD40Y5zwkraky_zhQRM8AkiE8joqgPpZYAxO12giIKpg0oZQr6Url_7T7PGji1mqdkXDe_SUi5GAZ6qg-X1xYzGK7boxT-1FjS26-8x_-owdWuoeMehhxJRhZ28iIjuTLbi5uMMJ2hg8u3evcgHHObgwl3VnNkshqwXxzeG9gTS9RUkqfOX5U02mZTBMBGQWnhJjNo7J_CHqDZx3laRAXJz2dpKrb04cJDPiEvOpUUkocb6B6Ie31lQvf0JNWWaKfk2_7JDw9dFUvgKAUc9t2gp64fgKvkbsfVG0WvoGQJbWTJgpCXFKgNTAlXJG3pr-eosYhPtHxwxY0ThzZToPRKXYhJ8hcB8XbZA8l2jRtuZ4SCNCAFJJTQPXc7I4O5VI5epxLOQ_bP6mNcCT08NJBa-f9unvajLBfSgMZCO-vofWK33XtxtGPafSk-AHvfeXH6dB5BVkhbhCaAgVCgYH8GgYS2_kEPzMchmXp3fQ/3xr/80deF427Roi61CNoNOjoSg/h1/J44Cj_Xu8JRRIHLJqRmqfq5_15Wv0zscl_Pm3xeBAjg)
2️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ Despite SCOTUS ruling, Republicans continue attacks on voting**
In North Carolina, Republicans are continuing to push anti-voting legislation, even after the [**Supreme Court ruled against them in _Moore v. Harper_ last month →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDL2pqlARv2wBshrgOqWkXMFoa1ArJHx1MST6CkywpPyogTBMVws5PwBtZQliT4Wo2vTGkG9UCFuKQo5S7ZBSDl5Tuef_gskWa8ZUg489tYJh6lwxdob0VcUko3C8uWPgO-IvMkTMs1-ddnJWF5VVruQcZVzaQFyyf9DOi0Aj3BQSWcwbixN9s6Xk4ZSWQJhCOVs_7tc3zRgAEKlLVlhhjcMXV-kKBsF0nivRTsaCUrn2WEHyqpKuSRSvn35wnHVr4SoBdUYtZ2EtuQey3e5eKuQQoupPxnZHNYT7DrEv3t0CvrpyEVDHsH_DrymPGClQZFHBTIztQXVrz0IMWu1UeubWnFWNtbIhYXU7VrCtdoLwBkSqdR8MgYAKUezkaJBTOrZLGAxkvLk0m4ONLoio9CDBcUzCc1DA0sna-U5036_t7iY_eyHMT2NqfpwaADScUDmKUbKk5ni2u-ilAfztPkhOH0W1wqN31uQUZdkEyo53-rsudEgsGhYHz3AzK3xUL-7iedDMogNJUhULvI3NxdktxisPyY7bOnOsiy93YsN5IctZuZndLikM62HaRt6pnhRBYlILkCOF5d4Z7mjfgwLHYvKXRo65XHz292SPdv6CgpaUV1mLAIbRMt8834kLwHjC8Fek4TZ55Oh3QH-SHwQ/3xr/80deF427Roi61CNoNOjoSg/h2/tFo6S3pVQws8QQ7KczUIFIuiJMzognFC3yfwpjMDB4U)
3️⃣ **_Delaware:_ Democrats elect first female House speaker in state’s history**
In Delaware, House Democrats concluded their legislative session by electing Majority Leader Valerie Longhurst as House Speaker, [**making her the first woman to hold the position →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHz0rA04Bg6j9Ml5gLkgBUqGaXacogwGPClV0gC91hKUJTkRBJhES_C0eDSdGmxbr-JRpuSxyhCzh10sPrtSFJwaqba866vnmVG_fZvlT13N7nZS8wgft0zX9KLK0BdwPHXfv541TkKABH1zsMKiIwgUHCTN7jqnZw0hiB06bMAtGTsAK0x1e7VYT9yfkbAoJU7Q8QVAeqBkNvEse7mSimnupTlFWg4oX7vzPiS-9b4cXIndFXS_rH8oNbQBpxgad13Cbjf71Mo5fJSTQ0j4OUoAsNcZ4Mr95G3bjXfjJlDJMMqO_Cbyjcj7q2kNyll0coe9oYS4VTfidRSacPjulx0B3OOOxACwgN2SbfsEzOQ6jSZC4Ab-K9TYwRZbwagwok2vsyI2NRZ3IC8-efgK7xtNNW9MgW_udZansyS3X_R8WKyU_5MxjJLIQlNytm6GJALFzh1AzWzRAPpYSPS_CB62dkZGM2_d78uPCIG_ntsEP-osAF7CVjfGoX4gorUh5Dj4Rdlf3yfAw-YOSEA7lIPbXVRVgA_vkmNtEh70PLxxG99AjD1r0M-l8MGM0vSfy_8M1YlkNrKscoVpINOjv_9K1mblaEzp5O-S9uikk0OKndqavOhX0L_jCZsnS_0TSU4/3xr/80deF427Roi61CNoNOjoSg/h3/x7lw4lfCWKRVNpRAP1vctJ9NuE8puSvEd6GbHMib5io)
4️⃣ **_Read:_ In Virginia, Fundamental Freedoms Are On The Ballot This November**
This fall, every seat in the Virginia legislature is on the ballot – and these elections will be nothing short of consequential. disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Biden TRAILING Trump
| **We’ll keep this quick. Here’s what you need to know ahead of the Presidential race:**

1) Donald Trump’s laundry list of scandals and arrests have actually BOOSTED his fundraising numbers in the past few months. **_WHAT?!_**

2) President Biden is losing momentum in several new polls — **and is even trailing Trump in top battleground states.**

3) The ONLY way we can come back and keep MAGA traitors like Trump out of the White House is if we organize TODAY. **_Not tomorrow, not in 2024, RIGHT NOW!_**

[The fate of our democracy is hanging in the balance — and it’s up to all of us to save it. Please, rush $7 or anything you can spare towards our $24,000 White House Fund so we can stop a GOP takeover before it’s too late! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49166?t=6&akid=9057%2E878179%2EjdUTHY) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49167?t=7&akid=9057%2E878179%2EjdUTHY)

Can we count on you?

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9057%2E878179%2EjdUTHY). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9057%2E878179%2EjdUTHY).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9057%2E878179%2EjdUTHY) to request fewer emails. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU Friend, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. clean_body: | | | | | Friend, A federal judge appointed by President Trump ruled that the Biden White House violated the First Amendment by colluding with Big Tech to censor your free speech. But now, the Biden Administration has already vowed to APPEAL the ruling... The White House claims it’s necessary for them to COLLUDE with Big Tech in order to prevent “harm” from being inflicted upon our democracy. The ONLY harm being done to our Republic is coming directly from the tyrannical White House that wants to be able to control the information YOU see all the way up until Election Day 2024. This is yet another way for the Left to use Election Interference to stay in power. There is absolutely no greater threat to our nation than the Left’s vicious assaults on YOUR God-given rights. It’s no exaggeration to say that 2024 will truly be the final battle for America. If the Left sees that they can get away with interfering in our elections without facing any consequences, then nothing will stop them from staying in power for the rest of time. The Free Republic conceived by our Founding Fathers is hanging by a thread. subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWEKKo9DhN

We've done something new. We've created a free online teaching
series that combines the learning of an online course with the
features of a ....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWEKKo9DhN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

Does
America need a "Great Reset?"

In 2020,
members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and
launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world
economy.

As Klaus
Schwab-the founder and executive director of the Forum-wrote, "we
need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would
have the effect of canceling our American way of life.

A recent
Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset,
its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.

This
seminar-titled "The Great Reset?"-is now available as a free
online video series.

Filmed on
the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight
into:

The
origins and leaders of the Great Reset
How
the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large
corporations
The
connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
What
"environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
The
Great Reset from China's perspective

Alternatives to the Great Reset

You can
receive instant access to this free video series right now using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62011092:WEKKo9DhN:m:3:2532013465:30B8A85CD7B44A996930B2817C10864A:r

You will
learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and
pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with
your family, friends, and more.

As
America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of
disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to
the defense of the free market and American liberty.

Use the
link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: How We Win
body:
We need your support to continue our mission.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqdo60ch87e72jod35g5gqo6tk6jq7oa0ijh10d8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1gr6db7c6rj1ophcdr75dj1cmr70o9ksiqn7dlge1hj3cpgstj64tplm5qrac37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphmcsqj9o3nchj38p5jcorr1db5e8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp80lnug02kfuubgilssmhhn2setnegqihsml06g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Are you ready to take the fight to save America to the next level? If so, I have a special offer for you. **I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book,_How We Win!_** Thousands of patriots have already gotten their copy, and now it's your turn. The book is yours when you make a generous gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z030oh4tmddu8p5ofpkjd8mc4pvidem6bkrpg5oo_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs)
---
| | **That’s right -_ANY AMOUNT!_ Even a gift of $10 will cover the cost of shipping.** [**Click here to get yours before we run out of copies!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfhdgtc6m0g07cd08gv0sdt5rurh40o6v154etr8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr4psg5s3rrpqb0nb54v2a6hlf8pt6ivlg8ahvpg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs)
---
Until now, we have only sent this book to TPUSA supporters who make gifts of $100 or more. But frankly, I think the mission is too important to be that selective. As far as I’m concerned, if you care about this movement even a little -- even enough to give just $10 -- then I need you on board, and I need to get this valuable book into your hands. [**If that’s you, then grab your copy today by clicking right here.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9kgrlqa79078vstfn0jjkjejg09jmitgusf74lg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. You see, after _ELEVEN YEARS_ at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ criss-crossing the country... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... **... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen.** We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** But to do it, we need to rally an army of informed, motivated, and equipped patriots who are ready to take action -- which is why I want to arm you with this book today.
---
[Get Your Copy >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z77rgbu3qqgsijtk18ppeos3vt2dtrnat0qfigg8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs)
---
And remember -- when you make a generous gift to TPUSA today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. Turning Point USA is inspiring the next generation to love America again so we can defeat the radical Left and WIN the American Culture War. With over 600,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America...we're DOING IT! But we can't do it alone. We need your support to continue our mission. That's why I'm offering you this special gift when you make a donation of any amount to Turning Point USA. [**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone! Even a gift of just $10 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn1le1g1h0beo0il0g5fqhphjci65o5fpkolhda0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlvvjkfcp6un0bkef2ifm5ohainujiav0n6h91io_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs)
---
Please, don't miss out on this opportunity to join our team and become a part of the movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right. Claim your copy of _How We Win_ today and help us secure victories for American Greatness! For America,
---
Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcl8crrohfagv52n4n9dfmgid2jsrvvhddb3jm2g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjie2o34cph2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd9t1paadk20545m35ba0ff6637899le9uolvhpg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0s3ie9ob0chj649fg)

subject: I can’t sleep

body:
HER Time PAC [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP46/1/102543/images/HerTimePrimary.png]
Hey FirstName/there,

Sorry to email so early, but I can’t sleep. (And this time it’s not a crying baby!)

I’m wide awake and stressed because my team tells me our fundraising has fallen off a cliff in the past week, which is a huge problem.

I’ve been so busy advocating for abortion access and pushing the SHIELD Act through Congress that I haven’t been as focused on fundraising.

But now that’s coming back to bite me, and we might not raise what we need to keep fighting all year and beyond.

Will you pitch in any amount to help get us back on track? It really does make a difference. Here’s a personal link you can use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-july2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-july2023]

Thanks for listening, team.

— Katie

Sent from my iPhone
HER Time PAC
HER Time PAC
2120 University Ave
Berkeley, CA 94704
United States

name: Jon Tester
subject: the attacks have already started
body:
this is personal...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc41265a7-b499-49a6-862d-3507a91cc7cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, My team says we need to raise $100,000 by our critical fundraising deadline. So, [before I ask you to chip in a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta835a458-7c33-4c59-b280-ba037d9f0508/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), here are three reasons why:
1. Sabato’s Crystal Ball ranks Montana a TOSS-UP. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Montana.

2. I’m one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators. Political experts are saying my seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help us.

3. Over $70 MILLION was spent in 2018. So we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen.

Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back. Please: [Split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign right now to help us reach our critical $100,000 goal. We’re running out of time. Every dollar will help us block Mitch McConnell from taking over the Senate >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T133973fd-ca0c-4adf-bb38-feec5ebeec7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c9bb88f-5bdc-4213-831a-5aa4c97ef5a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, Jon [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8b791bf-3310-47cd-9877-02149ebce791/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae422cca-501f-4d6d-b660-3e1e0fa7cadd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

Maryland Publication Calls McDow A Serious Campaign!
---
A Miner Detail's Maryland Political Hangout said we are a 'smart' campaign and an actual 'grown up' running for office.
[Read Text & Respond](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xXfOxOEVid8G7dew2b0h7358fvc3nFQvoiaEd_-TchhKQGAk4G-nmFlXH-BPZAFo7J61PVSY0MXvtiVs2QbYCqhFvHldV6eMsxbX5_Edltv6GBTTS_cN7vWnc9yQvcLPUm-TX5m_jbBt4IX3qgib5K-rpVFKH3JDMXtDE8D58jCJ_XWIsvjkkh_DVqX2xRmoxj0sCRgh92s_7w7Igx4bZA==&c=i5nfpRNV9UlKXvn494ERbpg5GW3NyYHh1QQ1XOUKcXTb6H23KTbSQQ==&ch=76DSQ6lJ1tVE_umkQm2kTlYHY6ox76G9f3CuDUuvob3L5HSQpizCIg==)

---
| | I am so thankful to all who volunteer their time and money to support our campaign. We are just getting started and our listening sessions are paying off. We also have several speaking events we will let you know about in the coming weeks.
Please connect with us on social and ask your colleagues and friends to do the same. We are not asking for your vote right now; rather, we would like to know 'What is keeping you up at night?' so that we can answer "How we can help you sleep better."
Some of my colleagues use to say "Well..let the Republicans in office so that the grown-ups can govern." I can now look at them and say I am the grown-up and a Blue Dog Democrat, a pragmatist, and measured.
We are also super excited my advisory team has grown, check us out: [Committee To Elect Stephen McDow](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xXfOxOEVid8G7dew2b0h7358fvc3nFQvoiaEd_-TchhKQGAk4G-nmFlXH-BPZAFovuK22jTmSbnc3ll3k1yIS9hOPUXMFIfGii5_pbfMHj3Kc46GfIppCoCcd6Jfd4rpPv5vYg1rSAD0UVVZt7GKYu_s0mIP1wbpEeggu4aBgC0=&c=i5nfpRNV9UlKXvn494ERbpg5GW3NyYHh1QQ1XOUKcXTb6H23KTbSQQ==&ch=76DSQ6lJ1tVE_umkQm2kTlYHY6ox76G9f3CuDUuvob3L5HSQpizCIg==).
Best,
Stephen

name: Jon Kaiman
subject: Campaign Deadline This Thursday
body:
Hi Friends,

This Thursday, July 13th, is our campaign’s first financial disclosure deadline with the NYS Board of Elections.

Republicans PACs will use this public information to decide where and how much to invest in races across the state. This deadline is an opportunity to show our campaign’s strength and raise the resources necessary to win this November.

Can you chip in today? Every dollar helps. Please click below to register for my fundraiser this Wednesday in Port Washington, or to contribute if you are unable
to attend.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cocktailswithkaiman

Together, we can establish an organizational hub for Democrats to reclaim our Town and districts across Long Island.

Thank you,
Jon Kaiman

Jon Kaiman
P.O. Box 222061
Great Neck NY 11022 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-7HEUeIP8L4KJY2sx4EQwzHzWxuFUuiywmXXR3m-s-8=/NCREKbVVux0Vh_2m3K4yMpIH6dMOS_BrCaM3RkDkMhw=.

**Good morning! **Today in 1940, Germany launched the attack that became the [Battle of Britain,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskb2O3CAUhZ8Gd1j8GGMXLiYbbapNFSmlBeYyZoNhxFx74ybPHi2jKFG03eE7cLg_31_mFxNiSNevZoMJfZ7NguGAmWnKGRVyFo2bPIAA2cDE-2EYh1Gpvlknv3ReWKX1ohbQvGOy7_VolfWjHtjYNWESTEimOeNMCsFb0J103nA-gmd2UKRj4ALm0r7mkHAFH898QGmXvDVxWhFvdyIvRDwT8WwhYYTzVkIu57bfYd_aXK7t_uOvSR8uNclRXIFagxiBZk9tCWhCer_6P6MYNoghwXvHr3s8KR87RiWnecFsodRzLUISeflF5AXhJxL5-dsKRCjBPtXIKrN_kD_fKfFUAWdEPH2Bspl0VvCW9-iqWs3xeBvSYRy4fwOaMrnbW4gx3HtNOnbdTIh1PPjxtn4HAAD___oSkmk) perhaps the greatest aviation battle of WW2. An overwhelmed Royal Air Force rose up to defeat the German Luftwaffe in 100 days.

In today's edition, we're talking about the rising cost of a first-class stamp, the new $420,000 all-electric Roll Royce sedan, and an AI press conference that reassured no one when robots said they have no plan to kill us all.

## Biden Sends Deadly Cluster Bombs to Ukraine
President Biden's decision to let Ukraine [have cluster bombs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFurDAQheGnMR1oPMaACxe3odvbpkQGj3cnMRhh71p5-2hTpznVkT7p_7gtN8eRj_t_t5MtIS1uK_yiBcZWQotqwcbbQISkGrJymCYzGa2H5mGDNi6EyaDr_aCN3mAAs61Dr9Sk_egbtgioYJQgQSHKjsZe-eCkNBRgnbTogTyXdHWfiY_yoBC_04uubkt7E-2jlDML9U_gLHCutXZnilx4S--DwPmgmgXOb0XgDON7jMB5i89c6GrXtK-5fX5djg9qK7kzHbkFkKCVNM1l_Vk5Rs7DKHq4747jL13-LvETAAD__wnMXSU) has divided Democrats, with many saying the weapons violate the Geneva Convention.

Cluster munitions are banned by 120 countries because they disperse [large numbers of tiny bomblets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FurDAQAL_G7kDrXTCmcPEaunttSmTw-nBkMALnrPx9dKnTzkgjzcdjfriY4vH873a2JeTZrSW-eIahUdAgzSi9DczIJNkqbcxoxr7XcrOeel794kznMHjqNMAYyGEwBKvWJKNFQIJBgQJCVC0PHfnglBo5wGJ60QH7WPLVfuZ4lI1D-s4vvto17zLZrZTzFvRP4CRwqrW2y7K-ncDp4Hq_Yb6Sb_jryic3WiuiHgd5WX_WmFK89SA6eO4upt9m-XvxJwAA__8WrFEm) over a wide area. They can land without exploding and then kill civilians who touch them.

Ukrainian officials praised the decision, saying they needed it for their ground war against Russia, but [some in Congress ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL3SpCAQAJ8GMyx-_MHA4BKzvfRCa4BRZxfBAnate_ur2_iLOuikq_881gdQoLj_hhPnuqUVXKUPrmLkUnClV9X4eUNUqBuc5WDMZKa-H5pjRteBNjBpYTQgbFKD7JU2_eDtNDrd0KyE0mKUQgqtlGxx7LTfQMoJN2FNzzqBnmrK7TNRrAdu4W_6YG5dOpswH7VehelfTC1MLfd9t9G6iHf575larhSokitMLc-E3JLHyNTyJfe4YfSF7_ShuPP3KwNF5C68S8XMbTpt4ZYuyJUKRH69y2HBvXh2ESatjGjy7K-bQqAyjKwT-wkUvmn151P_AgAA__97k2y2)called it immoral.
## First Class Stamps Cost More Today
The U.S. Post Office [raised the price ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu7CAURL8GOiy4YMAFxWvc7WtTWixc1kTYWAatk7-PnDrNNDOao_PxWB4-l7y__vsNXU918aHnNy7cMMEZyAVodAkRUFJ0Qls72WkcNV2dH1WwT61RiSlhsMro4C0mHjGG8ESaHXCQ3AguuAQQAxolY_JCTJj4045EcYy513P4rHnvK6byXd94DqFutLi196MR-Y_ATGC-rmvwX7m2uyUw398EZm7usATmo7buX8ha99vRWKits7yHE31Ddq_p6eJx5VJy04Yo_tp8Lr-s_rf6TwAAAP__lSJZkQ)of a first-class stamp by 3 cents, from 63 cents to 66 cents, the third price hike in the last 12 months.

It's the 17th rate change since 2000 and the shortest time between stamp increases in history.

The Post Office said the increase is necessary to offset [higher operating expenses ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7tuwyAUxvGngQ0LDhjwwNDFW7p2tLgcJ0T4IkNi5e0rd-72Sd_w0__nNt18Lnm9f_sFXZu3yceW3zhxwwRnICegyc2IgJKiE9rawQ59r-nDmRhUTMr2EW1K0QBqobQNWochBWlpdsBBciO44BJAdGiUTLMXYsCZB9sTxTHlth3dc8tre-BcPtsbjy5uCy3u0dpeifwiMBIYz_PsYqgrnvX6CYzXJDC-6l5ZbX7ZWV7jgb4iu2CmNYu4tsqer_IhMNLDpf3MpeSqDVH8vvhc_qz2f_pvAAAA__-721qF)as it struggles to succeed in a ten-year plan to reach profitability.
## Tribe Wants Ben & Jerry's Land Back
The Abenaki Nation would like to discuss getting its tribal land back. Currently, [ Ben & Jerry's Burlington, VT,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFy6yAQQNGvkTo0C0ggFRSvcefXptQgsVjrIHAAm_HfZ5I6_S3unI_rerUUKN7-2xNN9Wm1e6UXrqAZBybkKnpnPKJA2aPhap6XeZkm1R9GKgujUmrZLSzSez1qrzgHYTVs2zj3ZAQICZoDBykEH1CP0nnL-YIetnnqRkBHNeXhnijWA314pxfmYU9nH8xR66N08l8nLp24tNaGiK00xM-foBOXDSO7Y87vwg607utpc8Vc2AvzmWJlFB3dMKZnYftB6FmpKWBkwUbH-Mz5JEWfjXs0CoGK0t0It9NS-B2of3t8BwAA__9oEGK-) headquarters are sitting on it.

Ben & Jerry's last week called for America to give back "stolen Indigenous land," [including Mt. Rushmore](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAURL8GOiK42AYXFK9xl9duaRG4xDfCkMUoq_z9yittt800I43mnI_revWUqdz_-x1dT3X1odMLV2mEkgL0Cjy6hAioOTo1WTvbeRwnvrk5abRhUGAGb22U6hZSTHbS1isYATk5kKClUVJJDaAuaAYdk1dqxiRvdmSDxEi9tsujUukbpvyuL2yXUHee3db782D6H4OFwVLez3r0s2KwnMMMFml-44ZFPLC19yG2T0GHqEUUf6IIv2Oj4IvIvkTxwrbX0kXYCBODhTcXn1-UMx2TYYO8757yz4H-t4_vAAAA__9zrmBf), drawing criticism and a call to boycott its ice cream.

Don Stevens, chief of the remaining Abenaki Nation tribes, told Newsweek the tribe wanted to reclaim its Vermont land, but Ben & Jerry's has not publicly responded to calls to return the land.

clean_body: President Biden's decision to let Ukraine have cluster bombs has divided Democrats, with many saying the weapons violate the Geneva Convention. | | | | | | MONDAY, JULY 10, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today in 1940, Germany launched the attack that became the perhaps the greatest aviation battle of WW2. An overwhelmed Royal Air Force rose up to defeat the German Luftwaffe in 100 days. In today's edition, we're talking about the rising cost of a first-class stamp, the new $420,000 all-electric Roll Royce sedan, and an AI press conference that reassured no one when robots said they have no plan to kill us all. Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, Note: In our last edition, we accidentally said that President Nixon took America off the gold standard in 1917. Whoops! That would be 1971. | Biden Sends Deadly Cluster Bombs to Ukraine President Biden's decision to let Ukraine has divided Democrats, with many saying the weapons violate the Geneva Convention. Cluster munitions are banned by 120 countries because they disperse over a wide area. They can land without exploding and then kill civilians who touch them. Ukrainian officials praised the decision, saying they needed it for their ground war against Russia, but it immoral. First Class Stamps Cost More Today The U.S. Post Office a first-class stamp by 3 cents, from 63 cents to 66 cents, the third price hike in the last 12 months. It's the 17th rate change since 2000 and the shortest time between stamp increases in history. The Post Office said the increase is necessary to offset it struggles to succeed in a ten-year plan to reach profitability. Tribe Wants Ben & Jerry's Land Back The Abenaki Nation would like to discuss getting its tribal land back. Currently, - headquarters are sitting on it. Ben & Jerry's last week called for America to give back "stolen Indigenous land," , drawing criticism and a call to boycott its ice cream. Don Stevens, chief of the remaining Abenaki Nation tribes, told Newsweek the tribe wanted to reclaim its Vermont land, but Ben & Jerry's has not publicly responded to calls to return the land. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Real discourse is returning
body:
Real conversations | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/discourse?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

At long last, conversations are happening again when it comes to medical science. Scientific discourse on all-cause mortality, IFR, & immunity is experiencing a renewal. To that I say, "hallelujah!" Please watch exactly what I mean by [clicking the video thumbnail](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2d885220f0&e=9828080a05) below (friends and family may also want the video shared with them):
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=75519cfa5c&e=9828080a05 "Scientific Discourse is Returning!")
---
| In a political environment, where science and logic has been tossed out the window for years - it now seems like we have a glimmer of hope. Authentic, challenging conversations are happening in the medical community again. Science demands that we constantly check our hypotheses, and that we constantly test to see if they're right. I've been so disturbed by the surety by which so many so-called "experts" have asserted, while being proven totally wrong.

That's in part why I decided to [make this video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c95c466cfc&e=9828080a05).

I don't have a monopoly on being right. No one does - not Joe Biden, Anthony Fauci, or anyone else. Goodness knows, I've been wrong in big ways in the past!

I'm starting to see a shift towards that scientific introspection again. I hope you it continues.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: STOP toxic dumps in our ocean
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868105?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **_BREAKING NEWS:_ A team of orcas has been ATTACKING yachts! ** You heard that right, Friend. Orcas off the coast of Europe have been stealthily and strategically disabling boat rudders. According to one scientist, a female orca known as White Gladis may have had a past traumatizing experience with a ship and has since**taught her pod how to fight back. ** While these orcas are far away from the endangered Southern Resident orcas in the U.S. Pacific Northwest, it makes one thing clear: **orcas are intelligent and emotional creatures, and even small vessels can cause them great pain. ** Imagine what the titanic cruise ships charging through the home waters of Southern Resident orcas do to this endangered species. Cruise ships _**scare away the salmon orcas eat, dump pollution**_ into the ocean, and can **_even strike and kill whales!_ Today, only 73 Southern Resident orcas remain! [Please, Friend, tell the EPA to regulate the cruise industry by 11:59 pm TONIGHT and SAVE orcas from pollution and starvation!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868106?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868107?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**We could be among the LAST generation to share the planet with these beautiful creatures.** The decline in their favorite food -- Chinook salmon -- due in part to massive cruise ships and their pollution has led to increased _**stress, starvation, and miscarriages!**_
Orcas need your help, Friend. The EPA isn’t going to act unless we demand it. And until we do, greedy cruise companies will continue to pollute our oceans and hurt endangered orcas. [**If just 1 of every 18 people reading this email takes action, we can push the EPA to PROTECT endangered orcas from cruise ships! Act now! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868108?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868107?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Add Your Name via Left Action
subject: Sign: Don't let this extremist senator put our nation in danger
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Don't let this Republican senator single handedly block critically important military appointments](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3d4fda7-195d-4b06-b7fd-ab8818594bf2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7651e1ca-7d55-49f0-956f-2bc1b6f3cae6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | "For the first time in over a century, the U.S. Marine Corps [will not have](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20d62f87-0cfa-4387-b63f-becad924ae22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) a permanent leader." And that is just one of hundreds of critically important defense positions left unfilled because GOP Senator Tommy Tuberville of Alabama has put a "hold" on them -- an arcane and asinine Senate tradition that allows just one senator to block approval. [**Tell the Senate to act NOW to stop this dangerous delay.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80375b4f-af86-483b-ad03-a141c98b8fbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Tuberville is doing this to score points with anti-abortion extremists** , who object to the military covering travel expenses for service members based in states that outlaw abortion, and who need to go elsewhere for the procedure. Tuberville is putting our nation at risk and degrading our defense because he wants to appease these extremists. We can't let this continue. **He needs to end his "hold", or the Senate needs to end this ridiculous tradition, and move ahead in spite of his objection.** [**Add your name, and tell the Senate to act NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2be6c8ca-a019-40ed-a170-0a5226e4e851/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: CPT. Sam Brown
subject: I shouldn’t be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I’m fighting for my country.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661032%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fn2FEXe64YZxtK1v8o2tkw&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada’s next Senator. While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it -- I would burn to death. **_But, _Friend, _by the grace of God, I survived. _** I’m not special. I’m neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn’t required. Heroes are the people - like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife - who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. **_The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. _** My life belongs to my God and my country and I’m more than prepared to give my life to defend her. [**Which is why I’m running to be Nevada’s next Senator.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661033%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ngSMrUU2SFzr2c0f7jVHaw&sysid=1) I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won’t be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they’ve got to make sure they can hold this seat. [**BUT I’M NOT SCARED, Friend.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661034%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BwQIMnmRY%2bOhGj9P2c7%2f3A&sysid=1) If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me -- _but I can’t do this alone._ I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. [**Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661045%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rqokczyYOfmkGIeInwzs2w&sysid=1) to help me deploy to Washington? Duty First,
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661032%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fn2FEXe64YZxtK1v8o2tkw&sysid=1)
---
CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.) Republican U.S. Senate Candidate

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
God gave me a second chance and I’m not going to waste it

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28516%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KjpdgvXd45o6vKIPlEDBQw&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28517%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A1CeIJIMAIV7qfDf%2ffE9uw&sysid=1) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28518%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rhMb%2fI3vKOByzEF34hz%2bCA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28516%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KjpdgvXd45o6vKIPlEDBQw&sysid=1)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28519%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YbeG7%2bYIP2SQBVE%2fH%2f3%2bQ&sysid=1) -- but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28510%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z07PRokCPvkP1f9xHWKgVA&sysid=1)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28511%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xLDwzw6qx%2fOsrP%2fVhbP2HA&sysid=1) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28512%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cRx02PGwijKkO0BBOCoITQ&sysid=1) Duty First,
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28516%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KjpdgvXd45o6vKIPlEDBQw&sysid=1)
---
Captain Sam Brown
---

clean_body: God gave me a second chance and I’m not going to waste it | | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,I survived. By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. I truly shouldn’t be alive today. For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable. That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. -- but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. subject: The Beast
body:
The Mississippi legislature is indeed a beast. I believe it consist of the largest group of immoral, incompetent, and uncaring people I've ever met. The average unsuspecting person will be chewed up and spit out almost as soon as they are elected.

The Mississippi legislature is indeed a beast. I believe it consist of the largest group of immoral, incompetent, and uncaring people I've ever met. The average unsuspecting person will be chewed up and spit out almost as soon as they are elected.
Most believe it is the lobbyist who are the worst in the legislature but I've found lobbyist to be exactly who and what they profess to be, while legislators are often the opposite of what they claim.
There are two types of politicians in the legislature of which the newly elected legislator must be on the lookout. The first group are those who are extremely smart and capable of manipulating people. They can make anyone feel they are important, they listen and seem to agree completely with whatever your view happens to be. They are usually in a leadership position and use terms like, team-player, don't you want to be relevant, and promise to "help you accomplish your goals" but only if you help them first.
The other group to be wary of are those who are "good intentioned", some might even describe them as good people, but they want to be there so badly they are afraid to take a stand. These folks may have made it to a position as a committee chairman or vice-chairman and they are scared to death of losing that position. These are the legislators who know and believe in the Republican Party Platform but are too afraid to take a stand. The vast majority of legislators fall into this category. The thought of not being re-elected or losing that coveted position paralyzes them and they will betray every principle just to stay in the game.
Both of these groups are dangerous to the newly elected legislator. The first group will manipulate them and the second group will fill them with fear if they dare to take a stand.
As you prepare to vote this coming August ask yourself if that person has the strength to withstand this pressure.
But once elected it becomes your responsibility to remind your representative that you are watching, that you expect them to do what is right and maintain the principles you elected them to uphold. Even if it cost them that coveted position.
Follow this link for a [list of candidates](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/83bb8ead-f718-4f36-a9ae-41142f464aae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that have the strength and convictions needed to fight for you once elected. Vote for these men and women on August 8.

We Must Still Fight Against Drag Queens' Performances With Tennessee's Children | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/50cf60399fc4/jonathanskimettitransgender-5404070?e=9dd54a4530)

It's time for Tennessee Republicans to rise up and vote our values! **Does this picture align with your firm beliefs?** Of course not! Let it be known and save our children from this evil!
* * *
| [ ](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=216ba03c8a&e=9dd54a4530)
---
Charlotte praises AG Jonathan Skirmetti for staying the ban on youth gender-affirming care. Charlotte also, discusses the results of the July 4th Tennessee presidential poll and crime against children.
| | Peter,

Tennessee’s ban on gender-affirming care for transgender youth can go into effect — at least for now — IMMEDIATELY, after a federal appeals court on Saturday temporarily reversed a lower court ruling. God bless them for their courage!

Tennessee's attorney general, Jonathan Skrmetti, praised the ruling, saying the ban can now be fully enforced. "The case is far from over, but this is a big win," he said in a statement.

The ban — initially signed by Tennessee Governor Bill Lee on March 2, along with a ban on drag performances — applied to puberty-blocking medications, hormone replacement therapy, and any surgery for transgender or nonbinary children, the Tennessean reported. Physicians who supply the care can be sued and reported to authorities, as well they should!

Additionally, under the bill, children already undergoing gender-affirming care in the form of hormones have until the end of March 2024 to cease their treatment.

All previous laws allowing minors to consent to such care are also voided.

Unfortunately, US District Court Judge Thomas Parker's ruling limiting public drag show performances is still in effect.
---

name: CPT. Sam Brown
subject: I shouldn’t be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I’m fighting for my country.

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgu4aplsij66ajrfeikndud82kvo3deh2bokr41o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g66p71cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada’s next Senator. While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it — I would burn to death. **_But, _Friend, _by the grace of God, I survived. _** I’m not special. I’m neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn’t required. Heroes are the people – like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife – who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. **_The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. _** My life belongs to my God and my country and I’m more than prepared to give my life to defend her. [**Which is why I’m running to be Nevada’s next Senator.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6d7qgl7htdtp35kb1aci971aarikntfv8pltqtg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g66p71cdh2bs) I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won’t be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they’ve got to make sure they can hold this seat. [**BUT I’M NOT SCARED, Friend.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj4i3uehksihaf1nebtdll06pr8nka77766achs8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g66p71cdh2bs) If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me — _but I can’t do this alone._ I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. [**Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr90m3s38lr95oclh0epiv5jaqavg2ut2v6e4ito_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g66p71cdh2bs) to help me deploy to Washington? Duty First,
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z68v7jq15o2ebfhi7llpta96c5lj58u6irf45o10_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g66p71cdh2bs)
---
CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)Republican U.S. Senate Candidate

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936979:6ZbbMoINc:m:1:3299561967:9EAD7D0BDA6111C078FF0F0FB20D5B6E:r "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you. **[If you chip in right now,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936979:6ZbbMoINc:m:1:3299561967:9EAD7D0BDA6111C078FF0F0FB20D5B6E:r "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936979:6ZbbMoINc:m:1:3299561967:9EAD7D0BDA6111C078FF0F0FB20D5B6E:r "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

Friend, I love America and I love Virginia. They are my home and I’ll always fight to keep them fair and free, but the Left doesn’t see things the same way. When I ran for office as Lieutenant Governor alongside Glenn Youngkin and won, I became the first Black Woman in Virginia elected to statewide office. But that is NOT the reason I ran **– it was to replace the failed Democrats in office and put common sense back in our government.**

clean_body: Don’t be afraid of the Left| | | Friend, I love America and I love Virginia. They are my home and I’ll always fight to keep them fair and free, but the Left doesn’t see things the same way. When I ran for office as Lieutenant Governor alongside Glenn Youngkin and won, I became the first Black Woman in Virginia elected to statewide office. But that is NOT the reason I ran – it was to replace the failed Democrats in office and put common sense back in our government. | | I’m reaching out to you because that needs to happen again. Senate Republicans told me you are a fine American who is willing to help us flip Virginia fully RED in 2024. Conservatives have a chance to flip a Senate seat Red and retake our Majority from Chuck Schumer and his Democrats. As a former Marine and proud Black Conservative woman, I know what it means to face adversity. I’m asking for your courage to join Senate Republicans and me in our fight for America – Sincerely, Winsome Earle-SearsLt. Governor, Virginia Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | Paid for by the NRSC | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Read/Act News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._c2M9MDAyMjNOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzX2xld2lzX2NocmlzdGlhbml0eSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9SQU5PNDA4MDIifQ/ybbhRP5ZzH7Hfs5OOP6N9g)
---
| | Dear friend,C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://trk.readactnews._c2M9MDAyMjNOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzX2xld2lzX2NocmlzdGlhbml0eSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9SQU5PNDA4MDIifQ/EYLmA6kh5dl0SJB92LF2FQ)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._c2M9MDAyMjNOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzX2xld2lzX2NocmlzdGlhbml0eSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9SQU5PNDA4MDIifQ/oBKu-OAOwtda-j02HAwclg)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://trk.readactnews._c2M9MDAyMjNOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzX2xld2lzX2NocmlzdGlhbml0eSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9SQU5PNDA4MDIifQ/ZgFjwx0MuvIe5DYQOtXVwA).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

subject: New Video: Why I Started Granite Solutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Expand Educational Freedom, Enshrine Parental Rights, Lower Taxes For All.

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

To help explain the goals of Granite Solutions, I've launched this new video ad. [**Please watch and share it here!**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/1/010001893fe4d053-f7e3380d-975f-4994-9256-cd1d64c05f3e-000000/P_ONLyKaXxVQVXeYLnIyACyMi4c=329)

---
Expanding Educational Freedom, Enshrining Parental Rights into law, and Lowering Taxes For All - **that's my agenda for 2024 and beyond.**

It's not going to be easy to elect fellow conservatives at the local and state level to help achieve these goals, **but nothing worth doing is ever easy.** We're fighting for the future of our Granite State and need all the support we can get in order to win at the ballot box.

So, today, I'm going to ask you to do **three things :**

**1)**[**Share this video**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/3/010001893fe4d053-f7e3380d-975f-4994-9256-cd1d64c05f3e-000000/q75sXqb7C4dt3ZlNrlCC8qtdLyc=329)**** with your Granite State friends, family, and neighbors in order to help spread the message and increase our reach.

**2)**[**Sign up to volunteer**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fvolunteer/1/010001893fe4d053-f7e3380d-975f-4994-9256-cd1d64c05f3e-000000/OhvVczpwngn3esQeeycZUw7_cMc=329)**** with Granite Solutions to help build out our grassroots network.

**3)**[**Donate to help**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/4/010001893fe4d053-f7e3380d-975f-4994-9256-cd1d64c05f3e-000000/jrpv5-WIGhuGEKbD2qPp9YhCgYU=329)**** expand the reach of this new ad to Granite Staters not yet connected with our network.

We're going to win the 2024 election by going door to door, neighbor to neighbor, by talking to as many Granite Staters about the great opportunities ahead of the Granite State. [Join our Granite Solutions team with a generous donation and make a difference today!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/5/010001893fe4d053-f7e3380d-975f-4994-9256-cd1d64c05f3e-000000/0oDCwQfreSseUXB_s0aWmeX-nkU=329)

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

name: Jon Tester
subject: I have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks,

A self-funding GOP recruit hand-picked by Mitch McConnell just jumped in
the race for Montana’s Senate seat. Experts are saying Montana could
decide Senate control, so we have to act ASAP.

This is a critical turning point in our race and we’re about to see a
flood of outside money and attacks rush into Montana. You can bet
far-right groups will spend unprecedented amounts to attack me and mislead
voters.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18992?t=1001&akid=3385%2E346206%2EHPtqIW ]Montana is 2024’s most important Senate race and with so much on the
line, we cannot afford to lose. Rush a split donation between Charles
Booker and my campaign to help us raise the funds we need to beat the GOP
and protect this seat.

CHIP IN →

There has never been a more important time for you to step up than right
now.

— Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18992?t=1002&akid=3385%2E346206%2EHPtqIW ][IMG]

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
God gave me a second chance–and I’m not going to waste it

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zat82n57eko308rdpeoonbp66olitntm43ielba0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g61ob2chh2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuv4ocnm185r499tqiosgmdcr4j0daaf2regevv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g61ob2chh2bs) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5m08aj1vaj8p24btm61sdirp55d1cb3j9u2dh8g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g61ob2chh2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjhv7mi2u5dqljea6df5766q47e53firq3m99lv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g61ob2chh2bs)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcdmibukr0nli1srms00a6e6j9v7k3ojlpeudbjg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g61ob2chh2bs) -- but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqjlii564d5v4vpdgqeg7cev5c121c60lbclmfr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1g61ob2chh2bs)
---

clean_body: God gave me a second chance–and I’m not going to waste it | | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,I survived. By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. I truly shouldn’t be alive today. For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable. That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. -- but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. name: Pat Fallon
subject: 🚨BREAKING: Dems Allow 16-year-olds to vote!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

This is terrifying!

Democrats have finally succeeded in their quest to allow
16-year-old CHILDREN to vote in local elections.

Their recent success in Vermont is sure to spread to other
states, unless we stop them!

For generations, we have understood that children do not have
the critical thinking abilities, understanding, or fully
developed brain functions necessary to do things such as enter
into contracts, consent to adult activities, or smoke and drink.
That's why we have age restrictions on all of those things!

Democrats have, ironically, taken the anti-science stance here
and pushed this radical child-voting agenda that goes against all
known facts about human development.

Children can't possibly understand or have the depth of life
experiences to grasp the complexity of our nation's political
issues.

The Democrats know this and they don't care! All they care
about is getting access to millions of young, impressionable
voters who they can manipulate into supporting their radical,
woke agenda.

It's wrong and it puts our country in danger.

WE MUST STOP THEIR RADICAL AGENDA!

Joe Biden has remained silent as the far-left radicals in the
Democrat Party have pushed the agenda further and further into
the insane over the last few years; and children voting is only
the latest example.

Please make a contribution today to help me FIGHT and compete
against the Radical Left's fundraising machine that is destroying
our country. We can't let them succeed!

Thank you and God bless!

Pat Fallon

Conservative Congressman TX-04

PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS

| Dear Peter,
My wife Christine and I have lived in Setauket for almost two decades to work and raise our family. My reason for running is simple. I want to create a better future for my kids and your children and grand-children. As a businessman, I see problems and solve them. America needs leaders and patriots who love their country.
---
| My campaign is approaching a critical fundraising deadline this Thursday, July 13th and I need your help!
I am out walking everyday meeting with voters, but we need to raise funds for mailers and radio ads. For example, one mailer costs upwards of $10,000, but it's a critical piece in getting our message out to the voters.
[Would you partner with me with a donation of $50, $100, $250, or more if you are able, to help us meet our goals for this deadline? ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OzH9qPKiiJGTUxP1iTdyjmheLyPF-3mhfX6zSFfLhbumqizaU9SiRtaFub6zBfTkcIBQvE4rB1yk5ePqLCzOFMYtjKEbvmtP70zJeqt0oxT6UiHOL68Upx4SHvDJBS9a4ZMc5L8ZMt8Y1fb_MF5-kIc1cDsAhqgFwt0uqtHm9oGI1CDTMtoTkmyRfxZ38r7jGb2UqBJhn0Sp9LpHe7dRl6OyXVT1Yqc4&c=UyXKzUwwSUMaEeD4OUl9RlZhMPeK0xTlLnovxcCVluzpvl9Pu1IouQ==&ch=afHj2FFgDnNylJwtpmtNNn3Ff7YG-Q6mqVpOqjdNN7-Z-ATRf93tUg==)
---
| | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OzH9qPKiiJGTUxP1iTdyjmheLyPF-3mhfX6zSFfLhbumqizaU9SiRtaFub6zBfTkcIBQvE4rB1yk5ePqLCzOFMYtjKEbvmtP70zJeqt0oxT6UiHOL68Upx4SHvDJBS9a4ZMc5L8ZMt8Y1fb_MF5-kIc1cDsAhqgFwt0uqtHm9oGI1CDTMtoTkmyRfxZ38r7jGb2UqBJhn0Sp9LpHe7dRl6OyXVT1Yqc4&c=UyXKzUwwSUMaEeD4OUl9RlZhMPeK0xTlLnovxcCVluzpvl9Pu1IouQ==&ch=afHj2FFgDnNylJwtpmtNNn3Ff7YG-Q6mqVpOqjdNN7-Z-ATRf93tUg==)
---
| |
---
|
# A Track Record of Fighting for Suffolk Families
---
| | |
---|---
As the son of two Navy veterans, I know the sacrifices they have made for our country. My late mother Anna, after service to her country took on another role in serving children with specials needs. Her altruism and compassion for others helped shape me into the man I am today.

One of my most memorable career accomplishments was assisting a non-profit organization here in Suffolk County that was seeking to build a new facility to support their therapy programs for children on the spectrum as well as for veterans and women with PTSD. I secured critical funding to develop a new facility that assists in this important mission of healing.

As your next county legislator, I will continue to be present in our district and fight hard for children with special needs, and support our veterans.
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OzH9qPKiiJGTUxP1iTdyjmheLyPF-3mhfX6zSFfLhbumqizaU9SiRtaFub6zBfTkcIBQvE4rB1yk5ePqLCzOFMYtjKEbvmtP70zJeqt0oxT6UiHOL68Upx4SHvDJBS9a4ZMc5L8ZMt8Y1fb_MF5-kIc1cDsAhqgFwt0uqtHm9oGI1CDTMtoTkmyRfxZ38r7jGb2UqBJhn0Sp9LpHe7dRl6OyXVT1Yqc4&c=UyXKzUwwSUMaEeD4OUl9RlZhMPeK0xTlLnovxcCVluzpvl9Pu1IouQ==&ch=afHj2FFgDnNylJwtpmtNNn3Ff7YG-Q6mqVpOqjdNN7-Z-ATRf93tUg==)
---
|
With your support we will put Suffolk Families First!
In Service to the People,

name: Ruben Gallego (AZ)
subject: we've fallen behind
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The sky isn't falling. But we do need your help today.
#

Peter -
This is a short message to let you know we've gotten off to a very slow start in July and have fallen behind on our fundraising goals.
Now, there's no reason to panic. The sky isn't falling. But we do need to make it up to keep us on track to win this race.
So I am asking you to contribute $3 today. Yes, $3.
$3 to help us catch up on our fundraising goals.
$3 to do it with lots and lots of individual donations -- the way we fund this campaign.
$3 because replacing Kyrsten Sinema and keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate is an all-hands-on-deck effort.
As you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their $3. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today to help Ruben Gallego flip this seat for Democrats and get to the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230710-1-15&t=1&akid=800%2E734936%2Eue8cM0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-july23.DvkaC2&amount=3&refcode=em230710-1-15&t=2&akid=800%2E734936%2Eue8cM0)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-july23.DvkaC2&refcode=em230710-1-15&t=3&akid=800%2E734936%2Eue8cM0)**
---
****
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego for Senate

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=800%2E734936%2Eue8cM0). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=800_734936_ue8cM0&akid=800%2E734936%2Eue8cM0)
