name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: I’m Running!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
We can win Michigan back and stop the Biden agenda. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f%26ss_email_id%3D64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%25E2%2580%2599m%2BRunning%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-07-10T13%253A45%253A36Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=3bsCVxJGyuaQV_LX6SfiUbSb2d8%3D)
---
| Friends,I want you to be the first to know that after many weeks of prayerful consideration with my wife and family, I am excited to announce that I am running for Congress in Michigan’s 7th District.
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FruD_qQ61TfE&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=I8Ug2J98I3GszFNNxlRZEGUItXc%3D)
---
| _Click[here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FruD_qQ61TfE&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=I8Ug2J98I3GszFNNxlRZEGUItXc%3D) to watch Tom’s announcement video._
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fdonate-today&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=KlBKWpe7iK68FIGyW_wBFTAq_MU%3D)
---
Last year, I challenged the incumbent Democrat and fell just short of winning in what became the most expensive congressional race in the nation. This year, the 7th will be key for Republicans to hold the House majority with the courts invalidating Republican districts in New York and Alabama. And this time, it is an open seat with the Democrat now running for U.S. Senate.Americans are tired of inflation, high gas prices, out-of-control government spending, and the threats from China.Along our southern border, we have a humanitarian and fentanyl crisis - I know because I’ve been there to see it first-hand. Our border patrol agents are outnumbered and outgunned and fentanyl is now the #1 killer of Americans aged 18-45.**Joe Biden has failed us at every turn.**
---
---
|
---
| _Tom touring the Southern Border earlier this year._
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fdonate-today&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=KlBKWpe7iK68FIGyW_wBFTAq_MU%3D)
---
I served 22 years in the U.S. Army, including the Iraq War, and deployments to Guantanamo Bay, Kuwait, and the Korean DMZ. I’ve logged more than 1,000 hours in some of the most advanced helicopters in the world.In the Michigan Senate, I led the fight against giving taxpayer dollars to Chinese companies and global corporations, stood up for our veterans, and opposed government waste. **I will do the same in Washington.** But I won’t be able to lead this fight without your support. We need to get off to a fast start and I’m hoping I can count on you for [a donation in support of today’s announcement.](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fbarrett-brigade-victory-fund%2Fdonate-today&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=U-D7qtL_5T1tGm5sbv5tA9k5yfw%3D)Any amount will help us start building the campaign war chest we are going to need. Last year, more than $40 million was spent in this one House seat. We need to be prepared - and that starts today.I think America is still worth fighting for - I hope you will join me.
---
---
|
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fdonate-today&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=KlBKWpe7iK68FIGyW_wBFTAq_MU%3D)
---
| PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fbarrettbrigade%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=rajcj4IisEwwKOBqRlU44wsy_d0%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsquarespace&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=UEHp32USfHbh4ZeWITH2-gM5yT4%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Ftomformichigan&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=iuHpB-HkUhXZ8g3MoO1kMa5uY-w%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64ac0b21d50dd44a545028cf&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ab6679d377cc3f172b8d3f&l=en-US&s=e8RZbUgGnXAh515mRHpFFxDnbkU%3D) | | [ ](mailto:info@tombarrettforcongress.com)
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA

subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.

body:
|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0kiaspdtkjro8gg7gvaigril8h33qk5kcrsmb6o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6mbkrp7ch3hbitc1lbkf907uk9k0jq1g26vkgd0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo3geucqj4ggd593p356h3ggcff2rn3q9ljstvuo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zppel9d6hah9nf70l21sckbgqni47t5mcq11fi78_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh6djp5m230pinqs1q0q9f6sgoi9agbetc58ta28_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zllccbv0f7jrcogr7qtq9ngo9og373qb176vgbc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqtor794vjk91ddu3egt4i3s7b0bokqmut5qnja0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn47n2a0dhk30lug730l0ee25egcica5hj12kol8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze52ona13er08i4at9nv4joq5h9fp7dqo7ba6bng_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr8r098dcak9t57mdcmckt08i9ffh8rvnkap0dv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i60oj2cth2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

| Join us on Tuesday, August 1st
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

Join us on Tuesday, August 1, at 7pm for the next meeting of the Chesterfield VA Tea Party.

We'll be at Great American Ranch, 13995 Raised Antler Circle, Midlothian, VA 23122.

There will be no July meeting, and we plan to now meet on the first Tuesday of each month. Please note this change from the first Monday to the first Tuesday. Our updated invitation with the new dates is below.

We look forward to seeing you.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66238591/415785231/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmY3OGI0NS0yYTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWC21mr_oFZHkCTAwa2aKLAH20MpmIpFZsZkMUHReXA=&emci=64f78b45-2a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff78b45-2a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) Team,

One month ago, Eugene DePasquale announced he is running to become Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General.

In these early stages of the race, we are working to build a grassroots team that represents folks from every corner of the Commonwealth and promote our shared vision for Pennsylvania.

The Attorney General is the People’s Lawyer. _That’s why Eugene wants to hear from _you.__ [**Respond to our new Campaign Strategy Survey! Click here to share your thoughts and represent voters in Cresco →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66238596/415785236/-461345077?refcode=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&utm_campaign=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&source=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmY3OGI0NS0yYTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWC21mr_oFZHkCTAwa2aKLAH20MpmIpFZsZkMUHReXA=&emci=64f78b45-2a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff78b45-2a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) | | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66238601/415785241/-461345077?refcode=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&utm_campaign=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&source=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmY3OGI0NS0yYTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWC21mr_oFZHkCTAwa2aKLAH20MpmIpFZsZkMUHReXA=&emci=64f78b45-2a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff78b45-2a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249)

Your input will help us build our winning campaign and ensure the next Attorney General is fighting for the issues that matter most to the people of Pennsylvania.

Eugene is criss-crossing the Commonwealth meeting with individuals, groups, and communities in every county, but he also wants every supporter to have the opportunity to share what issues you care about most and what you want to hear from our campaign in the coming months.

[**Share your thoughts with Eugene in this short survey →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66238609/415785248/-461345077?refcode=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&utm_campaign=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&source=email_071023_campaignsurv_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmY3OGI0NS0yYTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWC21mr_oFZHkCTAwa2aKLAH20MpmIpFZsZkMUHReXA=&emci=64f78b45-2a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff78b45-2a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249)

Thank you,

Team Eugene

_P.S.: The more responses we get, the better! Please forward this email to a few friends, family members, or coworkers, and ask them to respond too!_

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
God gave me a second chance and I’m not going to waste it

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs6fs5v6f1s1r3nef0ka11so3avmcejqpc8b2abg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlqh7f3r5lp8m3nl3gid4do7qr5k3gttthcb43q0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsfjl83d1ni3qc235umd5c1jn6n8ncc8ljvo23hg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo69r2et1l2c1e08i814363pasvsg00nr132jimo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfu1pi4v1u31qlhilbm8heg2s7bubgl60jl5733g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs) — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfhj5ticqd669cdcp480lgl2sg2cqcml833g58eg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs3cohpgf27ajr3vc7mll256f3upo3bkt1e0krc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi099ogb2vpcqtoe1g69tcikms2979aqaevt703g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs) Duty First,
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1sbo9befd63369t38b10r4pdb99k0sh6cb009a8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64o32c1h2bs)
---
Captain Sam Brown
---
| | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense.
---
Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada.
---

1600 Daily

clean_body: God gave me a second chance and I’m not going to waste it | | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,I survived. By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. I truly shouldn’t be alive today. For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable. That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada. 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities — it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda.

**That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz — to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz.** [Will you please split a donation of $10 today between our campaign and The Collective PAC to help send me to the Senate? →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAiSOhwIjqTin-AAlvHk3iAmmCGdDC5eBC5TJSnmsJz5ZISxUmK7C0EHTnX_MzQqx9afvq3YkROn_-3993A1tOFw_zj5ucgsjkVs6WHBA_gs_sxGUVuDCMaTLQH_duBwwvXNgZ6_vCuMQxOHhcnRxP8B7AXeKxtoPmDRH2V-SuFGwMC3fXCoaxMjDOc1VfFLQeUrjaLqYA2lT2LrOd3YObaAj_S7M5mL63HBm-VgzbfXvGQVs0k6zdqLepribe_f22rdLXqYFXEH9Zue4H5IOqw-k6Jdlr_XqhflC5ATP2i-xWfqwz_1J87L2ft9EmIzpfKTfYIBPJBfyo2VWRiwOQpuVaY211QY9LCNbUqIFdP_4jxxl7CAztEUKeddBfxqEU0nvOZJ1WL-qp-J4tkU4h6ca1zoXMy9AoonMxkmoKuqM/3xr/GkXOeb-LT3i4J4yWrhGufw/h3/5h0EphpkbT8f1L49fUneZRdKSxLACNlpYcnuajIxTkg)

clean_body: we have a real chance to win this thing | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them. Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities — it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda. That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz — to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change. But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to be by my side every step of the way. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Every dollar makes a difference — thank you so much for giving what you can. Colin The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztupa6ua1gobaoos8rqmkqjk9fnl4mv6nh10gvlo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64p76cjh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7oba5q762na145i4rppt2ofgdmutg0de9pao5u0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64p76cjh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfv8c8lmgqjvuev5phmr9cn72agb8ipnjmq9ar78_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64p76cjh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5veehfpt5k4rjo2mb8tbm01n7n2c9i3dvjihtag_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64p76cjh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvltj52mhckg61v7o6d01faa00pftpjckpjj8rfo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64p76cjh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh64cgohi8kjvni6q51ctsd81gpfl1i7qrh2nrg0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i64p76cjh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**

Running in a race like this isn't easy – it takes a lot of resources and support to reach every voter we can before Election Day. That's why every donation from supporters like you is so important to me. Your contribution will go towards talking to more voters, running more ads, and getting the word out across the state that I am running for Governor.

name: Andrew Lorinser
subject: A short story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob]
Read why I really joined this movement at actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob. [actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob]
Dr. Bob visiting Alpha, making friends at the smallest village in America with a brewery.

This past Saturday, as I was bustling around preparing for our campaign's visit to Crystal Falls for Bass Fest, a chance encounter at a local coffee shop turned into something that put some pep in my step advocating for my dad.
Wearing my "Dr. Bob for Congress" hoodie, I was approached by a gentleman who recognized the name and asked, "Hey, how's the campaign going!?"
I shared my excitement about the upcoming campaign ad shoot and the numerous events we've been attending every weekend. I let him know I was coordinating an endorsement from a retired Master Sergeant.
It was already going to be an exciting day.
Not an uncommon interaction with a supporter, but little did I know that this gentleman had a deep connection to my father.
Turns out, 20 years ago, the man in the coffee shop was a resident doctor who had been trained by Dr. Bob himself, following in his footsteps and dedicating his career to the Navajo Nation in New Mexico, just like my dad, before taking care of low income, rural patients in the UP, just like my dad.
“I admire the tenacity he has to keep fighting for us,” he said. “I knew him as a teacher of medicine, and Dr. Bob has an energy like no one else.”
We shared with each other how hard it is it keep up with my dad, for him as Dr. Bob's student, and for me as his son. Even 20 years later, Doc has not slowed down.
My father trained nearly half of all resident family doctors in the Upper Peninsula. The impact he has had – and still has – on countless lives is truly remarkable.
That day in Crystal Falls, yet another location where my father worked as a rural doctor, we ran into people whose families are still patients of doctors my dad trained.
Now, after four decades of unwavering service to Northern Michigan in the fields of medicine, public health, and international diplomacy, my dad is on a mission to fix our broken healthcare system as a member of Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Unfortunately, campaigns like this require a lot of resources to spread our message far and wide, to tell my dad's remarkable story.
We want to ensure that every voter in our district hears about the incredible work my father has done and his vision for a better future.
, can you please pitch in? Help us reach every corner of our district, connect with voters, and share the inspiring stories [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob] of those whose lives have been touched by Dr Bob's care, compassion, and expertise.
Together, let's elect someone committed to improving lives, strengthening communities, and fighting for the values we hold dear.
We really need you.
Andrew Lorinser

clean_body: [] CHIP IN [] Read why I really joined this movement at actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob. [actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob] [] Dr. Bob visiting Alpha, making friends at the smallest village in America with a brewery. This past Saturday, as I was bustling around preparing for our campaign's visit to Crystal Falls for Bass Fest, a chance encounter at a local coffee shop turned into something that put some pep in my step advocating for my dad. Wearing my "Dr. Bob for Congress" hoodie, I was approached by a gentleman who recognized the name and asked, "Hey, how's the campaign going!?" I shared my excitement about the upcoming campaign ad shoot and the numerous events we've been attending every weekend. I let him know I was coordinating an endorsement from a retired Master Sergeant. It was already going to be an exciting day. Not an uncommon interaction with a supporter, but little did I know that this gentleman had a deep connection to my father. Turns out, 20 years ago, the man in the coffee shop was a resident doctor who had been trained by Dr. Bob himself, following in his footsteps and dedicating his career to the Navajo Nation in New Mexico, just like my dad, before taking care of low income, rural patients in the UP, just like my dad. “I admire the tenacity he has to keep fighting for us,” he said. “I knew him as a teacher of medicine, and Dr. Bob has an energy like no one else.” We shared with each other how hard it is it keep up with my dad, for him as Dr. Bob's student, and for me as his son. Even 20 years later, Doc has not slowed down. My father trained nearly half of all resident family doctors in the Upper Peninsula. The impact he has had – and still has – on countless lives is truly remarkable. That day in Crystal Falls, yet another location where my father worked as a rural doctor, we ran into people whose families are still patients of doctors my dad trained. Now, after four decades of unwavering service to Northern Michigan in the fields of medicine, public health, and international diplomacy, my dad is on a mission to fix our broken healthcare system as a member of Congress. [] Unfortunately, campaigns like this require a lot of resources to spread our message far and wide, to tell my dad's remarkable story. We want to ensure that every voter in our district hears about the incredible work my father has done and his vision for a better future. , can you please pitch in? Help us reach every corner of our district, connect with voters, and share the inspiring stories [] of those whose lives have been touched by Dr Bob's care, compassion, and expertise. Together, let's elect someone committed to improving lives, strengthening communities, and fighting for the values we hold dear. We really need you. Andrew Lorinser if you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately. CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] MORE [] Or send a check to: "Friends of Dr. Bob" PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: asking for just $10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=236%2E52803%2Ev8Vehq)

| | Look, I know it’s a Monday and you probably don’t have time to read some long, drawn-out explanation for why I’m sending this email, Peter. **So instead, I’ll just get right to it: We’re 10 days into July and yet we’re well off the pace to hit our monthly fundraising goal.[So, could you do me a favor and chip in just $10 to our Senate campaign before deleting this email and going on with the rest of your day?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3274?t=9&amount=10&akid=236%2E52803%2Ev8Vehq)** | | | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3274?t=10&amount=10&akid=236%2E52803%2Ev8Vehq)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3274?t=11&amount=35&akid=236%2E52803%2Ev8Vehq)
---
The truth is, we’re running against a self-funded, multi-millionaire who has already spent roughly $2 million of his own money on expensive TV ads to boost his campaign.
**So, long story short:** We’re well behind the 8-ball here, Peter.
But that’s OK. Because I truly believe in the ability of _this_ grassroots team to come together and outwork any wealthy millionaire who thinks they can buy their way into the U.S. Senate.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute $10 to help our Senate campaign get back on track and spread our message to voters all across Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3274?t=12&amount=10&akid=236%2E52803%2Ev8Vehq)**
| | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3274?t=13&amount=10&akid=236%2E52803%2Ev8Vehq)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3274?t=14&amount=35&akid=236%2E52803%2Ev8Vehq)
---
Enjoy your Monday!
—Angela

clean_body: | | | Look, I know it’s a Monday and you probably don’t have time to read some long, drawn-out explanation for why I’m sending this email, Peter. subject: I shouldn’t be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I’m fighting for my country.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjb3fbrhglfpsg92dj8i8u2chc7fdugf8lfinbio_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6co72c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada’s next Senator. While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it — I would burn to death. **_But, _Friend, _by the grace of God, I survived. _** I’m not special. I’m neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn’t required. Heroes are the people – like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife – who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. **_The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. _** My life belongs to my God and my country and I’m more than prepared to give my life to defend her. [**Which is why I’m running to be Nevada’s next Senator.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbhnarm164j7dqtmtoc2tnp366oljmkjdaqi5hio_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6co72c1h2bs) I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won’t be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they’ve got to make sure they can hold this seat. [**BUT I’M NOT SCARED, Friend.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbmqca2for8q81aq8uip7l81t4u4un68nf5ratug_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6co72c1h2bs) If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me — _but I can’t do this alone._ I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. [**Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zodvs78rc98amfkt81u2ld9v0a1fejfg3diiqde8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6co72c1h2bs) to help me deploy to Washington? Duty First,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhtf3ch9bi15hc9cqv53dp7hiqgj6e87hcv3ta8g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6co72c1h2bs)
---
CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)Republican U.S. Senate Candidate

By joining our team, you'll not only be actively contributing to the campaign's effort but also earning a share of the donations you bring in. That's right - more support for Vivek translates into more money in your pocket!

Here are the exclusive benefits you'll receive as a member of the **Vivek Kitchen Cabinet** :

* **A dedicated fundraising link:** You'll have a personalized link to track and achieve your fundraising goals effectively.
* **Earn 10% per donation:** Every donation made through your dedicated link will earn you a generous 10% commission. Your efforts directly impact both Vivek's campaign and your own financial well-being.
* **Personal dashboard:** Gain access to a user-friendly dashboard that allows you to monitor your progress, track donations, and stay motivated as you contribute to our shared mission.
* **Special awards and incentives:** As a valued member of our team, you'll have opportunities to earn exciting rewards, such as a personalized donation page, exclusive campaign swag, a personal call with Vivek himself, and invitations to special events.

Years of inaction and unfulfilled promises from politicians on both sides have changed the landscape of the country - **but with your support, we will revive the original vision for our country.[Join my Kitchen Cabinet today.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=289004e8fe9842ca926c6f854f21e643&_e=rNxA-ODhZ2bnpnzZOOb7sbVgF-sa9eD0UFYqzyYiZEAGj97-e5qQP2o7i71WHxZ2vNaDW1_C5Rtz3yWzm63sbiNFTnuiW4l7gyWwGw0aq0TJs9Gg3VcdYDaOhg3xvch3jJBZzXpURVXrjqDa7MVTO7gn1e51hSykPiIfjwqCF579Y7iQAIyjC6Ikv7A7lQgiN-kziSjDqxoWrhqtoF6_wr_oa7ohzK16m18BOYUO6RbWdXAqiU8O7_Mg3PCWkzObKjl7fUI77vKghTQONmxFQX-yu--B5uW0v92dYmq2dTjEkF2kS-LTeqQCsDbJqHV4iyL381rgxLpP_Sl0Aa_qRQ%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The DC elite hate my guts. They know I will bring meaningful change and dismantle the system that has brought this country down. | | Fellow American, you may have heard other candidates promising to run grassroots campaigns, but they never do. They're entrenched in the system that cycles big money into campaigns in exchange for backroom deals. You know this isn't how I operate. And like you, I'm ready to smash the system apart. Here's your chance to power our movement! Are you ready? We're going to leverage the power of peer-to-peer relationships to promote small dollar donations and bundling. | By joining our team, you'll not only be actively contributing to the campaign's effort but also earning a share of the donations you bring in. That's right - more support for Vivek translates into more money in your pocket! Here are the exclusive benefits you'll receive as a member of the Vivek Kitchen Cabinet : A dedicated fundraising link: You'll have a personalized link to track and achieve your fundraising goals effectively. Earn 10% per donation: Every donation made through your dedicated link will earn you a generous 10% commission. Your efforts directly impact both Vivek's campaign and your own financial well-being. Personal dashboard: Gain access to a user-friendly dashboard that allows you to monitor your progress, track donations, and stay motivated as you contribute to our shared mission. Special awards and incentives: As a valued member of our team, you'll have opportunities to earn exciting rewards, such as a personalized donation page, exclusive campaign swag, a personal call with Vivek himself, and invitations to special events. Years of inaction and unfulfilled promises from politicians on both sides have changed the landscape of the country - but with your support, we will revive the original vision for our country. Let's put some coal on the fire of this campaign! Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Kash Patel
subject: We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us, or we can fight back >>
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936919:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

Patriot,

This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

Why?

Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution.

**_In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman_.** Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936919:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)
You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist.

None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information.

**I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse.** My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots.

**_Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions_.**

[Can you donate any amount you can afford to help Kash Foundation serve government whistleblowers? Click here to donate >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936919:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936919:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangsters corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments.

If you're a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption.

If you're a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you're innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees.

Without whistleblowers:
* We wouldn't know about Hunter's WhatsApp message.

* We wouldn't know about the corruption at the FBI.

* We wouldn't know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes.

Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us, or we can fight back. I'm not one for giving up and I hope you can join me.

[Please donate today to the Kash Foundation to help me raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours. Your support will help a whistleblower come forward to expose the corruption. Please select any amount below to donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936919:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate $25 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936918:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936917:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936916:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936915:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936914:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936913:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate $2,500 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936912:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936919:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee under Representative Nunes and uncovered that the FBI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct.

I know what it's like to be targeted by government gangsters.

I know how to fight back because I've successfully done this for the last several years exposing the Russiagate hoax.

Now, I am counting on your help to expose the corrupt two-tiered system of justice.

[Please use this link to donate any amount you can generously afford today >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62936919:6nmjnoIgN:m:1:3299561967:17EB35AF37F44E728B8415E620F70D2C:r)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

name: CPT. Sam Brown
subject: I shouldn’t be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I’m fighting for my country.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zssmkeglvpfph506itmq6naoi5107j2fa9c1n6o8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6aor4c5h2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada’s next Senator. While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it — I would burn to death. **_But, _Friend, _by the grace of God, I survived. _** I’m not special. I’m neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn’t required. Heroes are the people – like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife – who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. **_The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. _** My life belongs to my God and my country and I’m more than prepared to give my life to defend her. [**Which is why I’m running to be Nevada’s next Senator.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3p6rnrd0t3iqfhda3phfslgbq5ua25b2mu29oto_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6aor4c5h2bs) I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won’t be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they’ve got to make sure they can hold this seat. [**BUT I’M NOT SCARED, Friend.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv24gcvdlr9a7ajqemaeek31gec07rcetaivl6r8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6aor4c5h2bs) If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me — _but I can’t do this alone._ I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. [**Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu5t3hb15bm3srfdgoptn07la7m00hr2d6p015mg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6aor4c5h2bs) to help me deploy to Washington? Duty First,
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7a5jf0pbb8aglatpc41f7caidnh36ov037it0kg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6aor4c5h2bs)
---
CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)Republican U.S. Senate Candidate
---

While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it — I would burn to death. But, Friend, by the grace of God, I survived. I’m not special. I’m neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn’t required. Heroes are the people – like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife – who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. My life belongs to my God and my country and I’m more than prepared to give my life to defend her. I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won’t be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they’ve got to make sure they can hold this seat. If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me — but I can’t do this alone. I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. to help me deploy to Washington? Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)Republican U.S. Senate Candidate | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada. clean_body: This should piss you off, Friend. | | Friend, This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot. Why? Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution. In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman. Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid. You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist. None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information. Friend, I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse. My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots. Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions. Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangster corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments. If you're a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption. If you're a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you're innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees. Without whistleblowers: We wouldn't know about Hunter's WhatsApp message. We wouldn't know about the corruption at the FBI. We wouldn't know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes. Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us. Or we can fight back. I'm not one for giving up. And I hope you can join me. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee under Rep. Nunes and uncovered that the FBI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct. I know what it's like to be targeted by government gangsters. I know how to fight back because I've successfully done this for the last several years exposing the Russiagate hoax. Now, I am counting on your help to expose the corrupt two-tiered system of justice. Thank you, Friend, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible.

Wildfires, drought, and deadly heat waves have become all too common. Arizona’s announcement that, due to climate change and its effects, there is not enough water supply for even the housing construction that has already been approved will just make mortgages and rents even more difficult to afford.

**There is maybe no place in America where the climate crisis is a more clear and present danger than here in Arizona.**

To me, this is personal. I spent nearly a decade as the CEO of an environmentally-focused alternative to the Big Banks that put climate change fighting power into people's hands. **We helped millions of Americans move billions of dollars of their savings deposits and personal investments out of the reach of Big Oil companies and into accounts that were fossil fuel free.** And we funded the planting of over one hundred million trees around the world to suck carbon dioxide out of the atmosphere.

With the right leadership and vision in Washington D.C., meeting the climate crisis can be an enormous source of economic opportunity for Arizona. But I need your help to get there.

[**That’s why I’m asking: Will you take my Climate & Environment Survey? Your input on the climate crisis, water issues, and more will help me understand what issues matter most to voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66249260/415807242/-919579505?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWU1NTMxOTgtMzUxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TKZ7t3HFVVtwah5sXaS2XI3nOSSwRd9mEkPl_N7ugE8=&emci=edc8c388-2e1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ae553198-351f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922)

– Andrei

clean_body: Take my Climate & Environment Survey → = Team – last week was the hottest week on earth in human history. And Arizona is at the epicenter. The temperature hit 116 last week in Phoenix on the Fourth of July, and we may break 120 degrees this week. Arizona is ground zero when it comes to the climate crisis , and if you’ve been part of my campaign since the beginning, then you know it is one of the main reasons I'm running for Congress. It is already affecting all of our daily lives – and things are just going to keep getting worse unless we take historic, decisive action. | Wildfires, drought, and deadly heat waves have become all too common. Arizona’s announcement that, due to climate change and its effects, there is not enough water supply for even the housing construction that has already been approved will just make mortgages and rents even more difficult to afford. There is maybe no place in America where the climate crisis is a more clear and present danger than here in Arizona. To me, this is personal. I spent nearly a decade as the CEO of an environmentally-focused alternative to the Big Banks that put climate change fighting power into people's hands. We helped millions of Americans move billions of dollars of their savings deposits and personal investments out of the reach of Big Oil companies and into accounts that were fossil fuel free. And we funded the planting of over one hundred million trees around the world to suck carbon dioxide out of the atmosphere. With the right leadership and vision in Washington D.C., meeting the climate crisis can be an enormous source of economic opportunity for Arizona. But I need your help to get there. Some pundits say voters don't care about climate change. I disagree. I hear people's worries every day -- especially young people. But either way, I'm going to keep on working on this challenge. Wishing you all the best, – Andrei If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = To learn more about Andrei, visit | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Andrei for Arizona Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States Emails are a really important way for our campaign to be in touch with our supporters. clean_body: How does your contribution help rural Americans? Let us tell you. | | Hey Peter, Sometimes, it can be hard to see where your money goes when you’re giving to a political organization. But at United Rural Democrats, rural communities across the country get a direct return on your investment in three meaningful ways: = Our dedicated team works tirelessly to engage voters, mobilize volunteers, and build a network of active supporters in rural communities across the nation. Your support will help us expand our organizing efforts and reach even more individuals who share our values. = We endorse and support Democratic candidates who are committed to representing the needs and aspirations of rural Americans. Your contribution will aid us in providing financial support, campaign resources, and strategic guidance to help these candidates succeed. = Our PAC advocates for policies that foster economic growth, improve healthcare access, protect our natural resources, and address the unique challenges facing rural communities. With your help, we can effectively advocate for these crucial issues and bring about positive change. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = We’ve got a lot of work to do to make sure rural Americans get their fair share of America’s success. = – United Rural Democrats | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
God gave me a second chance and I’m not going to waste it

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs6rspmnitf7hmjik3tircqahllc0shk8qsffg7g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc1ts34g32mn0siphpkcchfod1th4uoes1l7dtio_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrdqauupeo8jijlffah21j4tm95prcm1udgjsk80_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjskuu1c0s728hpoe28tfln57lirt4vgnknoert0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zee79ttvgmirhgiuorfjqjen2saslld0iu5vfr60_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs) — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr8qq37i065i3sn6s48qgn4k4a7ro1tqkl1t1dag_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr2ks2iqoa8pn28j6uj9j1idplsc5l05kg8l8qq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr6filnv9rg74uqt3tb1nat5j2o8u2slurclf6u8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs) Duty First,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z95gkqvhlb892tjamimvqdl0051ftnpdi64hueu8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1i6eob6cth2bs)
---
Captain Sam Brown
---

name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28657%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MBRZawRByhMP9EIi5AzB%2fw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28658%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=302Er7Lef3kBEW%2bBNP4OPg&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28658%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=302Er7Lef3kBEW%2bBNP4OPg&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---

name: Al Franken
subject: why I support Josh Riley — and you should too!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
_Mandela Barnes' The Long Run is proud to endorse Josh Riley for Congress. Please read a message from former Senator Al Franken below:_

[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-riley-split.CAh42n&refcode=em230710-1-tt&t=1&akid=4631%2E196590%2EilwdLL)
Hey, it’s Al Franken.
[**I’m writing because I want you to split $5 or whatever you can between The Long Run and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important congressional races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-riley-split.CAh42n&refcode=em230710-1-tt&t=2&akid=4631%2E196590%2EilwdLL)
Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District, a key district to taking back the House. Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!
Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee — good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.
In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**
Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.
**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them.**_
Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.
And finally, NY-19 is considered a tossup and one of the most competitive in the nation.
[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between The Long Run and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-riley-split.CAh42n&refcode=em230710-1-tt&t=3&akid=4631%2E196590%2EilwdLL)

[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-riley-split.v-HGZG&refcode=em230710-1-tt&t=25&akid=4631%2E196590%2EilwdLL)

This is important to me. And to our nation.
