name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: July 2023 e-newsletter (revised)
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2023 July e-newsletter
News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
|
---
| **Under pressure, Sutter will reopen Mickelson Therapy Pool two years ahead of schedule**
---
| Dear friends, I’m pleased to announce Sutter Health ([https://vitals.sutterhealth.org/mickelson-center/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=465315016a&e=c0babbc643)) plans to reopen the Mickelson Arthritis and Rehabilitation Center therapy pool in San Mateo in early summer 2024 two years ahead of schedule. Sutter had announced after the pandemic started in 2020 that the pool would be permanently closed. Sutter planned to permanently close this pool and said it would never open again. But we fought hard and this shows the power of our community when we come together to fight for the public’s health. Lindsay Raike (pronounced rike like bike), CEO of nonprofit advocacy group Warm Water Wellness, coordinated the grassroots effort with the support of my office. Mickelson is the only facility in San Mateo County that provides a wheelchair-accessible warm pool specifically designed for therapeutic use by seniors, adults and children with chronic pain or disabilities, patients recovering from surgery, pregnant women, and others who find the warm water healing. The $4 million pool opened 25 years ago and financed entirely by community donations, including $1.5 million from the late philanthropist Mack E. Mickelson. Plaques on the pool wall also showcase names of donors.
---
On May 8 of this year, state and local elected leaders joined me in writing a letter to Sutter CEO Thomas asking him to commit to reopening the pool by July 1, 2023. The letter writers included Assemblymember Marc Berman, Assemblymember Diane Papan, Assemblymember Phil Ting, State Sen. Josh Becker, State Sen. Scott Wiener, San Mateo County Supervisor David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor Noelia Corzo, Peninsula Health Care District Director Dennis Zell, Esq, Sequoia Healthcare District CEO Pamela Kurtzman and Sequoia Healthcare District Director Kimberly Griffin, RN. I want to thank them and Lindsay in particular for joining together to show Sutter that the public’s health outweighs profits. The letter elected officials sent to Sutter Health CEO Warner Thomas on May 8, 2023 and other sources on the issue are below: [Joint letter to Sutter Health CEO Thomas](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=39a72a0a8d&e=c0babbc643) [warmwaterwellness.org](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=9256208cef&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
| **San Mateo County adopts $7.7 billion two-year budget**
---
| The Board of Supervisors approved a $7.7 billion two-year spending plan June 28 after three days of budget hearings that focuses on ending homelessness, emergency preparation and equity. We have a balanced budget today but in just three years our finance experts are projecting a looming deficit. This budget shows the prudent financial stewardship we have taken to address our current safety-net needs while preparing for uncertain economic conditions at the state and federal level. Guided by priorities set by the Board of Supervisors, the blueprint emphasizes investments in sustaining initiatives, not launching new programs. These include:

Ending homelessness through investments not only in shelters and affordable housing but counseling services, job training and rental assistance.
---
Supporting children and families by addressing housing needs for vulnerable families and renewed investments in childhood literacy and foster youth. Updating emergency response protocols and protecting communities by targeting investments in preparation and planning for wildfires, flooding, earthquakes and other disasters. Ensuring staff are trained to design and deliver services that advance equity – to work intentionally to include communities that have historically been underserved. The recommended budget would add 120 new positions – primarily in health services -- for a total of 5,768 positions for all County funds in Fiscal Year 2023-24. The 2023-25 Recommended Budget, along with past budgets, can be found on the website of the [Office of Budget and Performance](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8294c7530b&e=c0babbc643).
---
|
---
| **June was an incredible month to celebrate Pride in the Bay Area**
---
| I don’t know about you, but I feel incredibly lucky to live in the San Francisco Bay Area as we celebrated Pride Month in June. I was honored to ride in the San Francisco Pride Parade this year, a tradition I have carried on for many of its 53 years of existence. San Francisco Pride is one of the largest LGBTQ+ celebrations in the world with a mission to create a space where everyone can come together to celebrate, honor, and uplift the diversity of our community.

I share the belief that everyone deserves to be seen, heard and valued for who they are.
---
I too am committed to creating a world where LGBTQ+ people can live, work, and thrive without fear of discrimination or violence. It was also the 11th Annual Pride Celebration in San Mateo County and the first Pride Parade held in downtown San Mateo June 10. It was a day to celebrate our community’s effort to build a connected, supportive and well San Mateo County for all. Kudos to the event organizers and all those who participated. I look forward to participating in the parade next year.
---
|
---
| **Measure K supports Polynesian Pacific Islander inspired summer enrichment program Camp Unity**
---
|

I'm proud to announce a $30,000 Measure K grant my office has given to support Camp Unity’s summer programs for low-income San Mateo County students! Let's invest in their futures and give them opportunities they deserve. This allows low-income students the ability to take part in summer activities that keep them engaged with the community.

Camp Unity is a Polynesian Pacific Islander-inspired summer enrichment program that was founded in 2011 to serve the San Francisco Bay Area, with a primary focus on North San Mateo County.

---

To date, the program has served over 8,000 students and families, including students who are lower-income. Camp Unity provides creative and culturally rich learning experiences focused on Pacific Islander culture, language, and heritage that promote participants’ academic advancement. The camp is underway now and serving 200 lower-income students.
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=f1dbaa30ad&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=49b30292da&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=c2d27f981c&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9. You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mrichardson@smcgov.org

**Follow the Office on Social Media**
If you want to get more insight into our office please connect with us on social media. It’s also a great way to interact with the office and to get notifications on upcoming events. Click the icons below and like us on Facebook and follow us on Twitter.** ** In friendship, David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=d47a37bbd3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=d47a37bbd3).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&afl=1)
---

body:
Take the Patriot Audit Survey today...Senate Republican leaders just texted me a file of our top grassroots supporters throughout the country...| | | **[***SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM KELLYANNE CONWAY***](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b7de488c204a4bc3b146a1009c3b235e&_e=n2MvKmu-TuMWZJgrzYZ3Cg2iGJPVUD5uAQcjaqKSpeN3W1d3mRNAMV7n2ZO7hNbD121cMwhkurvMx-MyRMYzwDzVAQ7klZtSMcKVpVdrGKhFZOR49ymauoL8Ilu4O7NnG8JDtMBvLIzQlzCRtAfwHUMHxlfi6CjLw1MTQE3XXVeQUINwzsQNZ-ztm42Pp6EUu73dHwznsRw9nMzwkSiPn2CUtWpyS1tS2lMOHoHlE4-O9IBStw5o-UuAZkKKBxmEYEdCMAdVBDw0yZgSoKR9G-vRolS3QVXe-8Vd-OiA1YfcLZ8AcQg9LF4tqkFhESCWgrNPawpDfo6xtSp_OpDAw44kFM8-7Y6NB4BQktatEN2SO_4CEDRlkqebLojPHCaNG3yQSOkwvQ1iBZrRmLEBwPr7ydprtn7VW4WZe2BXhYKnjqsYIKu4UgiIVzAcuH7RrdfTNY2Hd1hSV9PBrkZUJg%3D%3D)**
---
Peter, this is so important. Senate Republican leaders just texted me a file of our top grassroots supporters throughout the country, and you’re one of them. I was told I could count on you to take one of the most important surveys in the country because of your top supporter status: The Patriot Audit Survey. The Patriot Audit Survey will set Republican priorities and our agenda for 2023, it’s that important, Peter.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b7de488c204a4bc3b146a1009c3b235e&_e=n2MvKmu-TuMWZJgrzYZ3Cg2iGJPVUD5uAQcjaqKSpeN3W1d3mRNAMV7n2ZO7hNbD121cMwhkurvMx-MyRMYzwDzVAQ7klZtSMcKVpVdrGKhFZOR49ymauoL8Ilu4O7NnG8JDtMBvLIzQlzCRtAfwHUMHxlfi6CjLw1MTQE3XXVeQUINwzsQNZ-ztm42Pp6EUu73dHwznsRw9nMzwkSiPn2CUtWpyS1tS2lMOHoHlE4-O9IBStw5o-UuAZkKKBxmEYEdCMAdVBDw0yZgSoKR9G-vRolS3QVXe-8Vd-OiA1YfcLZ8AcQg9LF4tqkFhESCWE4iSTlKR50pdrntakyMpGQ0tlkNtNOiJ0P6p9mEz2Aq9Aj4l1ZoP08u2XqLcnZ_BSFNGTYVhLYanLgzgajiP4AoqQczRuko66GdHOrULlVQp4H9BYAjVH2TvNypLSo_xqU2Mm7HHzywjOZWyF7KKUw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Take the Patriot Audit Survey today...Senate Republican leaders just texted me a file of our top grassroots supporters throughout the country...| | | Peter, this is so important. Senate Republican leaders just texted me a file of our top grassroots supporters throughout the country, and you’re one of them. I was told I could count on you to take one of the most important surveys in the country because of your top supporter status: The Patriot Audit Survey. The Patriot Audit Survey will set Republican priorities and our agenda for 2023, it’s that important, Peter. | | | | Thank you, | | | | | Kellyanne Conway Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. | | I’m appalled. Don Bacon has proved time and time again that he is out of touch with the issues American families face every day. \-- He voted AGAINST jobs for American workers
\-- He voted to CUT funding for our students
\-- He voted to SLASH benefits for our veterans [**We deserve a leader who works for people --_not_ against us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66250977/415814597/1698358150?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2FiZTNlMy0zYTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBKjD93TcXF39OZHlx1zgCtdP6NEvmegZ22QTMZFnMw=) [**_I entered this race to make a real change for the people of Nebraska, and I promise you this: I will work hard _every single day_ to ensure Nebraskans have the leader they deserve representing them in Washington. Experts are saying Montana could decide Senate control, so we have to act ASAP. This is a critical turning point in our race and we’re about to see a flood of outside money and attacks rush into Montana. You can bet far-right groups will spend unprecedented amounts to attack me and mislead voters. Montana is 2024’s most important Senate race and with so much on the line, we cannot afford to lose. Rush a split donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help us raise the funds we need to beat the GOP and protect this seat. [] Donate [] There has never been a more important time for you to step up than right now. — Jon [] Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . | | Hi there - Happy Monday! We have less than four months until Election Day; less than four months to criss-cross the district, spread our message, and shore up our campaign resources. That’s where you come in! Will you chip in to my campaign right away to help ensure my team and I have the resources we need to win in November? It’s not even so much about the dollar amount itself - just the support and number of individual donations. [That’s why today I’m only asking for $4](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/4555eeb83051799c/93dac12038443b6bc3d6b838967d376c/37923) \- $1 for each month left. **[Do you have $4 to spare?](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/4555eeb83051799c/3f8ffb4232027f16c3d6b838967d376c/37923) ** From day one I truly wanted this to be a grassroots campaign, fueled by volunteers and individual supporters like you. With broad grassroots support, I’ll be able to handle anything Virginia Democrats throw at me - and trust me, they’ve got their eye on my district. They’d love nothing more than to flip it this November and retake the House of Delegates. Not on my watch! So what do you say? Will you contribute $4 today to fuel my campaign across the finish line in November? name: CPT. Sam Brown
subject: I shouldn’t be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I'm fighting for my country.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=290fcd7e682e46e399768f134f478b78&_e=wd7ThYjxA2S3OE1ZoAyj2-gvAez--_4qV7Gip8kpNOVQpIOU5obwkBXkpLkxYz_PyHEnRkiEPEgg0gXGb7WDknYmY8KAcGwlQXtrne_G4S3IUCDq6LhIv0cpu1OkJpre0ZNEt0UJyTIeWY2ZcpV3v89B0ix_ABdGShrwIaBH6Cyf2Z-f87NCYZ6M7bepZpX4gR_wt8rbPNxYpg3q6Mh_Vb_aH66TqfhzyNp7nl2Oua0PNaXYg-g0T_XO9Jxh96STuj570mlYCl-2qCgjAkzOdDlw7c1s6ywBX8-tE8flds2rRqxFLmMcDVZd1s7iy_DA80c4MiovHHGKffaNwDd4AhuE9ME68mJTr249MjvV2fCGkL4TkxGv57iWYAFXslHjHgBD417eduRMSerW7OtH06WfiTRHVtH2irWsgIR0n07tJBYiYbnLWElw_1qb_W9yl4E6GoMmg-EH9Szm9Ep-Lg%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada's next Senator. While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it -- I would burn to death. **_But, _Friend, _by the grace of God, I survived. _** I'm not special. I'm neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn't required. Heroes are the people - like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife - who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. **_The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. _** My life belongs to my God and my country and I'm more than prepared to give my life to defend her. [**Which is why I 'm running to be Nevada's next Senator.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=290fcd7e682e46e399768f134f478b78&_e=wd7ThYjxA2S3OE1ZoAyj2-gvAez--_4qV7Gip8kpNOVQpIOU5obwkBXkpLkxYz_PyHEnRkiEPEgg0gXGb7WDknYmY8KAcGwlQXtrne_G4S3IUCDq6LhIv0cpu1OkJpre0ZNEt0UJyTIeWY2ZcpV3v89B0ix_ABdGShrwIaBH6Cyf2Z-f87NCYZ6M7bepZpX4gR_wt8rbPNxYpg3q6Mh_Vb_aH66TqfhzyNp7nl2Oua0PNaXYg-g0T_XO9Jxh96STuj570mlYCl-2qCgjAkzOdDlw7c1s6ywBX8-tE8flds0WO3_jf8zrmc4UJ6nAnd6WZVAcsAseZqwWs57V_-4XrGQbdyRelXYQ92l93CKkwN6_ftwsejSqJ8Qx1sla3ZxBiouVo5Q1X_Ui9nuHYa92AP9L4GnRiTPd08CZYrX2NMAQAl1zbNbCcDrqhPFmlz7Udl0BoUAPrHTDBrHMJU1KJw%3D%3D) I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won't be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they've got to make sure they can hold this seat. name: Kash Patel
subject: This should piss you off
body:
This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661115%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ENSjP%2fdFKNQBt3OqI1Kh9w&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

Why?

Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution.

**_In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman_.** Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661115%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ENSjP%2fdFKNQBt3OqI1Kh9w&sysid=1)
You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist.

None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information.

Friend, **I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse.** My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots.

**_Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions_.**

[Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or any amount you can afford to help Kash Foundation serve government whistleblowers? Click here to donate >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661116%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HMkbJBn4ChjVPSqeZHo2qQ&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661117%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OIMFURZK33cMb3ytFYM6wA&sysid=1)

Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangster corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments.

If you’re a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption.

If you’re a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you’re innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees.

Without whistleblowers:
* We wouldn’t know about Hunter’s WhatsApp message.

* We wouldn’t know about the corruption at the FBI.

* We wouldn’t know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes.

Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us. Or we can fight back. I’m not one for giving up. And I hope you can join me.

[Please donate $10 or more today to the Kash Foundation to help me raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours. Your support will help a whistleblower come forward to expose the corruption. Please select an amount below to donate today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661118%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hBKIA3gDPdes6bJ6IX0fhQ&sysid=1)

clean_body: This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot. Friend, This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot. Why? Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution. In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman. Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid. You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist. None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information. Friend, I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse. My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots. Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions. Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangster corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments. If you’re a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption. If you’re a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you’re innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees. Without whistleblowers: We wouldn’t know about Hunter’s WhatsApp message. We wouldn’t know about the corruption at the FBI. * We wouldn’t know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes. Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us. Or we can fight back. I’m not one for giving up. And I hope you can join me. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee under Rep. Nunes and uncovered that the FBI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct. I know what it’s like to be targeted by government gangsters. I know how to fight back because I’ve successfully done this for the last several years exposing the Russiagate hoax. Now, I am counting on your help to expose the corrupt two-tiered system of justice. Thank you, Friend, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The principles of this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2917%2E5257348%2ESUPndH ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, this is a
longer email, but it’s important, so please stick around.

It is no secret that major Senate campaigns like this are notoriously
fast-paced and stressful. They require long hours, tough deadlines, and
push us to grow in new and unexpected ways.

Despite all of that being a reality, I am determined to run this campaign
the right way, where we lead with values and ensure a healthy and
growth-centered environment for everyone on this team — and have fun!

I recently shared these guiding principles with my campaign team, and as
you are also a member of our team, I wanted to share them with you as
well:

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| The Most Important Rule |
| |
| Above all else, we must respect each other, our competitors, our |
| supporters, and every single person we encounter on this campaign, |
| including our most ardent opponents. By treating each other with |
| dignity, we create a culture of respect that extends beyond our |
| campaign. |
| |
| Everyone Is Welcome |
| |
| Anyone and everyone has a home in this campaign and should feel like |
| they can be a part of the political process and can get involved if |
| they want to join the team. We should always prioritize engaging |
| everyone who offers to help and make use of their talent and |
| contribution to the whole. |
| |
| Here, Right Matters |
| |
| We must always stand up for what is right, even when it’s hard. We |
| must never turn a blind eye, even if it adversely affects the |
| campaign. This is a guiding ethos of our values and strategy. |
| |
| A Campaign That Looks Like California |
| |
| California is the most diverse state in our nation. We can and must |
| build a team and coalition that represents that diversity, not just in |
| our makeup but by making sure that diverse backgrounds and opinions |
| are represented and respected at the decision-making table. |
| |
| No Job Too Big Or Small |
| |
| Each task, project, or assignment we work on is important and deserves |
| our attention and respect, regardless of its size or complexity. We |
| should all show willingness to take on any task and to show a positive |
| attitude toward work. We will approach every job with the same level |
| of commitment and dedication, regardless of its perceived importance |
| or difficulty. In the same vein, all work will be valued. |
| |
| Show Our Math |
| |
| This is a campaign of ideas and substance. That requires honesty and |
| an adherence to the truth. We will not shy away from hard questions or |
| hard decisions, and we will always be clear in explaining our logic to |
| each other and to others. And always with respect. |
| |
| Hold Ourselves To The Highest Standards |
| |
| This will be an exceptional campaign, and it requires exceptional |
| performance. Campaigns naturally encourage us to do too many things at |
| once. We must always ask ourselves, “is this something we can |
| accomplish with excellence?” If not, we should set it aside and focus |
| on what we can excel at. |
| |
| Excel As A Team |
| |
| We are a team, and this team can only succeed if every single member |
| of that team knows they are valued and supported. Whether that means |
| chipping in when a teammate needs support, listening to new ideas, or |
| advocating for the needs of this team, we will only excel together. |
| Campaigns often require long days, stressful moments, dedication, and |
| commitment — even when things are hard. Giving your teammates grace in |
| the hard times can be even more important than in the good times. Show |
| kindness, forgiveness, and understanding when a teammate makes a |
| mistake. By giving your teammates grace, we can strengthen our |
| relationships, foster a culture of trust and empathy, and create a |
| supportive and positive environment for yourself and others. |
| |
| To Err Is Human |
| |
| Over the course of this campaign, we will all make mistakes. It is |
| inevitable! But it is incumbent upon all of us to own those mistakes, |
| learn from them, and ensure we do not make them again. |
| |
| Enjoy |
| |
| The campaign will be challenging and at times stressful, but it will |
| also be fun, exciting, suspenseful and uplifting. Life is too short |
| not to enjoy your work, and be sure to laugh and have fun out there! |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Derek, it is
critical that we move forward in a way that honors our values even as we
take on the most unscrupulous Republican Party leader in our history.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2917%2E5257348%2ESUPndH ]If you’re with us, and believe in the ethics that guide this team, will
you chip in what you can to help us reach our mid-month goal by midnight
Saturday and continue to run one of the most exceptional campaigns in
California history?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=july2023_abs_em.xMFZNf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2917%2E5257348%2ESUPndH ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=july2023_abs_em.phWsA5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2917%2E5257348%2ESUPndH ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=july2023_abs_em.GV7_Ed&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2917%2E5257348%2ESUPndH ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=july2023_abs_em.uY9sx1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2917%2E5257348%2ESUPndH ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2917%2E5257348%2ESUPndH ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

Adam

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: a pivotal moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I needed to reach out directly, Peter: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.
I needed to reach out directly, Peter: **GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.**
Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his _rubber stamp_ in the Senate, voting for anything **including a national abortion ban**. I’m fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can’t do it alone. [**Will you chip in $5 or more now to split between my campaign and Bob Casey’s to help me keep Nevada blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230710-jr?refcode=em20230710-1&refcode2=274_552475_fCW3WL&akid=274%2E552475%2EfCW3WL)
With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, McConnell and his GOP allies are coming after me as a top target. Now, _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country — **and a recent poll shows me 2 points down.**
**This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far, Peter.**
I simply cannot compete with the GOP’s massive war chest unless supporters like you chip in. **In a race this close, every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing — so please, I’m humbly asking:**
[**Will you chip in $5, $10, or as much as you can spare to split between my campaign and Bob Casey’s? I’m counting on your urgent support to keep Nevada and the Senate blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230710-jr?refcode=em20230710-1&refcode2=274_552475_fCW3WL&akid=274%2E552475%2EfCW3WL)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230710-jr?amount=5&refcode=em20230710-1&refcode2=274_552475_fCW3WL&akid=274%2E552475%2EfCW3WL)**
I’m lucky to have you on my team. Thank you.
— Jacky

name: CPT. Sam Brown
subject: I shouldn’t be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I'm fighting for my country.

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff49bba66ddd4c838041808849e22395&_e=yUA4COVUoHIhT3_iZUaP3h2dsKJ9pQ-pOYx9Be-guKb3xI_jyof_N6K6CK0WxJiWtFwTvDNBJ_jiXls3uf-s0XNA0hPQAdM0_C0ez2KpVvh8GTRDn9A2IqCVzl-Exrr-YbTZYi8CXhLbk4f7jl9C7IFrXvphbkjK6_SVaK9EpNFQXy9dZoth8j4fL-KJt5u9QVe77lZa_4sdCK37SirKov9m95vtX5lKZgQ5ytPsZyoP6Sk3GtFiHQn04mhN85kL6USbx0aeQEPA_nvOqgUCf75axiBy0p1rJli2VU52F2w-tev7JAPwGMMKpg5gQrIB6h07Hgw_r9-GBnzgQzU5-zhc72gmaT64jEV5RV0CxA1NFk148sCW-3hm_PA7JaCAfxmWSMhLwRHqihO-YYQJFaEqdGSZqjNkvKvcv2ruG0dqvH0X45SoMIZndCtfHhmmo_usmVGv4-U_jIRtND2JFA%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada's next Senator. While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it -- I would burn to death. **_But, _Friend, _by the grace of God, I survived. _** I'm not special. I'm neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn't required. Heroes are the people - like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife - who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. **_The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. _** My life belongs to my God and my country and I'm more than prepared to give my life to defend her. [**Which is why I 'm running to be Nevada's next Senator.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff49bba66ddd4c838041808849e22395&_e=yUA4COVUoHIhT3_iZUaP3h2dsKJ9pQ-pOYx9Be-guKb3xI_jyof_N6K6CK0WxJiWtFwTvDNBJ_jiXls3uf-s0XNA0hPQAdM0_C0ez2KpVvh8GTRDn9A2IqCVzl-Exrr-YbTZYi8CXhLbk4f7jl9C7IFrXvphbkjK6_SVaK9EpNFQXy9dZoth8j4fL-KJt5u9QVe77lZa_4sdCK37SirKov9m95vtX5lKZgQ5ytPsZyoP6Sk3GtFiHQn04mhN85kL6USbx0aeQEPA_nvOqgUCf75axiBy0p1rJli2VU52F2yZGpaPFfQgzSjlskJIb7Mmd38jsJPkkUW9gszLcj-eIJjgKwEj23XkQOVlz5AwFLfiD2IRFf2m_0Ik4zpzVgmEzAeAtYIfH_oka6Ui1wZ9MZFBhfvV2_wHgrb6vveNZmC7pDRA1k8aSknh7xuJKfWXthjilVFGXnMvCii37PxycQ%3D%3D) I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won't be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they've got to make sure they can hold this seat. [**BUT I 'M NOT SCARED, Friend.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff49bba66ddd4c838041808849e22395&_e=yUA4COVUoHIhT3_iZUaP3h2dsKJ9pQ-pOYx9Be-guKb3xI_jyof_N6K6CK0WxJiWtFwTvDNBJ_jiXls3uf-s0XNA0hPQAdM0_C0ez2KpVvh8GTRDn9A2IqCVzl-Exrr-YbTZYi8CXhLbk4f7jl9C7IFrXvphbkjK6_SVaK9EpNFQXy9dZoth8j4fL-KJt5u9QVe77lZa_4sdCK37SirKov9m95vtX5lKZgQ5ytPsZyoP6Sk3GtFiHQn04mhN85kL6USbx0aeQEPA_nvOqgUCf75axiBy0p1rJli2VU52F2ytvAavxGNvNiVkL51jvzhT6QULokGlgS8sMXKh3nXIOuo8CPzLY7WgkakH4TCf7vsvCRCmJ6rkZxqahizwRj6dhDvuKc0sHWaEvfk-x3pEXcZ_Ryv7Sd0jDsUlFk3FXhSACxySlRvOYK0RlbFwK6NYhxraohrQxWzY57YkMLbGRw%3D%3D) If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me -- _but I can 't do this alone._ I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. clean_body: But since I am, I'm fighting for my country. | | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada's next Senator. While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it -- I would burn to death. But, Friend, by the grace of God, I survived. I'm not special. I'm neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn't required. Heroes are the people - like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife - who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. My life belongs to my God and my country and I'm more than prepared to give my life to defend her. I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won't be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they've got to make sure they can hold this seat. If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me -- but I can 't do this alone. I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. to help me deploy to Washington? Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.) Republican U.S. Senate Candidate | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

President Trump has been INDICTED.

It is shocking and unheard of for President Joe Biden to INDICT the leading candidate opposing him. _To make matters worse, Biden himself kept classified documents for DECADES._

It's obvious that Biden's DOJ is ABUSING its power to attack Republicans and protect Democrats.

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
God gave me a second chance and I'm not going to waste it

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3da45ce46c84877abd78160d86b0ca0&_e=PLOYCDsFvEa_cp-8Ei2vD_N9my2KaEzzT0d4do8yg7IGBAoxPEu43B7C3yMFCf5_2zy_OLT6MzrItt4tdiSeSqvMbN9REBgiU6AqaEX1A7s7VobRxSIdTC0yylNZZn1GPgjX3xohOy2Dv9wiN0gglKoZN6SlUqDvf8Ov5ABan82vf3hm4E6ptgbedXt0bPibpUiL1dP2rxJaDv8UT-MdRUuH9uO2Ju_tzng66xXE_7qsCjGAdNFQWJ8AiACk65KtOrDx87_Z1PRNS-56dEdhnDscJlHfo1YybAc4JFt8VtbiXcqbiLpm_Tk2KyGJtY3jyJbQnWdUTUMoTabHe-7641fqwgVXmcjbHO-a60rcB66ycXZ1jbRF7k4WD6xd5yXnfRVHaquxTUMacBdvnGxnvufp6Os7OCc_nP2LTznmUZ8xO8oBzHJK_0pGhcxHwPRU-dj8YWMS2_N3ZF87O-GYLA%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I'm a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3da45ce46c84877abd78160d86b0ca0&_e=PLOYCDsFvEa_cp-8Ei2vD_N9my2KaEzzT0d4do8yg7IGBAoxPEu43B7C3yMFCf5_2zy_OLT6MzrItt4tdiSeSqvMbN9REBgiU6AqaEX1A7s7VobRxSIdTC0yylNZZn1GPgjX3xohOy2Dv9wiN0gglKoZN6SlUqDvf8Ov5ABan82vf3hm4E6ptgbedXt0bPibpUiL1dP2rxJaDv8UT-MdRUuH9uO2Ju_tzng66xXE_7qsCjGAdNFQWJ8AiACk65KtOrDx87_Z1PRNS-56dEdhnDscJlHfo1YybAc4JFt8Vtbu7PP6l-do38HoXR5ryQda_UrfVZ4cKcYe5LgZBV0auu_d8y9ZdPimslaNJ5Nq_OvgUnpp4C6ejNxKoVqt742iRH9OZIzjWe39U0CKL57xf27TJkmUnA-NR66Ng-hRXEp67RImq_bBtFqJXVdb76sN3CmkO5dNwsv0YQ_qh95uDA%3D%3D) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3da45ce46c84877abd78160d86b0ca0&_e=PLOYCDsFvEa_cp-8Ei2vD_N9my2KaEzzT0d4do8yg7IGBAoxPEu43B7C3yMFCf5_2zy_OLT6MzrItt4tdiSeSqvMbN9REBgiU6AqaEX1A7s7VobRxSIdTC0yylNZZn1GPgjX3xohOy2Dv9wiN0gglKoZN6SlUqDvf8Ov5ABan82vf3hm4E6ptgbedXt0bPibpUiL1dP2rxJaDv8UT-MdRUuH9uO2Ju_tzng66xXE_7qsCjGAdNFQWJ8AiACk65KtOrDx87_Z1PRNS-56dEdhnDscJlHfo1YybAc4JFt8VtafyIvI6BR4q5_fL7m0irhC6LdHq8YWjhtpx5407j1aTB7NWIxdPqmzV1EtmtWUrXcENiDA4hXv0ErjF1sVbtrEPnTmIGVXrZ1DyFOWiDj-diBbmYRYjQZ9tF-xM3IC-waA9Cxbz7AUXh6ua-jpmSqHqId9PoeZthINEObD4FsvUw%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3da45ce46c84877abd78160d86b0ca0&_e=PLOYCDsFvEa_cp-8Ei2vD_N9my2KaEzzT0d4do8yg7IGBAoxPEu43B7C3yMFCf5_2zy_OLT6MzrItt4tdiSeSqvMbN9REBgiU6AqaEX1A7s7VobRxSIdTC0yylNZZn1GPgjX3xohOy2Dv9wiN0gglKoZN6SlUqDvf8Ov5ABan82vf3hm4E6ptgbedXt0bPibpUiL1dP2rxJaDv8UT-MdRUuH9uO2Ju_tzng66xXE_7qsCjGAdNFQWJ8AiACk65KtOrDx87_Z1PRNS-56dEdhnDscJlHfo1YybAc4JFt8VtafyvCvzVdDTm0Duc0LPyc0l99IeQlbnmpzHKmyohllX-HXKOLjcC9NQMXzWj90YfNxXvSz19jLX1X-4wSIymtCGMVtbDKVAZL7tNwdN_GSBPpdk_4LkByScBeEH6s9rzY1Llun4oROqMmbl2-Svm1COA97kV_2nD72cT0s66tVjA%3D%3D)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking "How long will it be before I burn to death?" But despite our enemy's best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn 't be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I've ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That's why every day since I nearly lost my life, I've dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I 'm telling you all this because I'm hoping that I can count on your financial support**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3da45ce46c84877abd78160d86b0ca0&_e=PLOYCDsFvEa_cp-8Ei2vD_N9my2KaEzzT0d4do8yg7IGBAoxPEu43B7C3yMFCf5_2zy_OLT6MzrItt4tdiSeSqvMbN9REBgiU6AqaEX1A7s7VobRxSIdTC0yylNZZn1GPgjX3xohOy2Dv9wiN0gglKoZN6SlUqDvf8Ov5ABan82vf3hm4E6ptgbedXt0bPibpUiL1dP2rxJaDv8UT-MdRUuH9uO2Ju_tzng66xXE_7qsCjGAdNFQWJ8AiACk65KtOrDx87_Z1PRNS-56dEdhnDscJlHfo1YybAc4JFt8VtYy-H5T_rQJozcjJm1bf_y1WAgbgkY5JKyjpkvDHuTvB_UcyBVWjFLj8j_H0pRSo_sCrcASEtzLPMfyf8VX_0r-9EEt6QDFF9UBZTgYiMBQPTUpIaAOVu1CSjsov8zwlHgh_skwrfjj37eNhKVDroaQ7OukLwgPa6JtOica_t_v2w%3D%3D) -- but I don't want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3da45ce46c84877abd78160d86b0ca0&_e=PLOYCDsFvEa_cp-8Ei2vD_N9my2KaEzzT0d4do8yg7IGBAoxPEu43B7C3yMFCf5_2zy_OLT6MzrItt4tdiSeSqvMbN9REBgiU6AqaEX1A7s7VobRxSIdTC0yylNZZn1GPgjX3xohOy2Dv9wiN0gglKoZN6SlUqDvf8Ov5ABan82vf3hm4E6ptgbedXt0bPibpUiL1dP2rxJaDv8UT-MdRUuH9uO2Ju_tzng66xXE_7qsCjGAdNFQWJ8AiACk65KtOrDx87_Z1PRNS-56dEdhnDscJlHfo1YybAc4JFt8VtbhZ9sh78tnPpFVewHkxudHMCacxUoPuIFanWxYZFYU6iWDDLPxXyjlnmmcK2PZBkSqo7Ae2wrMPABEkFcjnHOvVyGgrMU07stSVY3TiIQH2rgtYpxMEABvSxxguyTl32cx69zsNUGYPVN8H1PhoK0xiskV3FsGz0rPLT9rC2Pbkg%3D%3D)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there's NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that's worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3da45ce46c84877abd78160d86b0ca0&_e=PLOYCDsFvEa_cp-8Ei2vD_N9my2KaEzzT0d4do8yg7IGBAoxPEu43B7C3yMFCf5_2zy_OLT6MzrItt4tdiSeSqvMbN9REBgiU6AqaEX1A7s7VobRxSIdTC0yylNZZn1GPgjX3xohOy2Dv9wiN0gglKoZN6SlUqDvf8Ov5ABan82vf3hm4E6ptgbedXt0bPibpUiL1dP2rxJaDv8UT-MdRUuH9uO2Ju_tzng66xXE_7qsCjGAdNFQWJ8AiACk65KtOrDx87_Z1PRNS-56dEdhnDscJlHfo1YybAc4JFt8VtZ-vUdTgcas7VtbMNDAagyNiJeEfPabX2vSP2jAvhMJ6gghJHTCggY10bJc9H1Hg71SlM6gKTfSHq1AB1PTl8E26mSZ_oNkhUUZf-I0C1CVrQbO6TucKseIa0b6Ell9EgENe4DRPE-dAZoZGja5kKn6OntWdcSRgz2xFfmnHahOOA%3D%3D) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3da45ce46c84877abd78160d86b0ca0&_e=PLOYCDsFvEa_cp-8Ei2vD_N9my2KaEzzT0d4do8yg7IGBAoxPEu43B7C3yMFCf5_2zy_OLT6MzrItt4tdiSeSqvMbN9REBgiU6AqaEX1A7s7VobRxSIdTC0yylNZZn1GPgjX3xohOy2Dv9wiN0gglKoZN6SlUqDvf8Ov5ABan82vf3hm4E6ptgbedXt0bPibpUiL1dP2rxJaDv8UT-MdRUuH9uO2Ju_tzng66xXE_7qsCjGAdNFQWJ8AiACk65KtOrDx87_Z1PRNS-56dEdhnDscJlHfo1YybAc4JFt8VtbRsdrwq4NwYsWhrwFseatyWAuiU8yQpZmO5sncoJFYc162whzUsEIRLMWEnqtAa3gXDrdo59OHx951x3kNgxR_Bz8ao9xxXgz9XLafMVSEBa6lhotZfhgMtIpojHv1xWEWrXrW0fRszWeFTViJtLxCpwg58hZU8WQbron7hLT8-Q%3D%3D) Duty First,

clean_body: God gave me a second chance and I'm not going to waste it | | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I'm a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking "How long will it be before I burn to death?" But despite our enemy's best efforts,I survived. By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. I truly shouldn 't be alive today. For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I've ever learned: Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable. That's why every day since I nearly lost my life, I've dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. -- but I don't want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there's NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that's worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. name: Andy Kim
subject: Meeting the moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Last month, the Supreme Court ruled on several monumental cases. So I wanted to take a minute and share some highlights, lowlights and some of my thoughts after thinking about these rulings for a few weeks now.

Let's start with the good news.

The Supreme Court upheld our democracy when they ruled to uphold the Voting Rights Act in Alabama . They said no to racial gerrymandering, protecting the rights of minority voters.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-10-scotusrecap&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0de001e-431f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-10-scotusrecap&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0de001e-431f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73]

It is frustrating that this case even made its way up to the Supreme Court, but I am glad they made the right call and protected democracy.

Now for the bad news.

The Supreme Court ruled to overturn affirmative action on the basis of race.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-10-scotusrecap&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0de001e-431f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-10-scotusrecap&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0de001e-431f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73]

Education should be about giving everyone a fair shot. There is no perfect formula for fairness, but that doesn't mean we shouldn't try. Affirmative action said race is one piece of the puzzle, not the entire thing. But now we have one less tool to break down barriers for disadvantaged people. Meanwhile, sky-high tuition and legacy admissions continue to maintain a broken system.

Next, the Supreme Court ruled that businesses can discriminate against LGBTQIA+ Americans under the guise of free speech.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-10-scotusrecap&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0de001e-431f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-10-scotusrecap&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0de001e-431f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73]

All Americans deserve to be treated equally under the law, no matter who they love or how they identify. This decision fails to protect Americans and allows discrimination against LGBTQIA+ people across the country. The tradition of Pride Month began as a protest, and the Court shows us yet again that the fight for freedom and equality continues.

Finally, on the last day of the month, the Supreme Court ruled that student loan forgiveness was unconstitutional.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-10-scotusrecap&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0de001e-431f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-10-scotusrecap&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0de001e-431f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73]

It's frustrating because we push young people to be the best and brightest. We boast about having the best schools in the world. But then we turn around and say "tough luck" when students are drowning under the costs? The process of student loans in our country is broken and must be fundamentally fixed.

I am incredibly disappointed by the majority of these decisions. But I am choosing to meet this moment not with divisiveness but with courage and direction.

I still believe in America.

I still believe in our constitution and the checks and balances laid out in it.

I still believe that we have the power to change the trajectory of our nation through the ballot box.

If we want to have good government, we must do everything in our power to elect good leaders. I'm not giving up, and I hope you'll join me in this fight.

More soon,

Andy

clean_body: Last month, the Supreme Court ruled on several monumental cases. So I wanted to take a minute and share some highlights, lowlights and some of my thoughts after thinking about these rulings for a few weeks now. Let's start with the good news. The Supreme Court upheld our democracy when they ruled to uphold the Voting Rights Act in Alabama . They said no to racial gerrymandering, protecting the rights of minority voters. [] It is frustrating that this case even made its way up to the Supreme Court, but I am glad they made the right call and protected democracy. Now for the bad news. The Supreme Court ruled to overturn affirmative action on the basis of race. [] Education should be about giving everyone a fair shot. There is no perfect formula for fairness, but that doesn't mean we shouldn't try. Affirmative action said race is one piece of the puzzle, not the entire thing. But now we have one less tool to break down barriers for disadvantaged people. Meanwhile, sky-high tuition and legacy admissions continue to maintain a broken system. Next, the Supreme Court ruled that businesses can discriminate against LGBTQIA+ Americans under the guise of free speech. [] All Americans deserve to be treated equally under the law, no matter who they love or how they identify. This decision fails to protect Americans and allows discrimination against LGBTQIA+ people across the country. The tradition of Pride Month began as a protest, and the Court shows us yet again that the fight for freedom and equality continues. Finally, on the last day of the month, the Supreme Court ruled that student loan forgiveness was unconstitutional. [] It's frustrating because we push young people to be the best and brightest. We boast about having the best schools in the world. But then we turn around and say "tough luck" when students are drowning under the costs? The process of student loans in our country is broken and must be fundamentally fixed. I am incredibly disappointed by the majority of these decisions. But I am choosing to meet this moment not with divisiveness but with courage and direction. I still believe in America. I still believe in our constitution and the checks and balances laid out in it. I still believe that we have the power to change the trajectory of our nation through the ballot box. If we want to have good government, we must do everything in our power to elect good leaders. I'm not giving up, and I hope you'll join me in this fight. More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

name: CPT. Sam Brown
subject: I shouldn't be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I’m fighting for my country.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z05npfgcj7jduagdmv62ntf41gldu8qr8778ljv8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h64o74c3h2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada’s next Senator. While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it — I would burn to death. **_But, _Friend, _by the grace of God, I survived. _** I’m not special. I’m neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn’t required. Heroes are the people – like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife – who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice. **_The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own. _** My life belongs to my God and my country and I’m more than prepared to give my life to defend her. [**Which is why I’m running to be Nevada’s next Senator.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt46nh54lctrndu0r2hliktmelb9cc77fes0eg10_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h64o74c3h2bs) I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable. Friend, I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more. This won’t be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they’ve got to make sure they can hold this seat. [**BUT I’M NOT SCARED, Friend.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmvd14cjbo6d3j45pu3s0bh8hampf6ikr94hv2k0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h64o74c3h2bs) If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me — _but I can’t do this alone._ I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. [**Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbc5g001qm7tho7aj3m39sstb186d9dvlq715qo8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h64o74c3h2bs) to help me deploy to Washington? Duty First,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpk9mnudm8damdgokq2c63n23nj85oq5epttk048_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h64o74c3h2bs)
---
CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)Republican U.S. Senate Candidate

I'm counting on your immediate support to help me keep up our momentum from now until Election Day. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. **ICYMI: “Chris Christie Can Beat Joe Biden”**
Governor Chris Christie just wrapped up another weekend of national television interviews where he continued to make his case to be the GOP nominee for president.
The governor joined CNN’s Jake Tapper on Friday and then sat down with Shannon Bream on Fox News Sunday, where he teased a major announcement that he will be making this week... stay tuned.
The governor’s big announcement this week comes after leading conservative columnists are [praising the campaign](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=0d2718cbce&e=d0a9afa930) that Governor Christie is running, and touting him as a formidable opponent who can defeat Joe Biden:

The governor joined CNN’s Jake Tapper on Friday and then sat down with Shannon Bream on Fox News Sunday, where he teased a major announcement that he will be making this week... stay tuned. The governor’s big announcement this week comes after leading conservative columnists are that Governor Christie is running, and touting him as a formidable opponent who can defeat Joe Biden: “Chris Christie could easily defeat Joe Biden.” \- Peggy Noonan, The Wall Steet Journal, July 6, 2023 Watch a few of the highlights from the interviews below: “A Stronger, More Influential, And Freer America” “I’ll Raise Those Issues” “Snake Oil Salesmen” “This Is For Himself, And Himself Only” REMINDER: The first GOP debate is on August 23rd. If you haven’t already, become one of the 40,000 individual donors who are responsible for sending Governor Christie to the debate stage. name: Sean Themea
subject: Here is how Biden’s new gun ban scheme works…
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.-zAMGZZw)
Hello Fellow American,

You can always count on the federal government to make a power grab after a tragedy. Biden is, once again, pushing to “BAN the manufacture and sale” of AR rifles and high-capacity magazines.

When the Federal government wants to disarm law-abiding American patriots, we can’t afford to remain silent.

This is a direct assault on YOUR Constitutional rights. But don’t worry...

**Young Americans for Liberty is on the front lines in the fight for Constitutional rights!**

I am Sean Themea, the Chief Operating Officer at Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the nation’s largest, most active, and most effective youth liberty organization on campus and in American electoral politics.

[You can support Young Americans for Liberty’s fight for liberty and our Constitutional rights on college campuses and beyond. Click here to donate $100, $50, or even just $10 today >>>](http://trk.secureandprosper.-_GQPlLcDQ)

I’m not sure if anti-gun lawmakers know this or if they just don’t care (it’s infinitely worse if they don’t care), but gun bans leave people vulnerable when tragedy happens.

That hasn’t stopped Biden from pushing to disarm Americans — over the past 30 years, he has made multiple attempts to ban guns.

America needs pro-gun laws because gun bans don’t work right now. Anyone telling you otherwise is lying to you.

But YAL is making a difference!

While gun-grabbers try to take away your guns, our student activists and liberty legislators are ensuring our schools aren't soft targets!

**So far, YAL activists and legislators have passed Constitutional Carry in Indiana, Texas, and Alabama. Young Americans for Liberty has also elected more than 250 hardcore, pro-2A legislators across the country.**

I truly believe YAL’s student activists can make a proactive difference in the fight for gun rights. That’s why I set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of the month to fund our efforts. And with your support, we can give them the resources they need to stand up for the Second Amendment.[Young Americans for Liberty is winning in the fight for YOUR rights. Please send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount to support a student activist today >>_>_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTkxLWVjNWQ5YTg0NTE1ZDRmYTU4Y2I3ODc1OTkxNDJjMTNiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbmVkb3QuY29tL3lhbGM0L2FlP3V0bV90ZXJtPVNQTzA3MTAyMDIzIn0/CfK4R7_KDoOUxWtx5A7W6w)

I don’t believe the Founding Fathers were unclear when they said, _**"The right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed.”**_ Even a "well-regulated" in the Second Amendment never meant regulated by the government. But if we aren’t careful, the federal government will finally rob us of our rights. And once they are gone, they are much more difficult to get back.

Please help us meet our $50,000 goal before the end of the month. **Just chip in any amount by clicking below.**[Donate $10](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
[Donate $35](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
[Donate $50](http://trk.secureandprosper._s1FCZg)
[Donate $100](http://trk.secureandprosper._A)
[Donate $250](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
[Donate $500](http://trk.secureandprosper.-C0A)
[Donate $1,000](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
[Donate $2,500](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
[Donate Any Amount](http://trk.secureandprosper.)Thank you for your support. I look forward to having you with us.

For Liberty,

Sean Themea
Chief Operating Officer
Young Americans for Liberty

**100,000. **
---
**That’s how many Democratic women of the New American Majority Emerge aims to reach by 2035.** That means 100,000 Black, Brown, and Indigenous women, women of color, LGBTQ+ women, young and unmarried women who are at the intersections of every major challenge facing our communities right now. **Here's why:**
**We know we need new voices in politics to turn our country around** and ensure that ALL our communities are represented at every level of government. That’s how we enshrine our rights for generations to come. We've made huge progress towards our goal through our one-of-a-kind programs and the efforts of community members like you. But we can't slow down now!

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b50e9fe1c5c4a3b9261b2159bea1863&_e=UF5csdfFsSGsgg_sAQdDIZeOS8kX43pPzjrxkWdKK86LIDx64mYAqKPIWIY9tvPA9sfPBKu0fqexxjM5FVy32XDrKLmGpFbiwhY3pqhmqD2C1M9TqETA0J-kHu-JU2Oy-0xZ3oEHTEJ_MqWtclISWQ8ZuZhGPTVOp1TdWdPKedK29P_GZC31Mif9t6Wh5K15kJH1U2D83xc9yijgFiKbSavrD6rVUNHj2pqdLgI7cmiq0GcKjPWg_JCqzBA8GiV_VA0lCFtxJIShElp_bbjFPrZ7jv67BsnCdqJDRBF_mQbCYbCNsp7gGqmU2OtKASTg9ehrs04Ef6kxSxZQLDkaGiK4odsoHXtTYIJqr7aELxWpgJz1qOj1iWDwao2x4D48yG4eA38r0E55_fDjUm1_oagCdh0Pz7t-CdqswoqWkhXXwOuDCffGsQ0q3BodSgftF_8G4GGfzniA8iPmdPsQvUbL6YGFjn4ahtvRTKXxVSMobSKhuguIwyulfzLoCXxBCJCzR52Uw-XvYxlLGD-0nQ%3D%3D)

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6eksf5f2ii4vb1c2pu1pf7cc43d83p2k79o982g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6cth2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvufq048qg2ftjtqee691aean6dso1snrdseqf20_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6cth2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlt486f7jt4fjlfoag5qjdmogcceqj4fjq56pkko_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6cth2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zutuvh5nndmm5e7dmqstd4dod3p4tccef3hstpl0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6cth2bs "DONATE TODAY")

name: Your America
subject: Say NO to the EXTREME Liberal Agenda
body:
Say NO to Jamie McLeod-Skinner

| | | |
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28665%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OQQlRKx%2bnxUkM6uw6Ik6NQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
_**Jamie McLeod-Skinner is back and determined to bring her out-of-touch San Francisco values to Oregon.
**_
It's up to you to stop her extreme liberal agenda.

__Jamie McLeod-Skinner claims to know what's best for our community, but let's not forget that she's an outsider who lacks a true understanding of our district's needs.
__
_**Help me stop her from bringing her California values and interests to our great state of Oregon.
**_
I proudly served as the Mayor of Happy Valley, Oregon, a position that allowed me to intimately understand the challenges faced by our community members. I approach my work in Congress as diligently as I did when I was mayor.

But I can't do it alone, Friend.

[_**Can you donate $250, $100, or even $25 to help me fend off Jamie McLeod Skinner's attempts to force her extreme liberal agenda upon us?**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28666%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3StloUJmOrSUbXDi0MhRmw&sysid=1)

clean_body: Say NO to Jamie McLeod-Skinner | | | | Friend, Jamie McLeod-Skinner is back and determined to bring her out-of-touch San Francisco values to Oregon. It's up to you to stop her extreme liberal agenda. Jamie McLeod-Skinner claims to know what's best for our community, but let's not forget that she's an outsider who lacks a true understanding of our district's needs. Help me stop her from bringing her California values and interests to our great state of Oregon. I proudly served as the Mayor of Happy Valley, Oregon, a position that allowed me to intimately understand the challenges faced by our community members. I approach my work in Congress as diligently as I did when I was mayor. But I can't do it alone, Friend. | | | | Every dollar counts Friend! It’s time to show Jamie McLeod Skinner that OR-05 is not up for grabs by outsiders pushing an extreme liberal agenda. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** | | | | Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
God gave me a second chance and I’m not going to waste it

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd6d4v8v794k8gg7buvf0uvq5t53q4oe99fdjl9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze1r6i733rgal2mv9g7ec81533m9crn0s739fpv8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4osn2e7rq51r2rp06qa12499jt01d58cf0v3tl0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvf385l6ntep51odi712thei8c6vkkie4h6g7sf0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zflfqucj15sckvlpro0b10h72a9cr207emjudpp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs) — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbjog5snrhqc9ddfo9b5e5045h8kr2atpr0pgs00_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zho95p7fk98skovfrfpodpglqbjha7v7bgiol138_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbo7dpur78a0urbtbp7hjb01r5f7i1rh04bbseu0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs) Duty First,
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zafud2adddmgehcip4nk82fm6otoe3j6c6fcdadg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h62or6c9h2bs)
---
Captain Sam Brown
---
| | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense.
---
Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada.
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Sen. Jacky Rosen (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: McConnell’s handpicked candidate
body:
I needed to reach out directly: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada. | | |

The Biden Crime family hit a new low | | | Fellow conservative,[](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=d04b1668928443a38e9ea51c805095e6&_e=sfeRYqcynuIJhMBNKheaLURQtCIIk8blPSSEPq7wJV0LtiKaasANJ5Q6DO-CgXOPfudnNqrTAn2QOamNo__dF7PDo99Cev0o2A5AltkxOFfK7AH-j1eD7u1vjOzshjAtaIZuZonwJaV9tMZFZy7fvRnUf1qLMZlltIJiEzvvrRvvvXy7bVGjcKL_1Hg-iSTVJtrGrkT6dtKAWpxm8K6HlToJSFZOqerHibA5fZR01ubzJRm4yrxKuZbVFbn4XW7JdxM5_Olm3SGouBD6oGijLnP0sN3YXfqVUGwCvlnZne3NUuW3MQRvGK8Di1xqSQl2G2oXwiymmsASy_fqJOpUUkT7TaOFjcnYjs6gvQg3j_9ojxVmxFzgukvWoH1KQ4my) What’s happening in the White House is something out of a paranoid South American regime. **_Hunter Biden getting a slap on the wrist after making billions in illegal foreign dealings. Joe Biden denying all involvement. The corruption of the Biden Crime Family is on full display, and nothing is being done about it. _** This is Maria Elvira Salazar, as someone who has covered corruption throughout the Hemisphere, I know how the sons of corrupt Presidents would get off easy.
_But now, it’s happening in America. _ The Biden Crime Family is reaping the benefits of a two-tiered justice system that PROTECTS him and CRIMINALIZES his political enemies. I’ve been among the loudest voices calling out their corruption, but now the Democrat establishment is moving to silence me for good. **They’ve listed my seat as a Top Target to turn Blue in 2024. **

name: STOP TikTok
subject: Are our children at risk?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, TikTok is digital fentanyl. It’s corrupting our children while sucking them into addiction and stealing their data for the Communist Party to use at their will. _But while Republicans are sounding the alarm, Democrats are proudly posting on the app while the CCP watches._
_Enough is enough.**It’s time to ban TikTok.**_

subject: Urgently asking for your $3 to send Ilhan back to Congress
