body:
We've seen their playbook before, and Ilhan's not going to be taken by surprise
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=337%2E791427%2EFxI8h3)

Friends -
We're going to be direct: **[Can you make a $3 contribution to Ilhan Omar's re-election campaign for Congress today?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july23.iXCXH5&refcode=em230710-1-t1r&t=2&akid=337%2E791427%2EFxI8h3)**
We're sorry to be so blunt, but Kevin McCarthy, Donald Trump, and the rest of the GOP establishment have already made it clear that Ilhan is one of their top targets in Congress this cycle. That means there's very little time to waste.
Now here's the truth: The right wing will do and spend whatever it takes in this campaign.
Pouring super PAC dark money into Minnesota to support our opponents? You betcha.
Flooding the airwaves with bigoted attack ads? No question.
Spreading lies and disinformation across the media? Of course.
All that and more — all in an effort to defeat Ilhan and stop our movement's momentum.
But we know what's coming. We've seen their playbook before, and Ilhan's not going to be taken by surprise — _and_ we're going to have what it takes to fight back.
That's because we have something they don't: you.
You, and a grassroots movement of thousands and thousands of progressives across the country, all willing to stand with Ilhan and our campaign.
The fact is that building the kind of campaign we need to win takes a lot of resources, and the only way we're doing that is the same way we do everything — together. So please:
**[Can you please chip in $3 or anything you can for Ilhan today? Every dollar will go towards building the kind of campaign we need to send Ilhan back to Congress in 2024.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july23.iXCXH5&refcode=em230710-1-t1r&t=3&akid=337%2E791427%2EFxI8h3)**

Friend, did you see this email from Kirsten last month?
Although just a few weeks have passed since she sent this email, the number of mass shootings in 2023 has, tragically, already skyrocketed to more than 350.
Our country is in the midst of a full-blown gun violence epidemic. And we all know that it won't end until leaders in Washington finally stand up to the gun lobby and pass an assault weapons ban. Kirsten is working hard to win the votes that we need to finally get these weapons of war off our streets. But she's counting on people like you to continue raising your voices for change until we get the job done.
**That's why I'm asking you to add your name to this petition to help us reach our new 10,000 signature goal before our midnight deadline.

[_Please, will you sign on now to show your support for an assault weapons ban? Your signature would mean so much to Kirsten._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66257903/415840209/925398452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4274-su-nd&refcode=jtk4274-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjc5NGM1ZC00YzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GjhGac77bihyLey5D23O7S6L7BhwYwmdvdJgfz3W3Eo=&emci=2ceacf12-081c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3b794c5d-4c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

| | |
---
Friend, there have already been more than 200 mass shootings in 2023 alone. _That's more than one shooting for every single day of the year._
America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic — and families and communities across the nation are paying the price every single day. It's heartbreaking. It's infuriating. And it's long past time we address this problem head-on.
**Today, on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I'm asking 5,000 people on this team to raise their voices for change by signing my petition to support an assault weapons ban.[_Please, will you mark this day by adding your name to keep these weapons of war away from schools, off our streets and out of our communities?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66257905/415840211/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4274-su-nd&refcode=jtk4274-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjc5NGM1ZC00YzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GjhGac77bihyLey5D23O7S6L7BhwYwmdvdJgfz3W3Eo=&emci=2ceacf12-081c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3b794c5d-4c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66257906/415840212/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4274-su-nd&refcode=jtk4274-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjc5NGM1ZC00YzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GjhGac77bihyLey5D23O7S6L7BhwYwmdvdJgfz3W3Eo=&emci=2ceacf12-081c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3b794c5d-4c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
Today, it feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shooting — at a school, a mall, a grocery store or even a family's own backyard — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable.
But here's the thing, friend: **This cycle _isn't_ endless. The next mass killing _isn't_ inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take _right now_ to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence.** And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms.
Last year, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including my legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. You have my word that I won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me.
**[_So please, if you believe that we can win a future where communities are free from gun violence, will you add your name to support an assault weapons ban? I'm counting on your signature before midnight to know that you're on my side in this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66257907/415840213/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4274-su-nd&refcode=jtk4274-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjc5NGM1ZC00YzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GjhGac77bihyLey5D23O7S6L7BhwYwmdvdJgfz3W3Eo=&emci=2ceacf12-081c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3b794c5d-4c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

With hope for the future,

Kirsten

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: "Year of the Woman"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | We're fired up to elect Democratic pro-choice women. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66258300/415841695/228261731?sourceid=1050436&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmZiMmE0Ni00ZDFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDSXEr-cyEGZsmgQEzsBKLW1xuWNLZibS7i02v8VQ0A=&emci=6e4c603d-4d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b2fb2a46-4d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

It's clear as day that Democrats are more fired up than ever to elect pro-choice women.

We've seen Democratic pro-choice women defeat Republicans nationwide, and state leaders are fighting hard to pass pro-choice ballot measures.

**I've seen this kind of grassroots energy before** **— back in 1992.** That was the year EMILYs List grew our membership by 600% and elected four new women to the Senate and 20 to the House. It quickly became known as the "Year of the Woman."

**Well, guess what? I think 2024 is about to be the "Year of the Woman" all over again.** **[Americans everywhere overwhelmingly agree with our pro-choice values — no doubt about it. We just need more resources to recruit, train, and support candidates to make those values into policy. So I'm personally asking: Will you chip in to support EMILYs List right now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66258321/415841716/228261731?sourceid=1050436&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmZiMmE0Ni00ZDFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDSXEr-cyEGZsmgQEzsBKLW1xuWNLZibS7i02v8VQ0A=&emci=6e4c603d-4d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b2fb2a46-4d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

I've seen a lot as the founder of EMILYs List. We were a much smaller organization in 1991, when the Supreme Court nomination hearings began for Clarence Thomas. Women across the country were fed up with anti-choice extremists like Thomas, but they were also inspired to get involved and demand better representation. Today, it's been over a year since Clarence Thomas and the ultraconservative Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and obliterated national abortion rights. Fourteen states have banned abortion — and women across the country are enraged. **But I know that, much like we did in 1992, we can turn our anger into action to elect more Democratic pro-choice women than ever**.

I know we can make 2024 another "Year of the Woman," Peter. I know we can protect the Senate majority by electing candidates like **Angela Alsobrooks** , **Elissa Slotkin** , and **Tammy Baldwin** , and send pro-choice champions like **Yadira Caraveo** , **Liz Gereghty** , and **Lauren Underwood** to take back the House — but we need your help. ****So that's why I'm asking, Peter: will you donate to help elect Democratic pro-choice women and restore abortion access across the country?**

clean_body: | | | We're fired up to elect Democratic pro-choice women. Peter, It's clear as day that Democrats are more fired up than ever to elect pro-choice women. We've seen Democratic pro-choice women defeat Republicans nationwide, and state leaders are fighting hard to pass pro-choice ballot measures. I've seen this kind of grassroots energy before — back in 1992. That was the year EMILYs List grew our membership by 600% and elected four new women to the Senate and 20 to the House. It quickly became known as the "Year of the Woman." Well, guess what? I think 2024 is about to be the "Year of the Woman" all over again. I've seen a lot as the founder of EMILYs List. We were a much smaller organization in 1991, when the Supreme Court nomination hearings began for Clarence Thomas. Women across the country were fed up with anti-choice extremists like Thomas, but they were also inspired to get involved and demand better representation. Today, it's been over a year since Clarence Thomas and the ultraconservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade and obliterated national abortion rights. Fourteen states have banned abortion — and women across the country are enraged. But I know that, much like we did in 1992, we can turn our anger into action to elect more Democratic pro-choice women than ever. I know we can make 2024 another "Year of the Woman," Peter. I know we can protect the Senate majority by electing candidates like Angela Alsobrooks , Elissa Slotkin , and Tammy Baldwin , and send pro-choice champions like Yadira Caraveo , Liz Gereghty , and Lauren Underwood to take back the House — but we need your help. **So that's why I'm asking, Peter: will you donate to help elect Democratic pro-choice women and restore abortion access across the country? Thank you for being with EMILYs List in this fight, Ellen R. Malcolm Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
I needed to reach out directly: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.
| | | I needed to reach out directly: **GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.**

Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his _rubber stamp_ in the Senate, voting for anything **including a national abortion ban.** I’m fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can’t do it alone. **[Will you chip in $5 or more now to split between my campaign and the DSCC to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230710-JackyRosen-RosenTandemBrownAnnouncement-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230710-JackyRosen-RosenTandemBrownAnnouncement-Pros-sl1&akid=11302%2E9716520%2ERe5qoE)**

Now, _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – **and a recent poll shows me 2 points down.**

**This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far.**

name: Our Revolution
subject: Tonight! LIVE student debt town hall w/ Ro Khanna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
phase 2 in the fight to cancel student debt starts tonight!

Join Our Revolution this evening for our LIVE Student Debt Town Hall with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our powerful student debt activists from around the country.

After the recent terrible Supreme Court ruling, Joe Biden immediately took up our call for Plan B, and now we are mobilizing the student debt movement to make sure the President delivers.

RSVP now for tonight’s Student Debt Town Hall with Ro Khanna to strategize for next steps - the LIVE event kicks off Monday at 8:30pm ET/5:30 PT on Zoom.
https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Mon_Call_230710/?t=1009&akid=4444%2E5885482%2EZpiq2M

We have a strategy and a plan, and we just need you! Our Revolution and our growing coalition will be taking action to make sure student debt holders are heard and that President Biden moves quickly to avoid red tape and rightwing interference.
We can’t let student debt payments restart - with interest! - in the middle of an affordability crisis. This is an avoidable disaster for 43 million people, our families and communities.

clean_body: phase 2 in the fight to cancel student debt starts tonight! Join Our Revolution this evening for our LIVE Student Debt Town Hall with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our powerful student debt activists from around the country. After the recent terrible Supreme Court ruling, Joe Biden immediately took up our call for Plan B, and now we are mobilizing the student debt movement to make sure the President delivers. RSVP now for tonight’s Student Debt Town Hall with Ro Khanna to strategize for next steps - the LIVE event kicks off Monday at 8:30pm ET/5:30 PT on Zoom. We have a strategy and a plan, and we just need you! Our Revolution and our growing coalition will be taking action to make sure student debt holders are heard and that President Biden moves quickly to avoid red tape and rightwing interference. We can’t let student debt payments restart - with interest! - in the middle of an affordability crisis. This is an avoidable disaster for 43 million people, our families and communities. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Gifts and trips from billionaire oil barons and hedge fund managers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66259118/415844684/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFjZjNkZS00ZjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXm8hO_srqaPiHtiZLIRPhivRCKUu7iYNLVgKWriva0=&emci=3652e3fb-3f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6c1cf3de-4f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | **We need to talk about Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito.** _Propublica_ recently revealed that Justice Alito accepted hedge fund billionaire Paul Singer's gift of a flight on a private jet to take a luxury Alaskan fishing vacation. Afterward, Alito not only left the free flight off his financial disclosure forms, but didn't recuse himself when Singer had business before the court – including a $2.4B dispute with the nation of Argentina. When asked why he hid the trip from the American people, **Alito not only refused to acknowledge the appearance of corruption, he published a defiant, vindictive op-ed in the _Wall Street Journal._** This isn't a mistake. It's an ethical disgrace. It's time for Alito to resign. **[Will you sign my petition today urging Justice Samuel Alito to resign from the Supreme Court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66259120/415844685/-210659977?contactdata=9yWWZJnrVlUl6RUFvzMNmM4ZkSkFwNolBgvFlFIrEeO6KJ0RuIYmdQljwIVGplWEdyPT6SZ67bSRO9IkOV691dvvSnCg0KSAWIHFwPoInmMcewSp0Q1ZBUGmF0E2wyb7fC9TpW/McFupHgwTso1Q6Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFjZjNkZS00ZjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXm8hO_srqaPiHtiZLIRPhivRCKUu7iYNLVgKWriva0=&emci=3652e3fb-3f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6c1cf3de-4f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)** [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66259121/415844687/-210659977?contactdata=9yWWZJnrVlUl6RUFvzMNmM4ZkSkFwNolBgvFlFIrEeO6KJ0RuIYmdQljwIVGplWEdyPT6SZ67bSRO9IkOV691dvvSnCg0KSAWIHFwPoInmMcewSp0Q1ZBUGmF0E2wyb7fC9TpW/McFupHgwTso1Q6Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFjZjNkZS00ZjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXm8hO_srqaPiHtiZLIRPhivRCKUu7iYNLVgKWriva0=&emci=3652e3fb-3f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6c1cf3de-4f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215) The Supreme Court wields immense power over the United States and the lives of everyday Americans. This same power seems to have inflated _some_ justices' sense of infallibility, and now they are acting as if they are above the law. Those justices work for the American people. **But when they take expensive gifts, accept sweetheart deals from billionaire patrons, and then refuse _any_ accountability, they're no longer serving the public**; they're only serving themselves. This all stinks of corruption, and it needs to end. **[Sign my petition today and tell Samuel Alito to restore faith in the court and resign his position as a Supreme Court clean_body: | | | | We need to talk about Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito. Propublica recently revealed that Justice Alito accepted hedge fund billionaire Paul Singer's gift of a flight on a private jet to take a luxury Alaskan fishing vacation. Afterward, Alito not only left the free flight off his financial disclosure forms, but didn't recuse himself when Singer had business before the court – including a $2.4B dispute with the nation of Argentina. When asked why he hid the trip from the American people, Alito not only refused to acknowledge the appearance of corruption, he published a defiant, vindictive op-ed in the Wall Street Journal. This isn't a mistake. It's an ethical disgrace. It's time for Alito to resign. The Supreme Court wields immense power over the United States and the lives of everyday Americans. This same power seems to have inflated some justices' sense of infallibility, and now they are acting as if they are above the law. Those justices work for the American people. But when they take expensive gifts, accept sweetheart deals from billionaire patrons, and then refuse any accountability, they're no longer serving the public; they're only serving themselves. This all stinks of corruption, and it needs to end. Onward! name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Action Alert: Protection of the Owyhee moving in Congress!
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66259162/415844729/60803812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NDVlN2Y2LTRmMWYtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GYgGuWqz3cxLdIQ4P4XWxxydXReSIIUeEftk2yjJiDY=&emci=4b38410c-411f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1445e7f6-4f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, Have you heard of the Owyhee (ow·wai·hee)? This wild and rugged part of Southeast Oregon–called the Grand Canyon of Oregon for its deep canyons–is unforgettable and truly worth protecting. [**Join us in thanking our US Senators Ron Wyden and Jeff Merkley, who are working to do just that.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66259168/415844736/60803812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NDVlN2Y2LTRmMWYtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GYgGuWqz3cxLdIQ4P4XWxxydXReSIIUeEftk2yjJiDY=&emci=4b38410c-411f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1445e7f6-4f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The Owyhee Canyonlands are a national and Oregon treasure that have been 17 million years in the making. With more than 2.5 million acres of wilderness-quality lands, it features deep, rugged canyons and miles upon miles of rolling sagebrush grasslands, supports a diversity of wildlife, and preserves some of the darkest night skies in the country. It also contains sacred lands and cultural resources significant for the indigenous Northern Paiute, Bannock, and Shoshone tribes. The surrounding landscapes, rivers, fish, and wildlife are a part of tribal traditions to this day. The bill that Sens. Wyden and Merkley are championing would permanently protect more than one million acres of the most ecologically sensitive public lands in the Owyhee as wilderness. And, the bill would support important tribal priorities and provide for improved recreation management and economic development–all while promoting science-based management to improve the long-term economic health of these lands. It is a community-driven, Oregon-crafted solution for protecting the most important and threatened places in the region, and it's scheduled for a hearing this Wednesday. [**Write to our senators right away, thanking them for their groundbreaking proposal, and urge them to do everything they can to protect one of the most remote, wild, and untouched places in the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66259172/415844741/60803812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NDVlN2Y2LTRmMWYtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GYgGuWqz3cxLdIQ4P4XWxxydXReSIIUeEftk2yjJiDY=&emci=4b38410c-411f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1445e7f6-4f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The region has a rich cultural, geologic and natural history worthy of the highest levels of protection now and forever. We must not wait any longer to protect the Owyhee. Thank you for all that you do, Lindsey Scholten

Executive Director, OLCV |
---|---
|

2024 is our final stand, the final battle for the heart and soul of America.

And with YOU at my side, we _WILL_ be victorious.

We will demolish the Deep State, we will drive out the globalists, we will cast out the Communists, we will throw off the sick political class that hates our country, we will rout the fake news media, we will defeat Crooked Joe Biden, and we will liberate America from these scoundrels once and for all.

This is completely deranged**–**[**PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION OF ANY AMOUNT TO HELP ME COMBAT THIS VIOLATION OF THE U.S. CONSTITUTION. >> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi5f1p6a5eet772sqrh8fjcp65is5u4mske7ev3g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1h61ob1clh2bs)
Not only is this unconstitutional, but it’s also an incredibly dumb and silly idea – I’m sorry to be so frank with you, but that’s the truth.
Anytime anyone wants to cause trouble or get in the news, they can pick some obscure pronouns for the day and then start fining and suing others left and right.
What has this country come to?
China is silently taking our country down from the inside out, we’re facing an unprecedented cost of living and inflation crisis, opioid overdoses have reached record highs, and our southern border remains wide open.
And this nonsense is what the Michigan House is most concerned about?
It’s time we elect representatives who will focus on the issues that actually impact EVERY American – and not representatives who play partisan games in order to pander to the 1%**.**

clean_body: You’re being fined for simply saying the words he or she. | | | | You’re being fined for simply saying the words he or she. Hey Friend, did you see this? I can’t believe this is real news, but check this out. . . This is completely deranged– Not only is this unconstitutional, but it’s also an incredibly dumb and silly idea – I’m sorry to be so frank with you, but that’s the truth. Anytime anyone wants to cause trouble or get in the news, they can pick some obscure pronouns for the day and then start fining and suing others left and right. What has this country come to? China is silently taking our country down from the inside out, we’re facing an unprecedented cost of living and inflation crisis, opioid overdoses have reached record highs, and our southern border remains wide open. And this nonsense is what the Michigan House is most concerned about? It’s time we elect representatives who will focus on the issues that actually impact EVERY American – and not representatives who play partisan games in order to pander to the 1%. | | | | | | Thank you, Michael Markey Republican for Congress, MI-03 | 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

clean_body: Help me FIGHT BACK to defend this all-important seat. | Peter, The DCCC and D.C. Democrats are certain that they can topple my campaign to win this all-important seat and take back the House majority. That’s why I’m under fire from the radical Left with their relentless lying attacks as they try to FLIP this seat. As 1 of the 5 seats that gave Republicans the House majority, defending this seat is critical to keeping the House and continuing the fight against the radical Left. With the full force of the radical Left conspiring against me, I am counting on YOU to help me FIGHT BACK. The future of this country and the American Dream depend on it. I’m a proud product of the American Dream. When I first came to America as a child with my parents, I worked hard, and because of the opportunities this country has to offer, I stand before you now as a United States Congressman. Only in America would this be possible. Every decision I’ve made since I entered Congress – every decision I’ll make going forward – has been to protect and defend this dream for everyone. I will NEVER stop fighting against Biden and the Left’s radical and disastrous agenda that threatens to destroy the American Dream and the very foundation this country was built on. The radical Left thinks they are within reach of FLIPPING this seat as they pour millions into attacking me. But they underestimate the strength of our army of conservatives determined to ensure future generations get the opportunity to live the American Dream. With your help, I know we can defend this seat and show the radical Left the power of the American Dream. Thank you, Rep. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071023_CTC_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071023_CTC_act]
Friend,
Sherrod Brown and I introduced a major piece of legislation last month — and I wanted to make sure you heard about it.
I’ve been fighting to pass an expanded Child Tax Credit since 2015. In 2021, I succeeded — but it only lasted for one year. Now, I’m working to expand the Child Tax Credit and to make it permanent.
This policy is a big deal for America’s kids. When we passed the expansion in 2021, we:
*
Cut
child
poverty
in
the
United
States
nearly
in
half
*
Benefited
60
million
children
across
the
country,
including
1
million
children
in
Colorado
*
Cut
food
insecurity
in
families
with
children
by
26
percent
The Working Families Tax Relief Act, which we introduced in June, will restore the expanded Child Tax Credit, increasing the income of 40 million households and benefitting 65 million children.
This bill will give working families monthly payments to keep up with the cost of living, get food on the table, and pay for child care. It will give them the breathing room they need to set their kids up for success.
I won’t stop fighting for this bill until it’s passed into law. But to show my colleagues in Congress how much public support this bill has, I’ll need your help. Will you become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the Working Families Tax Relief Act by signing on here? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_071023_ctceitc]

BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_071023_ctceitc]
Thank you!

Donald J. Trump July 10th, 2023
**Bedminster, NJ —** A new [survey from Florida Atlantic University](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw80DFv8yAQBuBfgzciOGMwg4cvn-UlUlV1adeLD2JabJBxGuXfV06jrnevnju9OOcY_L1j5sgApkCFAbD6HwM4qePHiz69n3r-9to3vNeNuu1b-M8Atnt2f9GncnAzhrhPTV9R14CXonKd1K0VUkstq6kzkghGX7fGoLLCALZGKytqVNRab6rQgYBaGCmkFVbCwdpWSzrXKLySAmqmBLnylTylBSN9but1zocxzVXspm3L5fHTwGDwMa2BMKcYtjCWPcNgwHWcwrcrDAYNoBrLc4qR_2r8ofHokApf08LJFVy2UPj5zkFwnNNy4U-Yry5fzzGMuOxatXaUbyHGULRhSlz2NvajPwEAAP__FFttLw) found that President Donald J. Trump holds a commanding 20-point lead in the 2024 GOP primary in Florida.
According to the poll, President Trump is dominating virtually every region of the state—with President Trump holding a 59-point lead in the Miami-Dade region (70% to 11%).
**If the GOP Presidential Primary were held today, which candidate would you vote for?**
**50% President Donald J. Trump (+20)**
30% Ron DeSantis
4% Vivek Ramaswamy
3% Tim Scott
[](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81q6zAQRp9mvEsYfZL1s9AiucZwCZTQTbt1I7lRK9cmUjB5--JSup0zHL4zTEtO48OTORJwTaEQQPJAwEkdX5_06eXU7Z7PXbvrdKvWjeIfAfWxxL_XX8s-TkPK29V0TfAtRsFN9EJbx0ILLZqrV8Y4y2OwMPISYoRji1aKNrqIix2a5MGQbAQLx05g75zVIrzJgUclGJIUh1g-5zHMX0MOH_V2n5b9ZZ6a7K-1LuVnU0_o65pqjbeNEfr_h_OccwFvCX2pQ70XQi-0sYodFHMrmbWUhmRfSHbg5ubDsqacU9GGFL9vfZvuOwAA__8MY1et)
The poll also found that President Trump holds a double-digit lead over Joe Biden in a general election matchup.
**If the election for President were held today, and the candidates were Joe Biden and Donald Trump, which candidate would you support?**

| | You see, it happened in a split second, Friend-- when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. clean_body: The fire nearly took my life. | | | | | You see, it happened in a split second, Friend-- when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me. I stared death in the face and survived. Friend, through the pain and years of recovery, I learned the most important lesson: Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor. My name is Captain Sam Brown, and I'm running for U.S. Senate because I believe with all my heart that the only reason I'm alive today is to serve my country to my last breath. Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.) Republican U.S. Senate Candidate P.S. Democrats have been barely winning every single year for nearly a decade -- and winning in Nevada will be KEY to guaranteeing a Republican majority in the Senate in 2024.**** Please, chip in whatever you can using this | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. clean_body: Your response represents every Republican in your state. The most important thing our Party must do is elect a REPUBLICAN to the White House AND elect a REPUBLICAN Majority to the United States Senate, Friend. The chaos and ineptitude of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and their cronies in the Senate have devastated our once GREAT country. Loyal grassroots supporters like you can be the difference between putting CONSERVATIVES back in charge to restore American greatness or potentially losing the Senate to Chuck Schumer, Adam Schiff and other radical Socialists forever. That's why I'm asking if you will take one of the most important surveys to date: I don't think I can stress to you just how important this is, Friend. We have ALL felt the horrible effects of the Biden-Harris "agenda," and this may be our LAST CHANCE to correct it. ****************************************************************************************************** Senate Republicans asked me to review responses from our top patriots in every state across the country, and YOUR answer via the Presidential Canvass has been selected for review. Please don 't wait too long before I'm forced to move on to the next patriot in your state". | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I'm a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc9c7ab35eb540cfbc4f3fc0740a2e0b&_e=clrXCLQaDYnYHGXPHUTqxKumLIAekNgjgwbUxORx4UJrbEiIs6jjtrdFDMqm4s9rouCEtekHqsGlg95Nd1kn9-YailMkI6cHPI7GvXRS59iYMpgeqvgOJ9_jeE0_Fx5amv0g-_4WdgJ70gnCA8P_2WsNssT1PvGJfogbHhWPc_M6VGw40acMaNJjV499PbvTKdZerahzgoCo72Yy5Foy0Nbx4xjwQ7wkh0mfoC4Xz4JOGYurcx38kFmsjHcM1b5_SF_1JtwIUkSQkVeIxiywKmyM4LHaLfTk4EDaL0mnzRpaUGVwDOTmJ46gnOmFNSW2Me5wwZj8VyMfEeMPnIw81nDRNiDPy0MpAB5m6_sf_RiOZxM6I64gEudYycWSkxiYUamqYf9znEzRqpOG-I5zL6o5ILv0pVD1av-x8n2f6d9NtbJA4gdaICRCA0kca1HL5qtPL29xMROl6wFu2cy16g%3D%3D) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc9c7ab35eb540cfbc4f3fc0740a2e0b&_e=clrXCLQaDYnYHGXPHUTqxKumLIAekNgjgwbUxORx4UJrbEiIs6jjtrdFDMqm4s9rouCEtekHqsGlg95Nd1kn9-YailMkI6cHPI7GvXRS59iYMpgeqvgOJ9_jeE0_Fx5amv0g-_4WdgJ70gnCA8P_2WsNssT1PvGJfogbHhWPc_M6VGw40acMaNJjV499PbvTKdZerahzgoCo72Yy5Foy0Nbx4xjwQ7wkh0mfoC4Xz4JOGYurcx38kFmsjHcM1b5_SF_1JtwIUkSQkVeIxiywKmyM4LHaLfTk4EDaL0mnzRqjt85PH2LTiz1v-TQ8TWFoMB1Wxeu9o-xTrgOcQOZmn_Wol3ujqqxIKH6qFqqM8dNdrzatKRnvHivRakX4xbIITfVSWJXn7moJT8sVniEPWPqJg6C6ss12vhl_6G7QNIiwwxqUYycPNdUQQNfcODYoc49Gj8oqkayTXikC6a6hIw%3D%3D)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc9c7ab35eb540cfbc4f3fc0740a2e0b&_e=clrXCLQaDYnYHGXPHUTqxKumLIAekNgjgwbUxORx4UJrbEiIs6jjtrdFDMqm4s9rouCEtekHqsGlg95Nd1kn9-YailMkI6cHPI7GvXRS59iYMpgeqvgOJ9_jeE0_Fx5amv0g-_4WdgJ70gnCA8P_2WsNssT1PvGJfogbHhWPc_M6VGw40acMaNJjV499PbvTKdZerahzgoCo72Yy5Foy0Nbx4xjwQ7wkh0mfoC4Xz4JOGYurcx38kFmsjHcM1b5_SF_1JtwIUkSQkVeIxiywKmyM4LHaLfTk4EDaL0mnzRoa5NQG5vmuA733zntyXzm17czvI2gCQ13y76Z5vaQ6rnQjyJoVeFw12OxhKRYGt3IlLZIbjkgotCdhrylhbPTX6Le0254sQG6vjn9vcS9WKGUohF6xiwMMep0XF8B-G9d5FoKJ7hFkbgyD8XVhSu1tE9T_jPtDzvj6ILH6SNPT8Q%3D%3D)

My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking "How long will it be before I burn to death?" But despite our enemy's best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn 't be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I've ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That's why every day since I nearly lost my life, I've dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I 'm telling you all this because I'm hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc9c7ab35eb540cfbc4f3fc0740a2e0b&_e=clrXCLQaDYnYHGXPHUTqxKumLIAekNgjgwbUxORx4UJrbEiIs6jjtrdFDMqm4s9rouCEtekHqsGlg95Nd1kn9-YailMkI6cHPI7GvXRS59iYMpgeqvgOJ9_jeE0_Fx5amv0g-_4WdgJ70gnCA8P_2WsNssT1PvGJfogbHhWPc_M6VGw40acMaNJjV499PbvTKdZerahzgoCo72Yy5Foy0Nbx4xjwQ7wkh0mfoC4Xz4JOGYurcx38kFmsjHcM1b5_SF_1JtwIUkSQkVeIxiywKmyM4LHaLfTk4EDaL0mnzRorZIWxRSfSmiAvIsEQJ4ZO7JnYstc6tHjFJEm-2WpdGje13lGQJQizMgBMAI-ctWuSLnlsbS-BDJclbFBYzzcLBzSi48Ou8E-jhqFeNhx-ZRxC0gTCwMg5biJv4eAQW48uanK8m24kD17cuIhVhE8XEGwcadI9XXvAD4xRR6xGmQ%3D%3D) -- but I don't want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc9c7ab35eb540cfbc4f3fc0740a2e0b&_e=clrXCLQaDYnYHGXPHUTqxKumLIAekNgjgwbUxORx4UJrbEiIs6jjtrdFDMqm4s9rouCEtekHqsGlg95Nd1kn9-YailMkI6cHPI7GvXRS59iYMpgeqvgOJ9_jeE0_Fx5amv0g-_4WdgJ70gnCA8P_2WsNssT1PvGJfogbHhWPc_M6VGw40acMaNJjV499PbvTKdZerahzgoCo72Yy5Foy0Nbx4xjwQ7wkh0mfoC4Xz4JOGYurcx38kFmsjHcM1b5_SF_1JtwIUkSQkVeIxiywKmyM4LHaLfTk4EDaL0mnzRqAaf64zs_pWGf0ua3Orq-r2a2FMUwvlBPOP_b2Ntejl7sItJ7dmjiA7lbRKC031qdGa1_o9FCxX4gFLnCVuToxayxVVYAGpkNTjUwrMMgmm3FvUVKWsrHUeEvUJRroNVWd2Y60FxDN8MRTiY5WCqS25uugQsdnw0vFzh2JJvXlqA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there's NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that's worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc9c7ab35eb540cfbc4f3fc0740a2e0b&_e=clrXCLQaDYnYHGXPHUTqxKumLIAekNgjgwbUxORx4UJrbEiIs6jjtrdFDMqm4s9rouCEtekHqsGlg95Nd1kn9-YailMkI6cHPI7GvXRS59iYMpgeqvgOJ9_jeE0_Fx5amv0g-_4WdgJ70gnCA8P_2WsNssT1PvGJfogbHhWPc_M6VGw40acMaNJjV499PbvTKdZerahzgoCo72Yy5Foy0Nbx4xjwQ7wkh0mfoC4Xz4JOGYurcx38kFmsjHcM1b5_SF_1JtwIUkSQkVeIxiywKmyM4LHaLfTk4EDaL0mnzRrj9g9-rymBL7argvpMO3g_t_RkoaxQTKzQQNKmgrOBLx2ShRpCT0DhrFZkIyxJL3vIv6vplNcOxLe6ZyLdX3C6iMllr6_-3p0kLkhlJWLGjrfd1G2IP4v14m4rNFSrGdq2c3LoITFNCq6I6UCYmH0ZiZb2LPWoBm0ZI6Mmz47SfA%3D%3D) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc9c7ab35eb540cfbc4f3fc0740a2e0b&_e=clrXCLQaDYnYHGXPHUTqxKumLIAekNgjgwbUxORx4UJrbEiIs6jjtrdFDMqm4s9rouCEtekHqsGlg95Nd1kn9-YailMkI6cHPI7GvXRS59iYMpgeqvgOJ9_jeE0_Fx5amv0g-_4WdgJ70gnCA8P_2WsNssT1PvGJfogbHhWPc_M6VGw40acMaNJjV499PbvTKdZerahzgoCo72Yy5Foy0Nbx4xjwQ7wkh0mfoC4Xz4JOGYurcx38kFmsjHcM1b5_SF_1JtwIUkSQkVeIxiywKmyM4LHaLfTk4EDaL0mnzRpyiVWvs-Y0swTA8YdgYxh1NsLogoItHyi_z9dzlNxBkGegf73Z2h1H6FWPUZZr6eSykanz1tjTxeir2SiPScJjrDSqoV1sonLrcq89eNpQuTcuEEIQ2BMkW7XxUW7UXZlzSm3dYg-D9g_7MWxL19-C0ocAJ1YzMn9Xp-9tmhUWQA%3D%3D) Duty First,

body:
The Mississippi State Legislature has made a VERY anti-democratic move >> | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66261909/415853929/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmQyZjU3ZC01NzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6WGmf2FTJd1dcfhqh6NRZ9GZCAQK0UUC5IfEVZu-YA=&emci=477ef8ab-4a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8fd2f57d-571f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team — **For 2 years in a row now,** the Mississippi state house has _refused_ to reinstate the use of voter-driven ballot measures — a punitive move after voters had passed a marijuana legalization measure in 2020. Now, 72% of Mississippi voters want to see their ballot measure process reinstated, but conservative extremists in the state won’t let up because voters continue to use ballot measures to pass the lifechanging progressive policies voters want and need. **Not only is this a HUGE attack on democracy, _but this move is in direct opposition to the will of Mississippi voters!!_** _So, team, we want to know if you agree with the majority of Mississippians: _ **Do you think Mississippi’s ballot measure process should be restored?** [YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66261910/415853930/1272919108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmQyZjU3ZC01NzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6WGmf2FTJd1dcfhqh6NRZ9GZCAQK0UUC5IfEVZu-YA=&emci=477ef8ab-4a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8fd2f57d-571f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [NO →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66261911/415853931/1272919108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmQyZjU3ZC01NzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6WGmf2FTJd1dcfhqh6NRZ9GZCAQK0UUC5IfEVZu-YA=&emci=477ef8ab-4a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8fd2f57d-571f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=561582)
Our team at the Fairness Project, alongside local advocacy groups, has been calling for state politicians to restore the fundamental right of direct democracy to Mississippi voters. But friend, we want to know where you stand on this issue: **Do you think the Mississippi State Legislature's move to continue their ban on ballot measures is undemocratic? ** [YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66261912/415853932/1272919108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmQyZjU3ZC01NzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6WGmf2FTJd1dcfhqh6NRZ9GZCAQK0UUC5IfEVZu-YA=&emci=477ef8ab-4a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8fd2f57d-571f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [NO →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66261913/415853933/1272919108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmQyZjU3ZC01NzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6WGmf2FTJd1dcfhqh6NRZ9GZCAQK0UUC5IfEVZu-YA=&emci=477ef8ab-4a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8fd2f57d-571f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Thanks, team! — Fairness Project

clean_body: The Mississippi State Legislature has made a VERY anti-democratic move >> | | Team — For 2 years in a row now, the Mississippi state house has refused to reinstate the use of voter-driven ballot measures — a punitive move after voters had passed a marijuana legalization measure in 2020. Now, 72% of Mississippi voters want to see their ballot measure process reinstated, but conservative extremists in the state won’t let up because voters continue to use ballot measures to pass the lifechanging progressive policies voters want and need. Not only is this a HUGE attack on democracy, but this move is in direct opposition to the will of Mississippi voters!! So, team, we want to know if you agree with the majority of Mississippians: Do you think Mississippi’s ballot measure process should be restored? Our team at the Fairness Project, alongside local advocacy groups, has been calling for state politicians to restore the fundamental right of direct democracy to Mississippi voters. But friend, we want to know where you stand on this issue: Do you think the Mississippi State Legislature's move to continue their ban on ballot measures is undemocratic? Thanks, team! — Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. name: Team Greta
subject: Greta is the Attorney General we need in Mississippi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Mississippians deserve state leaders who advocate for them, and that’s exactly what Greta will do as AG

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262013/415854359/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230710SCOTUS_B_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFiZGZlY2UtNTcxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SKn5JlqUiUoexY-mj9Fbe30SMTxGc1HYuasn_pME8Nw=) Peter, the U.S. Supreme Court's recent decision to turn away a case challenging racist voting laws demonstrates how much we need leaders dedicated to standing up for Mississippians. That’s exactly why we’re standing with Greta in her campaign to become our state’s next Attorney General.

[This is a longer email, so if you’re already with us will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can before reading on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262014/415854361/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230710SCOTUS_B_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFiZGZlY2UtNTcxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SKn5JlqUiUoexY-mj9Fbe30SMTxGc1HYuasn_pME8Nw=)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262015/415854362/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230710SCOTUS_B_b1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFiZGZlY2UtNTcxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SKn5JlqUiUoexY-mj9Fbe30SMTxGc1HYuasn_pME8Nw=) Peter, the Supreme Court’s choice to turn this case away is yet another blow to our voting rights. By failing to hear a challenge to a Mississippi law that prohibits people convicted of certain crimes from voting, the Court has ensured that Jim Crow-era policies are allowed to live on in our state.

When our rights are threatened, our leaders should step up to fight for us. But as usual, our current Attorney General isn’t just asleep at the wheel, she’s actively causing more harm.

Here at home, our AG is making it even harder for folks to take part in our democracy by enforcing legislation barring individuals from assisting anyone in getting their ballot to the box. Her actions mean that sick, elderly, and disabled Mississippians aren’t able to have their ballots turned in by a caretaker or family member, making it nearly impossible for many to vote at all.

Which is why Greta is suing.

See, Peter, Greta isn’t afraid of stepping up to a fight when it comes to defending the best interests of Mississippians. She’s spent her entire career as a trial lawyer and disability rights advocate going to bat for folks who need a voice in our justice system. As a born and raised Mississippian, Greta experiences the harm our Attorney General has caused firsthand and knows we deserve better. That’s why she’s stepping up to this next fight for the people of our state by running for Attorney General.

Greta’s running to put an end to the status quo by making real changes in the AG’s office. She’s ready to establish a Fair Labor Division to address our state’s absence of a Department of Labor to ensure fair, safe conditions for our workers. She’s committed to helping domestic violence survivors who currently face an overwhelming and confusing set of obstacles with few resources to support them. And she won’t hesitate a moment to take on the rampant and unchecked corruption in our state that has seen money intended for families who need it most given away to billionaires and celebrity athletes with zero consequences.

The bottom line is that Mississippians deserve leaders who advocate for them, and that’s exactly what Greta will do as Attorney General. But this election is only a few months away, Peter, and we need to make sure folks in all 82 counties of Mississippi know how important it is that we elect Greta before then.

clean_body: Mississippians deserve state leaders who advocate for them, and that’s exactly what Greta will do as AG = Peter, the U.S. Supreme Court's recent decision to turn away a case challenging racist voting laws demonstrates how much we need leaders dedicated to standing up for Mississippians. That’s exactly why we’re standing with Greta in her campaign to become our state’s next Attorney General. = = Peter, the Supreme Court’s choice to turn this case away is yet another blow to our voting rights. By failing to hear a challenge to a Mississippi law that prohibits people convicted of certain crimes from voting, the Court has ensured that Jim Crow-era policies are allowed to live on in our state. When our rights are threatened, our leaders should step up to fight for us. But as usual, our current Attorney General isn’t just asleep at the wheel, she’s actively causing more harm. Here at home, our AG is making it even harder for folks to take part in our democracy by enforcing legislation barring individuals from assisting anyone in getting their ballot to the box. Her actions mean that sick, elderly, and disabled Mississippians aren’t able to have their ballots turned in by a caretaker or family member, making it nearly impossible for many to vote at all. Which is why Greta is suing. See, Peter, Greta isn’t afraid of stepping up to a fight when it comes to defending the best interests of Mississippians. She’s spent her entire career as a trial lawyer and disability rights advocate going to bat for folks who need a voice in our justice system. As a born and raised Mississippian, Greta experiences the harm our Attorney General has caused firsthand and knows we deserve better. That’s why she’s stepping up to this next fight for the people of our state by running for Attorney General. Greta’s running to put an end to the status quo by making real changes in the AG’s office. She’s ready to establish a Fair Labor Division to address our state’s absence of a Department of Labor to ensure fair, safe conditions for our workers. She’s committed to helping domestic violence survivors who currently face an overwhelming and confusing set of obstacles with few resources to support them. And she won’t hesitate a moment to take on the rampant and unchecked corruption in our state that has seen money intended for families who need it most given away to billionaires and celebrity athletes with zero consequences. The bottom line is that Mississippians deserve leaders who advocate for them, and that’s exactly what Greta will do as Attorney General. But this election is only a few months away, Peter, and we need to make sure folks in all 82 counties of Mississippi know how important it is that we elect Greta before then. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you for reading until the end and being a part of our team. [**Before I ask you to join this American hero in our fight to retake the Republican Senate Majority, let me tell you a little about Sam.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c8299c23f964d31b98248a6bb27b7c8&_e=4ytu3LmRP1eW4YIDgQrPahqo_GjYsLiwfiWPxLOrT5WJfWh-S3Ja-fZpPZE2T92Tv0pcdlOtCTgkRBB1LGk887DKd4CEfK5C0b0xVM_TEa4E61bFjaim0a3JZ7RbVISisL4zktRs6JOL4yQ_0W20phFY9Tye38hLq23KrqsLZbXENLGCLGQ5Su_KLY2HNggx0Ji26EfNQRlBMInITP-p7GdcRoVJ2VmTAprTWnst9dVZpgHWf07G04-PaEZmA-uMsHUoLlopA1vSpWoROAOJ0WcyTU2Rg4IpR0nCXrGPI9uHuMinqHlaFTl7I0gakHQGWNi1AVBQZM1WhXIM-kGpWUkErbMGaZvnlEa1P5l489XVBxutiewKZYyCdYWE_k6xtcdICgstrwyG06d98UFnebFZ63nUnMIdANCdTE52sNQK9XtLVwMgYWVTjo0Yb1pI)

Hey, Folks. name: Darcy Draeger, Executive Director
subject: Districts for Democracy Weekly Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
A ban by any other name is still a ban

| | Hi all, Over the past few weeks I’ve been listening to many, many discussions about schools and books and bans, and while these are not the only issues facing our BOEs and candidates in 2023, I think it would be helpful to spend a little time exploring the topic. I hope it will be helpful as you consider ways to talk about education issues within your own communities and races. **Is a Restriction the Same as a Ban? (Spoiler: Yes)** Picture a world without books—it’s a sterile landscape devoid of ideas, knowledge, and imagination. Now, imagine a world with books, but access to them is tightly controlled, selectively granted, and fundamentally limited. At first glance, the latter might seem like a less severe scenario; I’d argue it’s just as bad, if not worse. These days the NRCC and GOP presidential candidates ([many of whom attended last week’s Moms for Liberty conference in Philly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262463/415855845/412921129?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230710_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI1MTQyYy01YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YjV9yNt8ip3Y4ovqyo2Han_BE28AMUXKQ_9pVHoASfQ=&emci=614dce53-af1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)), like to claim abortion hasn’t been banned, just “restricted”, or that the question has been “returned to the states”. Their refusal to acknowledge that reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy is now out of reach for millions of Americans is purposely misleading. In state after state, abortion IS banned. And while many politicians like to claim there are still plenty of “exceptions” (rape, incest, life of the mother) to these bans, deliberately confusing language keeps those out of reach too. For example, Mississippi law theoretically allows rape victims access to abortion. But advocates who work with victims say in reality access is almost nonexistent: [Doctors told _Mississippi Today_ they’re not aware of anyone in the state who will provide the procedure for rape victims](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262464/415855846/-1693442856?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230710_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI1MTQyYy01YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YjV9yNt8ip3Y4ovqyo2Han_BE28AMUXKQ_9pVHoASfQ=&emci=614dce53-af1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) because of concerns about potential legal consequences and logistical hurdles. Now we’re seeing the same argument being applied to the carefully orchestrated national campaign to remove books from classrooms and libraries. [Ron DeSantis himself huffs that Florida hasn’t _banned_ any books.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262465/415855848/-842145284?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230710_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI1MTQyYy01YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YjV9yNt8ip3Y4ovqyo2Han_BE28AMUXKQ_9pVHoASfQ=&emci=614dce53-af1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) But that’s not true: During the 2022 school year, 566 books were banned in the state, [according to PEN America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262466/415855849/2083994165?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230710_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI1MTQyYy01YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YjV9yNt8ip3Y4ovqyo2Han_BE28AMUXKQ_9pVHoASfQ=&emci=614dce53-af1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) For reference, [The American Library Association](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262467/415855850/-126060409?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230710_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI1MTQyYy01YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YjV9yNt8ip3Y4ovqyo2Han_BE28AMUXKQ_9pVHoASfQ=&emci=614dce53-af1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1d25142c-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) defines a "ban" as the removal of a book based on a person or group’s objection; a book is effectively banned in school when it’s pulled from a school library, classroom, or cannot be taught. This is happening, right now, all over New Jersey and across the country. But why are these extremists trying to ban books? **Control Over Information** In the digital age, information flows like a river, accessible to anyone with an internet connection. Yet, even within this flood of data, controlling access acts like a dam, obstructing the free flow of knowledge. **When access to books is restricted, power is placed in the hands of a select few who decide what information others are allowed to consume.** These limits allow the gatekeepers to manipulate narrative and shape public discourse. Thus, restricting access to books becomes a tool to control information. **Suppression of Diverse Perspectives** Books are more than just ink on paper; they’re repositories of diverse perspectives, alternative narratives, and marginalized voices. Restricting access to books inevitably stifles the variety of ideas available to readers. **And when certain viewpoints are intentionally limited or excluded, the richness and diversity of thought are compromised.** By narrowing the range of available literature, we deny people the opportunity to challenge existing norms, question the status quo, and foster meaningful dialogue. In this sense, restricting access to books–including textbooks–is tantamount to banning the plethora of ideas that should enrich our intellectual ecosystem. **Impediment to Personal Development** Books are catalysts for personal growth, expanding our horizons and broadening our understanding of the world. By restricting access to books, we hinder individuals' ability to explore diverse topics and engage with new perspectives. We limit students’ intellectual growth, denying them the chance to develop critical thinking skills and empathy through exposure to different cultures, histories, and ideologies. This suppression of personal development ultimately curtails societal progress and hampers our collective ability to adapt to a changing world. **Attack on Intellectual Freedom** The foundation of any democratic society lies in the freedom of expression and the open exchange of ideas. Restricting access to books infringes upon this cherished principle, undermining the very essence of intellectual freedom. Just as banning books is an assault on our rights to seek, receive, and impart information, restricting access chips away at democratic discourse. It perpetuates a culture of intellectual control and poses a significant threat to our fundamental liberties as Americans. We must recognize the importance of unrestricted access to books as an essential pillar of a free and enlightened society. **News You Should Know** Here is a short round-up of active school board and clean_body: A ban by any other name is still a ban | | Hi all, Over the past few weeks I’ve been listening to many, many discussions about schools and books and bans, and while these are not the only issues facing our BOEs and candidates in 2023, I think it would be helpful to spend a little time exploring the topic. I hope it will be helpful as you consider ways to talk about education issues within your own communities and races. Is a Restriction the Same as a Ban? (Spoiler: Yes) Picture a world without books—it’s a sterile landscape devoid of ideas, knowledge, and imagination. Now, imagine a world with books, but access to them is tightly controlled, selectively granted, and fundamentally limited. At first glance, the latter might seem like a less severe scenario; I’d argue it’s just as bad, if not worse. These days the NRCC and GOP presidential candidates (), like to claim abortion hasn’t been banned, just “restricted”, or that the question has been “returned to the states”. Their refusal to acknowledge that reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy is now out of reach for millions of Americans is purposely misleading. In state after state, abortion IS banned. And while many politicians like to claim there are still plenty of “exceptions” (rape, incest, life of the mother) to these bans, deliberately confusing language keeps those out of reach too. For example, Mississippi law theoretically allows rape victims access to abortion. But advocates who work with victims say in reality access is almost nonexistent: because of concerns about potential legal consequences and logistical hurdles. Now we’re seeing the same argument being applied to the carefully orchestrated national campaign to remove books from classrooms and libraries. But that’s not true: During the 2022 school year, 566 books were banned in the state, For reference, defines a "ban" as the removal of a book based on a person or group’s objection; a book is effectively banned in school when it’s pulled from a school library, classroom, or cannot be taught. This is happening, right now, all over New Jersey and across the country. But why are these extremists trying to ban books? Control Over Information In the digital age, information flows like a river, accessible to anyone with an internet connection. Yet, even within this flood of data, controlling access acts like a dam, obstructing the free flow of knowledge. When access to books is restricted, power is placed in the hands of a select few who decide what information others are allowed to consume. These limits allow the gatekeepers to manipulate narrative and shape public discourse. Thus, restricting access to books becomes a tool to control information. Suppression of Diverse Perspectives Books are more than just ink on paper; they’re repositories of diverse perspectives, alternative narratives, and marginalized voices. Restricting access to books inevitably stifles the variety of ideas available to readers. And when certain viewpoints are intentionally limited or excluded, the richness and diversity of thought are compromised. By narrowing the range of available literature, we deny people the opportunity to challenge existing norms, question the status quo, and foster meaningful dialogue. In this sense, restricting access to books–including textbooks–is tantamount to banning the plethora of ideas that should enrich our intellectual ecosystem. Impediment to Personal Development Books are catalysts for personal growth, expanding our horizons and broadening our understanding of the world. By restricting access to books, we hinder individuals' ability to explore diverse topics and engage with new perspectives. We limit students’ intellectual growth, denying them the chance to develop critical thinking skills and empathy through exposure to different cultures, histories, and ideologies. This suppression of personal development ultimately curtails societal progress and hampers our collective ability to adapt to a changing world. Attack on Intellectual Freedom The foundation of any democratic society lies in the freedom of expression and the open exchange of ideas. Restricting access to books infringes upon this cherished principle, undermining the very essence of intellectual freedom. Just as banning books is an assault on our rights to seek, receive, and impart information, restricting access chips away at democratic discourse. It perpetuates a culture of intellectual control and poses a significant threat to our fundamental liberties as Americans. We must recognize the importance of unrestricted access to books as an essential pillar of a free and enlightened society. News You Should Know Here is a short round-up of active school board and education issues: How Can You Help? We still need great candidates to come forward and run for school board in districts across the state. Petitions are due July 31 , so the window is starting to close on making this decision. Many districts do not have enough candidates. One way you can help in this recruitment effort by supporting Action Together New Jersey BoardBOOST, its non-partisan school board project that is working to help find and support “sane and decent” BOE candidates. Fill in this referral sheet if you are interested in running for BOE yourself, and put down Districts for Democracy as the one referring you: Find local candidates in your school district to run and refer them to ATNJ: (Put your name down as the person referring.) Let potential candidates know about ATNJ’s program easily by emailing this link to explain the work and all they’re doing this year to help. Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation. Sincerely, Darcy Executive Director Districts for Democracy | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: A new GOP Super PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s already raised over $1 MILLION to prop up Hawley’s campaign — so we’ve got to be prepared to fight back.
#
We just got some bad news, Peter.
A brand new GOP Super PAC just filed its first report with the Federal Election Commission — **showing that it has raised over $1 MILLION to attack Lucas Kunce and prop up Josh Hawley’s tanking approval numbers.**
**[FIGHT BACK: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34867?refcode=em20230710-3384&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3384%2E614464%2Evr1pxV)**
The GOP knows Lucas poses a real threat to their grip on Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. That’s why, since the day Lucas launched this campaign, they’ve done everything in their power to tear him down + make Josh Hawley look strong.
**FIRST:** Insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee targeted Lucas with one of their very first attack ads of the cycle — and kept those attacks going in the press for months, with no sign of stopping.
**THEN:** That same group used their joint fundraising committee with Hawley to funnel $250,000 directly into his campaign. This was one of the biggest investments the GOP has made into any Senate campaign so far this year.
**AND NOW:** Billionaire mega-donors + corporate elites are propping up Hawley’s campaign by dumping money into this new Super PAC.
This is our shot to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for everyday, working people. But it’ll only be possible if we continue to raise the resources we need to fight back against these GOP insiders and reach every Missouri voter with Lucas’ message between now and Election Day. **So Peter:**

clean_body: It’s already raised over $1 MILLION to prop up Hawley’s campaign — so we’ve got to be prepared to fight back. We just got some bad news, Peter. A brand new GOP Super PAC just filed its first report with the Federal Election Commission — showing that it has raised over $1 MILLION to attack Lucas Kunce and prop up Josh Hawley’s tanking approval numbers. The GOP knows Lucas poses a real threat to their grip on Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. That’s why, since the day Lucas launched this campaign, they’ve done everything in their power to tear him down + make Josh Hawley look strong. FIRST: Insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee targeted Lucas with one of their very first attack ads of the cycle — and kept those attacks going in the press for months, with no sign of stopping. THEN: That same group used their joint fundraising committee with Hawley to funnel $250,000 directly into his campaign. This was one of the biggest investments the GOP has made into any Senate campaign so far this year. AND NOW: Billionaire mega-donors + corporate elites are propping up Hawley’s campaign by dumping money into this new Super PAC. This is our shot to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for everyday, working people. But it’ll only be possible if we continue to raise the resources we need to fight back against these GOP insiders and reach every Missouri voter with Lucas’ message between now and Election Day. So Peter: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We have a real chance to take back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year. Thanks for helping us get it done, Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

body:
The latest poll of the 2024 campaign shows me neck-and-neck with Lauren Boebert.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262636/415856399/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTQ3ZmQ5ZC01YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMcvSoir5r1iZyGAFMdud5VGfqAMEmk4JuMRSYGO0_w=&emci=1cb4af78-591f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ee47fd9d-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262637/415856400/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTQ3ZmQ5ZC01YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMcvSoir5r1iZyGAFMdud5VGfqAMEmk4JuMRSYGO0_w=&emci=1cb4af78-591f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ee47fd9d-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello – I’m emailing to ask you for $5 to help me defeat Lauren Boebert.
Here’s why: **The latest poll of the 2024 campaign shows me neck-and-neck with Lauren Boebert. I’m TIED with Boebert 45% - 45%.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66262638/415856401/1610638071?refcode=em20230710pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ee47fd9d-5a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTQ3ZmQ5ZC01YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMcvSoir5r1iZyGAFMdud5VGfqAMEmk4JuMRSYGO0_w=)
In 2022, our race was the closest in the entire country. After a recount, I came just 546 short of sending Boebert packing. That’s why I’m asking for a $5 donation from you now.
I know $5 might not sound like much, but that’s how we’ve been building momentum and how we made Lauren Boebert the most vulnerable Republican incumbent.
But with this new poll now showing Boebert still as vulnerable as she was in 2022, her Super PACs are going to stop at nothing to prevent us from winning. That’s why I need you to give now if I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.
**My campaign has set a goal to raise another $200,000 before our critical mid-July fundraising deadline, but right now, we’re still very short. And with Boebert and her Washington allies already attacking me, we cannot afford to fall even one dollar short.**
Since you started reading this email, two other people will have already donated their $5 to help me win, but I’m counting on you to chip in now too.
[**Please, this cannot wait. Will you chip in $5 or more right now – our average July donation is $31 – before this critical fundraising deadline to help me defeat Lauren Boebert? clean_body: The latest poll of the 2024 campaign shows me neck-and-neck with Lauren Boebert. Hello – I’m emailing to ask you for $5 to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Here’s why: The latest poll of the 2024 campaign shows me neck-and-neck with Lauren Boebert. I’m TIED with Boebert 45% - 45%. = In 2022, our race was the closest in the entire country. After a recount, I came just 546 short of sending Boebert packing. That’s why I’m asking for a $5 donation from you now. I know $5 might not sound like much, but that’s how we’ve been building momentum and how we made Lauren Boebert the most vulnerable Republican incumbent. But with this new poll now showing Boebert still as vulnerable as she was in 2022, her Super PACs are going to stop at nothing to prevent us from winning. That’s why I need you to give now if I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024. My campaign has set a goal to raise another $200,000 before our critical mid-July fundraising deadline, but right now, we’re still very short. And with Boebert and her Washington allies already attacking me, we cannot afford to fall even one dollar short. Since you started reading this email, two other people will have already donated their $5 to help me win, but I’m counting on you to chip in now too. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = When we defeat Lauren Boebert and win this race next November, it’ll be because of grassroots donors like you who chipped in today. Thank you so much for your support. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. subject: urgent: My new GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I needed to reach out directly: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.

I needed to reach out directly, friend:**GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.**
Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his _rubber stamp_ in the Senate, voting for anything **including a national abortion ban.** I’m fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can’t do it alone. [**Will you chip in $3 or more now to split between my campaign and Alex Padilla’s to help me keep Nevada blue?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-july23-rosen.UeNIpF&refcode=em230710-1-30&t=1&akid=1416%2E159979%2ESY4RB5)
With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, McConnell and his GOP allies are coming after me as a top target. Now, _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – **and a recent poll shows me 2 points down.**
This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far, friend.**
**I simply cannot compete with the GOP’s massive war chest unless supporters like you chip in. In a race this close, every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing – so please, I’m humbly asking:**
[**Will you chip in $3, $6 or as much as you can spare to split between my campaign and Alex Padilla’s? I’m counting on your urgent support to keep Nevada and the Senate blue.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-july23-rosen.UeNIpF&refcode=em230710-1-30&t=2&akid=1416%2E159979%2ESY4RB5)
