Environmentally-Friendly Criminals Renting Divvy Bikes to Go on a Crime Spree in Chicago, Stealing Victims' Belongings, and in One Case, a Vehicle, According to Police (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/environmentally-friendly-criminals-renting-divvy-bikes-to-go-on-a-crime-spree-in-chicago-stealing-victims-belongings-and-in-one-case-a-vehicle-according-to-chicago-police.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/environmentally-friendly-criminals-renting-divvy-bikes-to-go-on-a-crime-spree-in-chicago-stealing-victims-belongings-and-in-one-case-a-vehicle-according-to-chicago-police.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Ashlee Rezin/Sun-Times)

In the span of just a few days, more than a dozen victims in Chicago reported criminals stealing their belongings – and in once case, a vehicle, while riding on Divvy bikes, according to the Chicago Police Department.

The environmentally-friendly criminals are using the affordable bike-sharing system, which allows riders to rent bicycles for as low as $.17 cents per mile, as their main mode of transportation as they engage in a crime spree that’s spanning the downtown area in recent days.

A Divvy day pass is $16 dollars per day, while a monthly membership will set you back $11 dollars.

On its
website (https://divvybikes.com/how-it-works?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Divvy encourages their riders to wear a helmet; obey traffic laws; and to use the designated bike lanes, when traveling.

The first reports of the bicycle-riding criminals occurred on June 19th. Days later, a total of 14 cases were reported – leaving locals and tourists fearing for their safety.

The police department believes that four criminals ranging in ages 15-25, are responsible for the recent crime spree that’s terrorizing people downtown late at night.

The robberies are happening between 1:00 am and 6:00 am, and victims report that suspects are wearing hoodies, dark jeans and ski masks.

So far, none of the suspects have been caught.

DeSantis Campaign Advisor: "Donald Trump is the Runaway Frontrunner," as Fl. Gov. Struggles to Gain Traction on the Campaign Trail (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/desantis-campaign-advisor-donald-trump-is-the-runaway-frontrunner-as-fl-gov-struggles-to-gain-traction-on-the-campaign-trail.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/desantis-campaign-advisor-donald-trump-is-the-runaway-frontrunner-as-fl-gov-struggles-to-gain-traction-on-the-campaign-trail.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Gov. Ron DeSantis and his family stand in the pouring rain on July 4, 2023 after an Independence Day parade in New Hampshire. (Source: Reuters/Daily Mail)

Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis is proving to be a better governor than a presidential candidate as his campaign continues to struggle during a pivotal moment in the primary season, as President Donald Trump continues to rise in the polls – leaving his fellow Florida resident and closest opponent trailing the former president by 38 points according to the most recent CBS News (https://www.cbsnews.com/news/cbs-news-poll-most-see-security-risk-after-trump-indictment/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) poll.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/desantis-campaign-advisor-donald-trump-is-the-runaway-frontrunner-as-fl-gov-struggles-to-gain-traction-on-the-campaign-trail.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A recent CBS News poll has President Trump leading Gov. Ron DeSantis by 38 points. (Source: CBS News)

To make matters worse, on Sunday evening during a Twitter Spaces event, DeSantis campaign spokesman Steve Cortes offered a shockingly honest assessment, saying,

“Look right now in national polling, we are way behind. I’ll be the first to admit that. I believe in being really blunt and really honest. It’s an uphill battle, I don’t think is an unwinnable battle, but clearly, Donald Trump is the runaway front-runner, particularly since the indictments.”

And Cortes is right, since the indictments, President Trump has only risen in the polls and cemented the support from his base – and the data proves why.

According to the CBS News poll, 76 percent of likely GOP primary voters believe that the indictments are politically motivated; and 61 percent reported that the recent charges won’t change their view of the former president.

DeSantis has faced many awkward moments early in his young campaign – the first being the launch of his campaign on Twitter this past May. Unfortunately for DeSantis and his supporters, the announcement was plagued (https://apnews.com/article/ron-desantis-2024-presidential-election-live-updates-0495d567326db1e760179d01f1f7c45e?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) by glitches and audio issues, making it difficult for people to hear the Florida governor’s big announcement.

DeSantis was widely mocked and the announcement created an embarrassing moment for DeSantis and his campaign team – a nightmare scenario for any political candidate.

In late May, DeSantis was mocked for what many referred to as a “terrifying laugh,” which caught social media by storm.
(Source: Reuters/Daily Mail)

And on July 4th, DeSantis and his wife marched in an Independence Day parade in the pouring rain – a public relations nightmare for any campaign – as the presidential candidate and his wife were left to stand in front of a bank of cameras, soaked from the torrential downpour.

In the last three months, DeSantis has made two trips to Illinois – the first being a “law and order” speech in Elmhurst back in February – and during his second visit last month, DeSantis was the keynote speaker at an event co-hosted by the Tazewell and Peoria County Republican organizations, where he spoke about how “woke” policies are destroying our country.

But with political tensions rising between the DeSantis and Trump campaigns – some
Illinois Republican Party (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/il-gop-leaders-join-billionaire-ken-griffin-in-supporting-gov-ron-desantis-presidential-campaign-including-jeanne-ives-and-richard-porter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) officials are already lined up behind the popular Florida governor, including Republican national committeeman Richard Porter and former gubernatorial candidate and state central committee member Jeanne Ives.

During an interview in Crain’s Chicago Business (https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.chicagobusiness.com/greg-hinz-politics/illinois-republicans-2024-presidential-candidates&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1688670584985035&usg=AOvVaw38JjWWpnfQZGnnjRW4nlW0&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce2b244dd7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_10_07_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce2b244dd7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on May 30th, Ives said and tweeted, “I’m a DeSantis fan...I like a strong governor with a proven record of accomplishments...Florida has, what, a $21 billion budget surplus...”

The presidential primary will take place next Spring, and the 2024 Republican National Convention will be held from July 15-18 in Milwaukee, Wisconsin.

clean_body: Chicago's crime woes take a new turn as environmentally-friendly criminals use Divvy bikes. Meanwhile, Ron DeSantis' campaign continues to implode.

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e31f75c96c6d49c5a35dbb6804c586df&_e=0BPGWwclUQEzxDHUGh0CurScI1GhD-v18BPatodhR8LBh2JIxbjSLu-B_WEQlk-xkvwpGfzi1Hj7lchtoDdYBrfef3hGZ7yflUWPPpTKDBIUKBq_Ir0tyadN-6_CDuGEauxUPovvPB8o24_VsHFkxsxn259js2mkme4g7ZCh_eKBFJEGf1LodJCUhH3q2hs9FUVUJ5wsmXzYX4dmOQnaRnasmamJL-3rsaS0JYZdnOm9P-Z4EALm5HCxVHXmYNUqkvQ8UD8p2EkiezK7emk5s0plvRtI-ttbSZjrWrYrVMr5Zy0rQnK8F4NMocyzdRifbqnupFThGgEoNeZG6JTRarpPUA5JVTklvMq1W5PEcTes5-Dj2y8qfOTmFUQsyHfIsp-NEhxsUokkBeAuztzm2aeoUsKten0Ps5kSfiJnZRc%3D)

[**FOR GOD AND COUNTRY
CHIP IN TODAY
**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e31f75c96c6d49c5a35dbb6804c586df&_e=0BPGWwclUQEzxDHUGh0CurScI1GhD-v18BPatodhR8LBh2JIxbjSLu-B_WEQlk-xkvwpGfzi1Hj7lchtoDdYBrfef3hGZ7yflUWPPpTKDBIUKBq_Ir0tyadN-6_CDuGEauxUPovvPB8o24_VsHFkxsxn259js2mkme4g7ZCh_eKBFJEGf1LodJCUhH3q2hs9FUVUJ5wsmXzYX4dmOQnaRnasmamJL-3rsaS0JYZdnOm9P-Z4EALm5HCxVHXmYNUqkvQ8UD8p2EkiezK7emk5s7BAOjBsUutMOviy5w3Qkd2uwqXydX-59tPsnnQhOds7n19y5RZS0umqtK8xcVm95hSQrLMkrmhDbSaKzF-OiPxbf-GYhmkrJ-SbkMGkSeHHmpbAMyrGGUi7oS18PG4Uv3BjNiOhtNFp2XIVxqam65s%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e31f75c96c6d49c5a35dbb6804c586df&_e=0BPGWwclUQEzxDHUGh0CurScI1GhD-v18BPatodhR8LBh2JIxbjSLu-B_WEQlk-xkvwpGfzi1Hj7lchtoDdYBrfef3hGZ7yflUWPPpTKDBIUKBq_Ir0tyadN-6_CDuGEauxUPovvPB8o24_VsHFkxsxn259js2mkme4g7ZCh_eKBFJEGf1LodJCUhH3q2hs9FUVUJ5wsmXzYX4dmOQnaRnasmamJL-3rsaS0JYZdnOm9P-Z4EALm5HCxVHXmYNUqkvQ8UD8p2EkiezK7emk5s_gFOkDfqGekmcOYI2DYu6txmEP5StOPCuuNsW6HW4jOJzXncvWfLzy3e48YJcdHUnjHQE_ZJLTNL6GQRoFka0Lsq5Nn49IHh0DI1KUTfsusfgAVbP1DfKpZkEEQTZtRTVinQXcPzbCXip8-1ANuzGo%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual.

Hooyah,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e31f75c96c6d49c5a35dbb6804c586df&_e=0BPGWwclUQEzxDHUGh0CurScI1GhD-v18BPatodhR8LBh2JIxbjSLu-B_WEQlk-xkvwpGfzi1Hj7lchtoDdYBrfef3hGZ7yflUWPPpTKDBIUKBq_Ir0tyadN-6_CDuGEauxUPovvPB8o24_VsHFkxsxn259js2mkme4g7ZCh_eKBFJEGf1LodJCUhH3q2hs9FUVUJ5wsmXzYX4dmOQnaRnasmamJL-3rsaS0JYZdnOm9P-Z4EALm5HCxVHXmYNUqkvQ8UD8p2EkiezK7emk5s3HHbPKcIPaRnVfOUfZRJG9hk6tIkr-8_YcqGx2hYl2muR42BdO-u3BG0Nz8JF49qDb5If-QN1x8CrLizIY0CmNzwogcWw7CMFfFoSr1n0ZjvnE-yrZ0P7Kox3vINhZqPNEvfunk1qeo5n_mccN90xs%3D)

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e31f75c96c6d49c5a35dbb6804c586df&_e=0BPGWwclUQEzxDHUGh0CuitwiTD7Y9hMJLDpsN7uKkIctexdONCorr84wtm0xryrxSTj4bqDgbukQ4DFd9b-ePWJ28t7MJQzkPgH7_rkHz6WQ1NXXwS4Nhe0Y2yWKnfOXU8tvG78RTJjs8EJSIuxEJpKYuszqNttwm36IUdmB2q0JntpE_3CUd_ipsWAxSgf1WRr4athIogPgWVztJTaKA%3D%3D) [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e31f75c96c6d49c5a35dbb6804c586df&_e=0BPGWwclUQEzxDHUGh0CurtRLZrGntsguYdTueHEWanTG7t3SYUWNy1ct1aCERxJ65364_eLm_Ge0ZXphL1GEy-0W6u3920BXA8v61i_nIm5lbmRQdVvPxBQVlbprCw-wcpeKpjAxwJmT9wl_mj-4wj4pml71h4gthSQcCgPNK_cFlxvDvqPx9iuO9ns43jBygRRROT2VWu-KplEcJIwoA%3D%3D) [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e31f75c96c6d49c5a35dbb6804c586df&_e=0BPGWwclUQEzxDHUGh0CuiSkvt6PG1H03NciQVlGcJjYn8YaQFUZe1Ohtmkcvd2BrlbtEbU5h-1_io6hES78SIcWyzXzHqMjXuEL8pONMiSXY7TY47tXAlEqMnw9zp9gBr1zDwntC3TQ55WLlBzrcKmcQz6eH23qaiKyNCVP0jQ8VqQV0mThpE5GlrhjHiuz1Ps17unEVDOXvT_2hwujc5pnU9arxPf1WHavANFzht0%3D)

Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America. When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track. It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground. I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual. Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TYBuzR-OJwgiJuIEQYzsJTN0_WpWMONcQWCXqXp8rxA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=134140586)
Presidential campaigns are expensive. That remains an undeniable fact. And what also remains a fact is that fundraising numbers are very easily manipulated and distorted as a way to make a candidate appear stronger than they actually are, and to move money around in an effort to conceal money trails.
As the 2024 GOP Presidential Primary continues to heat up, both Donal Trump and Ron DeSantis are competing for fundraising dollars from a limited pool of GOP donors.
When Ron DeSantis ran for Re-election as Governor of Florida in 2022, he raised a substantial amount of money. During his 2022 reelection campaign, DeSantis was able [to raise more funds than any gubernatorial candidate in history](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1389cf10-fcb3-4a39-b87c-4545d6b1ec5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), breaking Gubernatorial fundraising records with a haul of nearly $200 Million.
However, DeSantis only spent about $105 million dollars on his 2022 re-election, which left him with an additional $95 million to "sit on". It was always very apparent when DeSantis was running for re-election that he didn't need $200 million for his campaign, which led many to speculate that he was saving the surplus of campaign cash for a 2024 Presidential run.
There is no denying that Ron DeSantis is only Governor of Florida thanks to President Trump endorsing his nearly failed campaign against Democrat darling Andrew Gillum in 2018. DeSantis himself has acknowledged that he wouldn't be Governor today if it wasn't for Donald Trump's endorsement, as it was Trump supporters who pulled DeSantis across the finish line in both 2018 and 2022. Thus, it is no surprise that majority of the $200 Million in campaign funds that DeSantis and his team raised ahead of November 2022 came from MAGA supporters who were deceived and falsely led to believe that Ron DeSantis needed their money so that he could be Governor of Florida for another four years. However, it is now obvious that DeSantis never intended to serve all four years of his term, and that he was raising more money than he actually needed to win re-election so that he could launch a Presidential campaign and still receive taxpayer money via his salary as Governor of Florida.
Since November 2022, DeSantis has urged state legislators in Florida, as well as officials within that Florida GOP to [change Florida election laws and guidelines](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4e0b9e0f-48cd-4bd7-8ff8-bacfc5af9e3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including Florida's Resign To Run law and the [Florida Political Committee handbook](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a9346923-ebf6-44fd-ae93-1091d4bbfcb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which is issued by the Florida Department of State.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TYBuzR-OJwgiJuIEQYzsJTN0_WpWMONcQWCXqXp8rxA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=134140586)
In May 2023, DeSantis urged the Florida Department of State to change the section that pertains to how campaign funds can be used and transferred between different entities. It is worth noting that the Florida Department of State is overseen by Secretary of State Cord Byrd, who was appointed by Governor Ron DeSantis as Florida's 37th Secretary of State on [May 13, 2022](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/54d68d8e-3e49-4714-b249-3352797f3772?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), nearly one year prior to DeSantis asking Byrd to change the laws so that DeSantis could transfer millions of dollars from his Gubernatorial PAC to a Presidential PAC. The primary duty of the Secretary of State of Florida is to oversee that state's elections and election integrity.
However, it is unclear how it is "ethical" or "election integrity" for the Governor of Florida and his hand picked Secretary of State to be changing Florida election and campaign finance laws in an effort to give more centralized power over Florida's election process to Ron DeSantis, who is not only Governor of Florida, but will also likely be on the ballot in March 2024 for the Florida GOP Presidential Primary.
DeSantis and Byrd's altering of the [Florida Political Committee handbook](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a9346923-ebf6-44fd-ae93-1091d4bbfcb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is significant, as it covers the specific kind of transferring of funds that DeSantis's allies are depending on for the sake of financially supporting his presidential campaign. The rule changes by DeSantis and Byrd has already prompted The Campaign Legal Center, a watchdog group, to file an official complaint with the Federal Election Commission regarding the legality of nearly $83 million of donations being transferred from DeSantis's state PAC to his Presidential PAC for the sake of attacking President Trump' 2024 campaign.
> **" The complaint alleges that Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has violated federal campaign finance laws by directing or transferring over $80 million from his state PAC, "Friends of Ron DeSantis," to the super PAC Never Back Down."**
[In an official press release, The Campaign Legal Center said, ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3daf7be1-fed9-4253-b0ce-71956a4f783c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
> ** "Friends of Ron DeSantis, a state PAC based in Florida that DeSantis established in 2018, and used to raise over $225 million through May 2023, has reportedly directed or transferred over $80 million to Never Back Down, a federal super PAC reportedly organized to serve as the primary spending vehicle in support of the Florida governor's presidential campaign. Never Back Down has already spent over $944,000 to promote his presidential candidacy. The Federal Election Campaign Act (FECA) has, for over 20 years, prohibited federal candidates like DeSantis from spending "soft money" in connection with a federal election because such funds are not subject to federal campaign finance laws that prevent corruption and require transparency in our elections.**
> **As the complaint explains, DeSantis became a candidate well before his public announcement on May 24, 2023, and was therefore bound by the FECA provisions prohibiting candidates and the entities they establish, finance, maintain, or control from spending soft money in connection with federal elections. As a result, Friends of Ron DeSantis -- recently renamed "Empower Parents PAC" as part of a clear effort to distance the group from DeSantis -- brazenly violated the law when it transferred this colossal sum to a federal super PAC.**
> **The FEC is responsible for enforcing federal campaign finance laws and should investigate whether Governor DeSantis and the Friends of Ron DeSantis state PAC violated the law by making this transfer. "**
Previous versions of the Florida handbook stated, _" A Florida political committee must use its funds solely for Florida political activities_." The version for the 2024 cycle, which was modified by Florida Secretary of State Byrd at DeSantis's request, has been changed to say, "_A Florida political committee may make contributions to an out-of-state political entity that engages solely in non-coordinated expenditures_." This update was published in March 2023, the same exact month the Never Back Down PAC was created for the sake of getting Ron DeSantis elected as President, and just two months before Ron DeSantis officially filed paperwork with the FEC on May 24, 2023 to launch his 2024 presidential bid.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9e9b9e94-1014-4373-9500-1bf97b4b7924?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a5666e12-e9d1-4691-8371-ae174b879620?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Since the updated guidelines to the [Florida Political Committee handbook](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a9346923-ebf6-44fd-ae93-1091d4bbfcb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) were released, and the same month he filed to run for President, Ron DeSantis transferred roughly $83 dollars from his state based Political Action Committee to the Never Back Down Super PAC. The transfer of funds from DeSantis's previous state PAC to his Presidential PAC equates to roughly 64% of the total $130 million that Never Back Down claimed to have raised ahead of the release of their first FEC filing report on July 1, 2023. However, given the fact that $83 million of the $130 million Never Back Down claimed to have raised was raised prior to November 2022, and was not donated by donors with the intention of being used against Donald Trump in a primary, it is incredibly deceptive for DeSantis's campaign and PAC to claim they raised a collective $150 million since DeSantis launched his Presidential campaign.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TYBuzR-OJwgiJuIEQYzsJTN0_WpWMONcQWCXqXp8rxA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=134140586)
It is fair to assume that many donors who donated to Ron DeSantis's state PAC in 2022 supported DeSantis as Governor, but not as a Presidential candidate against Donald Trump. Making this even shadier, none of those donors ever consented to their donation money being transferred to a SuperPac and used against Donald Trump's 2024 campaign.
As a popular Governor, DeSantis was [routinely viewed](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2c99278c-9d02-48b2-a86a-b368724c382a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by many as a GOP favorite for the 2028 Republican Presidential nomination before he decided to commit political suicide by challenging Donald Trump for the 2024 nomination. Had donors known DeSantis's true intentions, many of his 2020 donors would have withheld their donations had they known their hard earned money would be spent on anti-Trump attack ads.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/73970c91-f7b0-415a-a3af-5775da7a5d33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Political Committees are subject to oversight by the Department of State in Florida. Florida's Secretary of State Cord Byrd is widely viewed as a DeSantis ally and was [appointed by the Governor in May 2022](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/54d68d8e-3e49-4714-b249-3352797f3772?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Byrd's wife, Esther Byrd, was [also appointed](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fadf168a-8c81-4f6a-adff-ee22853feb6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Governor DeSantis in 2022, [and she now sits on the State Board of Education. ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fadf168a-8c81-4f6a-adff-ee22853feb6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Along with using his own appointed Secretary of State to change Florida election laws, it appears that DeSantis and his allies also attempted to cover up their actions and conceal the transfer of funds from the public in an effort to minimize scrutiny for DeSantis. Prior to running for President, DeSantis's State PAC, where the $83 million was originally parked, was previously named "Friends of Ron DeSantis". However, just weeks before he officially declared as a Presidential candidate, "Friends of Ron DeSantis" was given a new name. According to Florida campaign finance records, the PAC's name was changed on May 8, 2023 to the "Empower Parents PAC".
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5e024b66-2ee8-45bd-aa64-3c03add3c4ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Additionally, current GOP state Sen. Blaise Ingoglia, who used to serve as Chairman of the Florida GOP, took over as the Empower Parents PACs chairperson. This was done in an attempt to create the false impression that DeSantis gave the money to a pro-parental rights PAC, when in reality, the name of his already existing PAC was simply changed to a name that didn't have his name in it so FEC records would show a transfer of funds from "Empower Parents PAC" to the Never Back Down PAC. As a result of the name change, "Friends of Ron DeSantis" can no longer be found in the[ Division of Elections website](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a4c5627c-b6f9-4fa0-b3f9-dde49a1e1ef9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b073f469-f3c3-497d-82bb-a9c2016955c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TYBuzR-OJwgiJuIEQYzsJTN0_WpWMONcQWCXqXp8rxA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=134140586)
The PAC, now named Empower Parents PAC, was quickly shuddered upon completion of the transfer of the nearly $83 million in funds to the [pro Desantis Super PAC Never Back Down](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/04299b8c-8364-4abf-b5fa-08e4e5b3512b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). On May 30, 2023, just six days after DeSantis filed to run for President, the "Empower Parents PAC" filed paperwork with the Florida Department of State, and Blaise Ingoglia sent a hand signed letter to the Board of Elections in Florida requesting that the Division of Elections in Florida disband the Empower Parents PAC, which was never created to empower parents, but rather as a vehicle to conceal an unethical transfer of $83 million in political donations from DeSantis's Gubernatorial State PAC to the national, anti-Trump, Never Back Down pro-DeSantis Presidential super PAC, on May 31, 2023, with Ron DeSantis's permission.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a6122794-a6d2-4c69-99ed-20187f0fc577?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/46714fa0-57a7-421e-b2fb-873e5795e451?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is worth noting that FL State Senator Blaise Ingoglia lied to voters, and even publicly attacked me when I exposed him in February of 2023 for working with DeSantis to get the Florida Legislature to change Florida's Resign to Run law. When I reported that he was lying to voters by telling Republicans at the Florida GOP Quarterly meeting in February that the law wasn't going to be changed, Ingoglia said I didn't know what I was talking about, and publicly said he wasn't working against Trump by posting a 7 year old photo with Donald Trump.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e3e4f9fd-aa7a-49eb-97e1-6b5159f69289?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b38513f6-6178-46cb-8bbb-f13850383a03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
However, records seen above that are [publicly available](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cd315a59-c562-4460-886c-d794219b43a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the Florida Division of Elections website is a form of undeniable and indisputable proof that Ingoglia was not only aware of DeSantis's plans to run for President long before he filed, but he actively participated in DeSantis plan to change Florida election laws and campaign finance laws to conceal the transfer of funds to the Never Back Down PAC. It is worth noting that Ingoglia was also DeSantis's key ally in the Florida Senate when it came to changing the Resign to Run law so DeSantis could keep his job as Governor and simultaneously run for President on tax payer dime as an absentee Governor.
In fact, archived [expenditure reports ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9fe38040-53f3-4888-b43c-9390d341ddd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)from "Friends of Ron DeSantis" aka "Empowered Parents PAC" show a plethora of expenses that were made immediately after he won re-election as Governor, which is further evidence that DeSantis always intended to run for President, and never planned on serving a full second term as Governor of Florida.
Along with transferring nearly $83 million to Never Back Down on May 31, just one day after DeSantis's state PAC filed paperwork to disband, another substantial transfer of funds was made from Ron DeSantis's state PAC to another newly founded Florida PAC. The PAC formerly known as "Friends of Ron DeSantis" aka Empower Parents PAC transferred the sum of $1 million to a newly formed PAC called "Empower Parents Florida" , which is different than the similarly named "Empower Parents PAC".
The transfer is indicated on the [last page of the "Empower Parents PAC](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9fe38040-53f3-4888-b43c-9390d341ddd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" expenditure report as one of the last transactions made before the PAC was officially disbanded.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e06f9d20-2d7e-4e59-89ee-8151bc041aed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Records show the "Empower Parents Florida PAC" was formed on May 8[th](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9fe38040-53f3-4888-b43c-9390d341ddd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), 2023, just 16 days before DeSantis filed to run for President, and it is headed by Florida Speaker of the House Paul Renner.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4835ea7c-a29d-4fd0-992f-58f36279cdd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Given that the head of PACS are able to pay themselves a salary, this raises serious ethical questions about whether or not Renner, who eagerly complied with DeSantis's requests to change[ Florida's Resign to Run Law](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2d0c70dc-6d98-4c35-bd11-0b9b580c3cb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), was paid off with a $1 million bribe for getting the law changed so that DeSantis could run for President and keep his job as Governor of Florida. As the 2024 GOP Presidential Primary continues to heat up, both Donal Trump and Ron DeSantis are competing for fundraising dollars from a limited pool of GOP donors. When Ron DeSantis ran for Re-election as Governor of Florida in 2022, he raised a substantial amount of money. During his 2022 reelection campaign, DeSantis was able , breaking Gubernatorial fundraising records with a haul of nearly $200 Million. However, DeSantis only spent about $105 million dollars on his 2022 re-election, which left him with an additional $95 million to "sit on". It was always very apparent when DeSantis was running for re-election that he didn't need $200 million for his campaign, which led many to speculate that he was saving the surplus of campaign cash for a 2024 Presidential run. There is no denying that Ron DeSantis is only Governor of Florida thanks to President Trump endorsing his nearly failed campaign against Democrat darling Andrew Gillum in 2018. DeSantis himself has acknowledged that he wouldn't be Governor today if it wasn't for Donald Trump's endorsement, as it was Trump supporters who pulled DeSantis across the finish line in both 2018 and 2022. Thus, it is no surprise that majority of the $200 Million in campaign funds that DeSantis and his team raised ahead of November 2022 came from MAGA supporters who were deceived and falsely led to believe that Ron DeSantis needed their money so that he could be Governor of Florida for another four years. However, it is now obvious that DeSantis never intended to serve all four years of his term, and that he was raising more money than he actually needed to win re-election so that he could launch a Presidential campaign and still receive taxpayer money via his salary as Governor of Florida. Since November 2022, DeSantis has urged state legislators in Florida, as well as officials within that Florida GOP to , including Florida's Resign To Run law and the , which is issued by the Florida Department of State. In May 2023, DeSantis urged the Florida Department of State to change the section that pertains to how campaign funds can be used and transferred between different entities. It is worth noting that the Florida Department of State is overseen by Secretary of State Cord Byrd, who was appointed by Governor Ron DeSantis as Florida's 37th Secretary of State on , nearly one year prior to DeSantis asking Byrd to change the laws so that DeSantis could transfer millions of dollars from his Gubernatorial PAC to a Presidential PAC. The primary duty of the Secretary of State of Florida is to oversee that state's elections and election integrity. However, it is unclear how it is "ethical" or "election integrity" for the Governor of Florida and his hand picked Secretary of State to be changing Florida election and campaign finance laws in an effort to give more centralized power over Florida's election process to Ron DeSantis, who is not only Governor of Florida, but will also likely be on the ballot in March 2024 for the Florida GOP Presidential Primary. DeSantis and Byrd's altering of the is significant, as it covers the specific kind of transferring of funds that DeSantis's allies are depending on for the sake of financially supporting his presidential campaign. The rule changes by DeSantis and Byrd has already prompted The Campaign Legal Center, a watchdog group, to file an official complaint with the Federal Election Commission regarding the legality of nearly $83 million of donations being transferred from DeSantis's state PAC to his Presidential PAC for the sake of attacking President Trump' 2024 campaign. " The complaint alleges that Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has violated federal campaign finance laws by directing or transferring over $80 million from his state PAC, "Friends of Ron DeSantis," to the super PAC Never Back Down." "Friends of Ron DeSantis, a state PAC based in Florida that DeSantis established in 2018, and used to raise over $225 million through May 2023, has reportedly directed or transferred over $80 million to Never Back Down, a federal super PAC reportedly organized to serve as the primary spending vehicle in support of the Florida governor's presidential campaign. Never Back Down has already spent over $944,000 to promote his presidential candidacy. The Federal Election Campaign Act (FECA) has, for over 20 years, prohibited federal candidates like DeSantis from spending "soft money" in connection with a federal election because such funds are not subject to federal campaign finance laws that prevent corruption and require transparency in our elections. As the complaint explains, DeSantis became a candidate well before his public announcement on May 24, 2023, and was therefore bound by the FECA provisions prohibiting candidates and the entities they establish, finance, maintain, or control from spending soft money in connection with federal elections. As a result, Friends of Ron DeSantis -- recently renamed "Empower Parents PAC" as part of a clear effort to distance the group from DeSantis -- brazenly violated the law when it transferred this colossal sum to a federal super PAC. The FEC is responsible for enforcing federal campaign finance laws and should investigate whether Governor DeSantis and the Friends of Ron DeSantis state PAC violated the law by making this transfer. " Previous versions of the Florida handbook stated, " A Florida political committee must use its funds solely for Florida political activities." The version for the 2024 cycle, which was modified by Florida Secretary of State Byrd at DeSantis's request, has been changed to say, "A Florida political committee may make contributions to an out-of-state political entity that engages solely in non-coordinated expenditures." This update was published in March 2023, the same exact month the Never Back Down PAC was created for the sake of getting Ron DeSantis elected as President, and just two months before Ron DeSantis officially filed paperwork with the FEC on May 24, 2023 to launch his 2024 presidential bid. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Since the updated guidelines to the were released, and the same month he filed to run for President, Ron DeSantis transferred roughly $83 dollars from his state based Political Action Committee to the Never Back Down Super PAC. The transfer of funds from DeSantis's previous state PAC to his Presidential PAC equates to roughly 64% of the total $130 million that Never Back Down claimed to have raised ahead of the release of their first FEC filing report on July 1, 2023. However, given the fact that $83 million of the $130 million Never Back Down claimed to have raised was raised prior to November 2022, and was not donated by donors with the intention of being used against Donald Trump in a primary, it is incredibly deceptive for DeSantis's campaign and PAC to claim they raised a collective $150 million since DeSantis launched his Presidential campaign. Madeleine knows the real challenges and fears Americans are facing:
* Gun violence that threatens lives every single day.
* The rolling back of hard-earned, fundamental rights for LGBTQIA+ individuals, women and girls, and minority communities.
* Rising costs and inflation.
* Extreme, unpredictable weather and natural disasters made worse by climate change.

And none of the GOP presidential hopefuls are offering real solutions on these issues. _In fact, most of them are actively making these threats worse._

On the other hand, President Biden and Democrats in Congress passed once-in-a-generation funding for infrastructure projects, clean energy investments, and expanded access to Medicare. _Democrats like Mad are eager to continue this work, and that starts with retaking the House majority in 2024._

**[Peter, the contrast is stark. Ahead of next year, will you let us know which leading GOP presidential candidate most concerns you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66263088/415859260/-1082791361?refcode=07102023_md_gopprimary_en_2&refcode2=8ef9166b-5c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5MTY2Yi01YzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OgNk70177x4WV-HXKof993iDbwaVAoUmEnerVhFdke0=&emci=cbbddcf5-3f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8ef9166b-5c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)**

Thank you for sharing your thoughts!

Cole

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_

name: Team Cori
subject: Updates on Cori’s advocacy:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori is advocating for our rights and pushing back against right-wing extremists. | |
---
Peter, Here are some updates on what Congresswoman Cori Bush has been up to in Congress. In the past few months: Cori secured over $278 million for her congressional district, including:
* Over **$196 million to improve St. Louis’s regional public transportation infrastructure** , including making railcars more accessible to more people and creating manufacturing jobs.
* Over **$82 million for disaster recovery** , which is urgently needed as extreme weather events like flooding continue to impact residents of St. Louis city and county.
* Communities are also now getting funding that Cori secured last year for this year’s federal budget. In addition to the $278 million from the past few months, **Cori has delivered over $1 billion for her district, and late last year secured these funds for 2023:**
* Delivered over **$18 million for community projects in Missouri’s First Congressional District** that will create jobs, enhance public safety, deliver public health services, build new affordable housing units, and support youth.
* Secured **$214 million for public transportation systems affected by climate disasters across the country** , including in the St. Louis region.

Cori advocated for environmental justice:
* After Cori sent a letter this spring **calling on the EPA to investigate toxic fumes in her district** , the EPA is investigating.

* **Pushed to clean up radioactive waste in her district** by introducing a new bill (the _Justice for Jana Elementary Act_) and by **securing a federal environmental review of Coldwater Creek** , which was used as a dumping ground for the Manhattan Project.

* **Called on the EPA to implement stricter rules against pollution** that causes haze in Missouri.

* As the highest-ranking Democrat on the Subcommittee on Economic Growth, Energy Policy, and Regulatory Affairs, **Cori spoke up during hearings in support of reducing polluting emissions from vehicles and regulating gas stoves to improve public health**. We have a right to breathe clean air, including indoors.

Cori pushed back against right-wing extremists:
* To reclaim our democracy and **expand the Supreme Court after Republicans stole the court’s majority** , Cori reintroduced the _Judiciary Act_ with colleagues in the Senate and the House of Representatives.

* Cori and Rep. Barbara Lee **introduced an amendment to remove the GOP’s expanded work requirements for people who rely on SNAP benefits** , or food assistance, in the federal debt limit bill. Unfortunately, MAGA Republicans succeeded in their attempt to pair raising the country’s debt limit with policies that will harm our most vulnerable communities. Cori voted against the bill and called to eliminate the debt ceiling altogether so Republicans can’t use it again to take our economy hostage.

* **Cori called out Republican hypocrisy on public safety** in a House Judiciary Committee hearing and voted no on a Republican bill on law enforcement during National Police Week. Instead, Cori has proposed community-based approaches to prevent violence and make people’s lives better, like the _People’s Response Act_.

Cori has introduced a number of bills expanding reproductive rights, including three in the last month:
* The **_Reproductive Health Travel Fund Act_** would provide grant assistance for those who travel long distances to receive reproductive health care, including abortion care.

* The **_Protect Sexual and Reproductive Health Act_** would remove federal barriers to reproductive autonomy, and use a whole-of-government, interagency approach to provide comprehensive sexual and reproductive health care.

* And the **_Abortion Justice Act_** would require insurance coverage to include abortion care, protect people from criminalization, and remove disparities and barriers to care based on race and immigration status.

Cori led on reparations for Black Americans:
* Cori **introduced the Reparations Now Resolution** , declaring that the U.S. federal government has a moral and legal obligation to provide reparations for the enslavement of Africans and its lasting harm on the lives of millions of Black people.

* Cori **marked 102 years since the Tulsa Massacre and called for reparations for survivors**. A judge just dismissed their lawsuit for reparations, but we will continue to push for justice.

Thank you for your support and partnership. Together, we will keep pushing for racial, economic, gender, and environmental justice. In solidarity, -Team Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yQHHrfvrophGWyy919VZTw0qOPGRPw5NxdSFN-U1Qqtf6assUfHWONoUTGEm0feaWnEeTFb_FD7nDRQrgIVzag4_j1f2PD-a7pugncw-0dASFgNQ7UmlLuZQJdFX-MkM_vBasztf9CwsvhJ2Fc3_hQJkOB8GuM5NSEREJ0W7rCqiGiAmBQdWPECbvxtNbfqd9x0kunaq6chbMLH_NmJQdmC0dNpw2XKpFN1pBGFeC8aa2gB05ZtT90REIVDs5SIy4xl1mX2TJcNFhe2tCrObfNWHg_DitJ7IoVo-VtmCSBs-_xrHA--Nn2S2_S13A39TuVhFIIMKNJwKpbs5kXSHZH9OUUBD7-2-Tb4TyAHLj0x2rtMl8E0uMJFgTQgTNwZo54RxWTVh3UFsiv6XH2bmy1/3xr/1Pi4tWdWRwiTjVqEdr7wbQ/h0/IioL_53hbOdL56SKqv4rGusuc_XYydZnrJRsoFQgYpE) **

In solidarity, -Team Cori ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, the Israeli military invaded a Palestinian city and refugee
camp in an assault that killed 12 people including 4 children.

Cori Bush condemned the role that the nearly $4 billion in annual US
military aid sent to Israel may have played in the terrible loss of life.
AIPAC then attacked Rep. Cori Bush for speaking out against funding war
crimes.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135581?t=1001&akid=29827%2E1203867%2EHb4rxg ]AIPAC quote retweet

Remember, AIPAC is also the group that supported Donald Trump and endorsed
106 insurrection Republicans.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135571?refcode=em20230710-29827&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=29827%2E1203867%2EHb4rxg ]Will you rush a $3 donation to help us support our
incumbent representatives as they make brave stances and stand up for
human rights?

What they are calling “pure anti-Israel hate”, we call demand for
oversight and the fight for human rights.

This isn’t the first time we have seen AIPAC take aim at progressives.
This is the same group that has spent millions of dollars against Jessica
Cisneros and Summer Lee — both of who have been vocal about the atrocities
committed at the hands of the Israeli military.

Peter, we have
no other option but to fight back against the AIPAC who continue to go
after our incumbents when they stand for crucial issues like Palestinian
human rights. The way we do that is by recruiting and electing even more
strong, progressive leaders like Cori Bush.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135571?refcode=em20230710-29827&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=29827%2E1203867%2EHb4rxg ]Will you support us in our mission to elect more leaders who will fight
and stand up for Palestinian human rights? You can start now by donating
$3.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135571?refcode=em20230710-29827&t=1022&akid=29827%2E1203867%2EHb4rxg ]Donate $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=29827%2E1203867%2EHb4rxg ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=29827%2E1203867%2EHb4rxg ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230710-29827-footer&t=1025&refcode2=29827_1203867_Hb4rxg&akid=29827%2E1203867%2EHb4rxg

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=29827%2E1203867%2EHb4rxg

name: Team Sewell
subject: We wanted to send you some photos from this amazing day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERRI SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Terri Sewell is the proud product of Alabama's rural Black Belt and has spent her life fighting for Alabama communities. From her time as one of the only black public finance lawyers in Alabama, when she delivered financing for new campus facilities at Alabama State University, Tuskegee University, and Stillman College, to her work as Congresswoman for Alabama's 7th District, Terri Sewell has delivered results every step of the way. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/MM4uLP88tb6oLJc7D9Dg8qN5B4Fw7N-q-KkCNykz6Ys=/Ufi3IeL6eZS2bpB42s5Ulo0csn08XHNmX943WuhVBtI=)
---

| |
---
On June 25, 2013, the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and unleashed a wave of voting restrictions across the nation targeting Black and minority voters. And as last week's shocking rulings show, they're not slowing down when it comes to rolling back the rights of our country's most vulnerable.

As the author and lead sponsor of the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, Rep. Sewell is proud to continue leading the fight in Congress to restore the full protections of the Voting Rights Act and protect the sacred right to vote for every eligible American.

That's why, last week, she convened an amazing group of voting rights advocates, like Maya Wiley, Tona Boyd and Jerome Dees, to talk about the impact of the Shelby County decision, the road ahead for voting rights, and how we ensure access to the ballot for every eligible American.

Times are hard right now, and last week's Supreme Court decisions show exactly what is at stake in our current political climate and exactly how important it will be to flip the House, hold the Senate, and keep the White House blue in 2024.

That means getting every single person out to vote. Because we know: _**When Democrats vote, we win.**_

[**But we can 't do it alone. We need you in this fight. Can you chip in $5, $10, or even $15 to help our campaign have the resources we need to turn out every vote in 2024? We have to start now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MM4uLP88tb6oLJc7D9Dg8qN5B4Fw7N-q-KkCNykz6Ys=/_jT-ws_PrMoKZHIKgwYUbiY35VCDWBPEy47Q2YsaZtw=?amount=5&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230706_FR_VotingRights_0_3MO_TeamSewell_na_na_SymposiumRecap)

-- Team Sewell
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MM4uLP88tb6oLJc7D9Dg8qN5B4Fw7N-q-KkCNykz6Ys=/2Yqf6gvICvpizKh8qvEVsdUHavjTbHk-EgkmAbxwdwo=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230630_FR_SCOTUS_0_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_EOM)[DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/MM4uLP88tb6oLJc7D9Dg8qN5B4Fw7N-q-KkCNykz6Ys=/2Yqf6gvICvpizKh8qvEVsdUHavjTbHk-EgkmAbxwdwo=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230630_FR_SCOTUS_0_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_EOM)

name: Team Ro
subject: SCOTUS can't have the last word on student debt.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Last month, the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority betrayed the 45 million Americans who relied on President Biden’s promise to forgive their student debt.

As we’ve seen time and again, we cannot count on SCOTUS to rule in the best interest of the American people. Resuming student loan payments in the middle of an affordability crisis will be absolutely crushing. We need to pursue policies that will allow hardworking Americans to realize their dreams, build wealth, and boost the economy.

President Biden proposed an alternative solution to ease student debt following the Supreme Court’s ruling. He is seeking to create a 12-month “on-ramp repayment program” to help those who cannot make payments avoid defaulting on their debts. He also plans to invoke the Higher Education Act of 1965 in an effort to enact debt forgiveness.

This new plan is a good start, but we can do more. President Biden must prevent interest on student debt from accruing, pause collections, and extend the moratorium until this debt can be forgiven. We need the Khanna Plan—and President Biden must follow it.

Sign the petition: President Biden must follow the Khanna Plan. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/khanna-plan-student-debt-petition?contactdata=Rbi4HXxInK0zNlZ5rz4emCgXTzeLET+ZcZHiXHi6+sDZHMKEoYzV9n50K67QNaKmoz72jejUpJD9Tcpx7fHvb64E39YIBUR6DRWueJXDstwHZUU2GiobG5nm5+F7nK0czmgINGdi7aBSNEBrXLGCVA==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/khanna-plan-student-debt-petition?contactdata=Rbi4HXxInK0zNlZ5rz4emCgXTzeLET+ZcZHiXHi6+sDZHMKEoYzV9n50K67QNaKmoz72jejUpJD9Tcpx7fHvb64E39YIBUR6DRWueJXDstwHZUU2GiobG5nm5+F7nK0czmgINGdi7aBSNEBrXLGCVA==]

Under the Khanna Plan, we will

* Extend the moratorium on student debt payments.
* Forgive student debt up to $50,000.
* Stop interest on student debt from accruing.
* Expand relief programs.

Sign if you agree: The Khanna Plan will revitalize the American Dream. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/khanna-plan-student-debt-petition?contactdata=Rbi4HXxInK0zNlZ5rz4emCgXTzeLET+ZcZHiXHi6+sDZHMKEoYzV9n50K67QNaKmoz72jejUpJD9Tcpx7fHvb64E39YIBUR6DRWueJXDstwHZUU2GiobG5nm5+F7nK0czmgINGdi7aBSNEBrXLGCVA==]

President Biden’s promise to cancel student debt helped him win the White House, and he must stay true to his promise. SCOTUS can’t have the last word on student debt—now’s the time for the President to take executive action and follow the Khanna Plan.

In solidarity,
Team Ro

There is no Democratic Senate majority without Jon Tester winning Montana. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Jon Tester and Mark Warner: ******=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** Jon’s opponent was hand-picked by Mitch McConnell to flip Montana and we’re already seeing right-wing groups pour unprecedented amounts of money into the race to turn the state red. The GOP is tired of losing to Jon, so they’re going to put everything they’ve got into taking back this seat. We have to help Jon fight back. = Thank you, Mark **=** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=65ceba7d1a7d462daf7d65c1d11114d5&_e=p4ujrzZS5n2Dj407Gbz2LIM3ZluY4PsL4iCjJvJ1W0CjNyn43kL8AZ_3giMRhfE4ed0nL4RBRHGsy--GTtRgGTMqt_F5g7qdCEVV-SXo381YFYeTemJFNSaeNgzgwcjPFhjXoMg-njTpGj2NyENT0Doh1bLwHK2ohztTD3Aubxlb0b7U5sbOK6F1epVeszgfUOr4GZwjhg_5-r97dLSPBsaQ_BJJ2Jn6O3HtNpDX2Wn6cBuuNqWobtgArHxGj4_A6o-33DaRQIHav4lLzsKYjRsHHRO_fTNprNbpgN25JPP5HagtB-3RrYuNqs4AgAgVmQGUhqdHygnmkX4jecCQFFNAeIxBaAvU9wpCxn455JvOzTphTqfYR7f-1Kb5_kPH1F9tS6--_rs59qdWLmo6kg%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

name: Captain Sam Brown

body:
God gave me a second chance and I'm not going to waste it

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9266e48895440f290d3dfc0318152a1&_e=p1lDDvveh_Sqjwo7jBnaM7fDj7Lf_IzNozTq6ZfXpZwYkB25Imc41-upr3YuHQhqZZA3c2R55C41fSLCiKCvV7GVPGVnWI6T1OnHQvHHPtKbl0tmWpITYJLDDeVJq5vtsI1aGXkDlDfrxQyfOFQK05WlHLmL_q0gi29-pODjwPaYvgkScBzmhAQMtgQyYY4_Td6evZ_qiUySidZTys6ylhUD9KTGSTSVmnrpmNp9RxQpllFUGtpYCXSZ6dkF8NnUpseEVHV0qmfxpxESLoJShG2MBf-UktMbifMrn6k93rqCC2xIvlHchATagDZacotre221NGNEx5wv9Qd5chZnPY9jHEPXnxUI6WRr170m8hxw7IYidLFNEm2XkoK1ld1nU_BJhqq7FAcMBkwZD2JN4TuK8YdFRDyoAjcBBRDj25qqgLgfxH3ILJbYZBdRlDdTg7VYfuy0JE9qBfCkj8MRdQ%3D%3D)

| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I'm a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9266e48895440f290d3dfc0318152a1&_e=p1lDDvveh_Sqjwo7jBnaM7fDj7Lf_IzNozTq6ZfXpZwYkB25Imc41-upr3YuHQhqZZA3c2R55C41fSLCiKCvV7GVPGVnWI6T1OnHQvHHPtKbl0tmWpITYJLDDeVJq5vtsI1aGXkDlDfrxQyfOFQK05WlHLmL_q0gi29-pODjwPaYvgkScBzmhAQMtgQyYY4_Td6evZ_qiUySidZTys6ylhUD9KTGSTSVmnrpmNp9RxQpllFUGtpYCXSZ6dkF8NnUpseEVHV0qmfxpxESLoJShG2MBf-UktMbifMrn6k93roGwzyayv0xOmr2r8sZGCYrph6r6_sENLyxc9K0NK3s-b0p0lbrHR5eeROSN0HGCQ2_EJcQIwi1kQk6pYY4fnsh0itGgx1Ixt5OpfUXe4wpEhClChdMuflTs9wn9R0FLcYnRrOFs_F5UNCvfe4DgcXInjnIc7GbTR8aNqPdFLmDQw%3D%3D) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9266e48895440f290d3dfc0318152a1&_e=p1lDDvveh_Sqjwo7jBnaM7fDj7Lf_IzNozTq6ZfXpZwYkB25Imc41-upr3YuHQhqZZA3c2R55C41fSLCiKCvV7GVPGVnWI6T1OnHQvHHPtKbl0tmWpITYJLDDeVJq5vtsI1aGXkDlDfrxQyfOFQK05WlHLmL_q0gi29-pODjwPaYvgkScBzmhAQMtgQyYY4_Td6evZ_qiUySidZTys6ylhUD9KTGSTSVmnrpmNp9RxQpllFUGtpYCXSZ6dkF8NnUpseEVHV0qmfxpxESLoJShG2MBf-UktMbifMrn6k93roIbiu6sSDKywqV59r_6YPEjBktcs9zEojZwK8w9uPnHt1aZcIqFrIdBJ5TpVavZUdCEDy2W2X-m7OF9JqFUTiF9cNudoGtTV-C4LoGyPSpJiz6_i395wgchSOzrCSTPGynI_x2LmDqZouODAogSOMY92cqWE5WgD3t9AC7ZyY6SA%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9266e48895440f290d3dfc0318152a1&_e=p1lDDvveh_Sqjwo7jBnaM7fDj7Lf_IzNozTq6ZfXpZwYkB25Imc41-upr3YuHQhqZZA3c2R55C41fSLCiKCvV7GVPGVnWI6T1OnHQvHHPtKbl0tmWpITYJLDDeVJq5vtsI1aGXkDlDfrxQyfOFQK05WlHLmL_q0gi29-pODjwPaYvgkScBzmhAQMtgQyYY4_Td6evZ_qiUySidZTys6ylhUD9KTGSTSVmnrpmNp9RxQpllFUGtpYCXSZ6dkF8NnUpseEVHV0qmfxpxESLoJShG2MBf-UktMbifMrn6k93rrBRwtjchzOTbCHoFEfhvOzDxY3NQKt87rRYau2wg3x2iAGe9p8-d1Kr09gDJ9E__EAsX97xq5NXEx3vVAF-5MN7XM3KAYksQ4z37UitVrD20CtsGwXfrP3arYo7w52lHcOSCV43GbW079WGELWeWHRwa3faIqE4LhjLMYxpUzHnA%3D%3D)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking "How long will it be before I burn to death?" But despite our enemy's best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn 't be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I've ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That's why every day since I nearly lost my life, I've dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I 'm telling you all this because I'm hoping that I can count on your financial support**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9266e48895440f290d3dfc0318152a1&_e=p1lDDvveh_Sqjwo7jBnaM7fDj7Lf_IzNozTq6ZfXpZwYkB25Imc41-upr3YuHQhqZZA3c2R55C41fSLCiKCvV7GVPGVnWI6T1OnHQvHHPtKbl0tmWpITYJLDDeVJq5vtsI1aGXkDlDfrxQyfOFQK05WlHLmL_q0gi29-pODjwPaYvgkScBzmhAQMtgQyYY4_Td6evZ_qiUySidZTys6ylhUD9KTGSTSVmnrpmNp9RxQpllFUGtpYCXSZ6dkF8NnUpseEVHV0qmfxpxESLoJShG2MBf-UktMbifMrn6k93rpIn_TI0qh0wwatwpeEG2RBvyTaLlmCfIriyZWpzsK2ur-D4x3_6z-E4zw9jW7wA1Jlk4Pi1jc8A7q8VAd5t51BjE0PcZwUR4rBR2Pdd7vBy1vgjtZaQKYG_JDbfot_RRm8UnS5mlT8emOWqzFfdduzrmg3iJzY-tK1LcJxLAdEHQ%3D%3D) -- but I don't want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---

clean_body: God gave me a second chance and I'm not going to waste it | | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I'm a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking "How long will it be before I burn to death?" But despite our enemy's best efforts,I survived. By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. I truly shouldn 't be alive today. For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I've ever learned: Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable. That's why every day since I nearly lost my life, I've dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. -- but I don't want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there's NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that's worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Hi, I’m James O’Keefe. You may not know me, but you’ve seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet.

If you tuned in to the late, great Rush Limbaugh’s show five years ago, you heard him say I was “an intrepid ‘guerrila journalist’ “whose undercover reporting has shown the light of truth on leftist organizations' slimy secrets.”

I can’t tell you how exciting and encouraging it was hear my hero say that to me!

**Rush and I talked about how important it was to expose the bad guys ... to bypass the lies and spin of the liberal media ... and get the truth to the American people.**

And we talked about the steep price I paid to do that – the attacks, smears, and lawsuits.

Well, the lawsuits haven’t stopped.

In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with – people I wish only the best for.

**Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting.**

The people who filed it don’t just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher.

**I don’t know why they’re doing it ... but they’re playing for keeps.**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxkkT2PnDAQhn_N0IFgbAwUFNkgrkoiRbprTwYPi3X-QMbOivv1EWiTImkfP-_r0Yy0m9HL0UNzA8RVqx0QgX0BxBTZm3x9_RaO_MfR5C_1G97PR_wKiPHY6K_5LCnISm1O2gyZ6jnKapkz6ivRdiVWleDZ2hOvm7JeuqaWhB2rOCneqqqp2wo5Mcx0jyWysqlKLBkyUbQcSYhlmpHjtLAOeHl9VCyBKK7afVBQUpujmL3NTL_GuO3XYCPguNOcAhXSkfLxNABHoycK8cjvSQYFODp65EY-9qRj7j-IFsrtlHsLbEzRvu8-hZmADf97gOI0LCmdLLDhrL_ILO0m9d0BG-wEKKT1yUVgA9ZPI1I4E0tU-CfjXaRLcrPJ4639_N6lXz8_AcW7M1oBG_6B173YwF7q9bgpn4VebQ9tjN5FA7y8X2uavf0dAAD__wEvmlE)** that will quickly pile up.

Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more.

But I remember what Rush told me in that interview:

**“You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it.”**

[**Friend, will you help me defend myself in court and keep getting the truth to our fellow Americans with your critically important gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away?**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxkkT2PnDAQhn_N0LEyY6-9W1DkgkCKFKU43bUnYw-Ldf5AxmjFv49AlxRJ-_h5X49mdFi8m_YW1Asgzs6ugAj8GyBuhb_rt7efea9_7aoeru_4OB7xOyCWfaG_5lfJhYJ2_qCqq2wrUDeTqaht5O3OsGmkqOYWyTYoSCBeuWyYuCtUyoyajVo3Vt0q1yJDzlTDkHHk8nITSFJOo0GB48TvINj50WXKRGV28ZOy1c7vF5NC5du5lGU9B-sB-5XMlumiI9lUDgOw926kXPb6selsAftIz9rr57q5UqdPoonqMNYpAO-3Ej7WtGVDwLv_PUB5GIGs2wLw7qg_idFh0e4RgXdhBJQ6pC0W4B1ev4xC-UhMxeKfTIqFTikaX_8YxmF4NXF6BZQf0TsLvPsHnvfiHR-u8_5iU5Vbuzyd926VCgR7nGsyKfwOAAD__zRtmgQ)

I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES!

I can’t do it without you.

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Records Show NY District Attorney Alvin Bragg Paid over $900/Hour to Shut Down House Judiciary Oversight into Indictment of President Trump
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that it received the engagement letter showing New York County District Attorney Alvin L. Bragg paid $900 per hour for partners and $500 per hour for associates to the Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher law firm for the purpose of suing Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) in an effort to shut down the House Judiciary Committee’s oversight investigation into Bragg’s unprecedented indictment of former President Donald Trump.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 10, 2023

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today that it received the engagement letter showing New York County District Attorney Alvin L. Bragg paid $900 per hour for partners and $500 per hour for associates to the Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher law firm for the purpose of suing Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) in an effort to shut down the House Judiciary Committee’s oversight investigation into Bragg’s unprecedented indictment of former President Donald Trump. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 10, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today that it received the engagement letter showing New York County District Attorney Alvin L. Bragg paid $900 per hour for partners and $500 per hour for associates to the Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher law firm for the purpose of suing Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) in an effort to shut down the House Judiciary Committee’s oversight investigation into Bragg’s unprecedented indictment of former President Donald Trump. ---|--- | | | | | The presentation includes a set of tables with the headline “White Americans’ Support for Democratic Candidates for President as a Function of Old-Fashioned Racism.” Another slide depicts tables which purport to show “Correlations between Republican Party Identification and Old-Fashioned Racism among White Americans.” ---|--- | | | | | In the latest national security blow to come out of the southwest border U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) apprehended and subsequently released an illegal immigrant on the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s (FBI) terrorist watchlist. CBP arrested the migrant, whose gender is not being identified by authorities, and their family in Yuma, Arizona and supposedly screened them for national security threats. ---|--- | | | | | On June 20, the U.S. Attorney for the District of Delaware announced a sweetheart plea deal with Hunter Biden, the son of President Biden. Hunter Biden would plead guilty to two tax charges and enter a diversion program on a gun possession charge. Diversion programs are usually focused on drug offenses—Biden has a well-documented history of crack cocaine use—and generally consist of psychotherapy and class work on building life skills. There would be no jail time. ---|--- | | | Fox News Military records obtained by a conservative watchdog show U.S. Air Force Academy instructional materials that include presentations addressing Critical Race Theory (CRT), White privilege and the Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement. The New York Post The Delaware Supreme Court affirmed a lower court ruling on Thursday denying a conservative watchdog group and media outlet access to a trove of documents from President Biden’s time in the Senate. In April 2020, Judicial Watch and the Daily Caller News Foundation submitted Freedom of Information Act requests for the papers, which were gifted to the University of Delaware by Biden in 2012. The Washington Times The slap-on-the-wrist plea deal inappropriately given to Hunter Biden by U.S. Attorney David Weiss only raises more questions about Biden family corruption. What appears increasingly clear, however, is that the family is thoroughly compromised by foreign governments. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |
