Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Derek - this is urgent.
As of today, the USMC will have no confirmed Commandant. From our Senior Advisor, Alex Vindman:

VoteVets has led the charge in getting this information public. Thousands of you have signed our petitions about Tuberville over the last several months.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: SAVE baby sea turtles from plastic pollution
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868938?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Time is running out to STOP plastic from completely destroying our planet! ** _**For over 150 million years, sea turtles have roamed the ocean -- but rampant plastic pollution is threatening the survival of these beloved marine animals. **_ Baby sea turtles often mistake floating plastic debris for food, which isn’t surprising given that _an entire garbage truck’s load of plastic_ is DUMPED into the ocean EVERY MINUTE. In fact, scientists predict there will be **more plastic than fish in the sea by 2050. And just ONE single piece of plastic has a _20% chance_ of killing a sea turtle. ** When sea turtles try to eat plastic mistaken for fish, they can easily _**CHOKE TO DEATH **_or become **_ENTANGLED._** Even if they manage to get the toxic plastic into their tiny stomachs, it can _rupture their internal organs_ or cause _severe damage to their digestive systems._ **Researchers estimate that over HALF of ALL sea turtles in the entire world have ingested plastic. ** Plastics are rapidly killing aquatic life like sea turtles and decimating our precious oceans -- and if we’re going to protect the fragile marine ecosystems that our planet relies on, **_we must band together and show strong public support immediately. _[Will you join the fight to protect our planet today? Add your name now and DEMAND government intervention to END plastic pollution!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868939?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[ >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868940?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868941?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**Plastics are everywhere and are taking over the Earth.**_ Because it’s non-biodegradable, it just keeps breaking into smaller microplastics that are **contaminating our water, food, and air supply. **Without even knowing it, the average human consumes a _credit card’s worth of plastic every week!_
The damage caused by plastic can be traced all the way back to the manufacturing process, which burns through **TONS of dangerous fossil fuels **that worsen global warming. These massive factories spew out **dirty greenhouse gases **that pollute the air and _pose serious health risks_ to nearby residents -- most often low-wealth and BIPOC communities.
And yet, the greedy fossil fuel industry and plastic corporations are still willing to put **our planet and human health on the line** \--_ all for the sake of profit. _Plastic production has already been forecast to _increase by 60% within the next 7 years,_ **so it’s CRUCIAL that we ACT NOW.**
[**We still have a chance to STOP the PLASTIC APOCALYPSE from destroying the Earth, but we can’t do this work without you, Friend. Please take action now to help save the planet from plastic before it’s too late! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868942?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1868941?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking action to defeat plastic pollution!
Friends of the Earth**

As the first communications satellite, it paved the way for transmitting live television signals and telephone conversations across the Atlantic Ocean. [**July 10****, 1965:** British rock band the Rolling Stones topped U.S. charts for the first time with the single (I Can't Get No) Satisfaction. The song reached the number one spot on the Billboard Hot 100, solidifying the band's success and impact on the music industry. "Satisfaction" became a timeless classic that propelled The Rolling Stones to new heights of fame.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1a61f5de35f3485b9910ceb50d66fbb3&_e=D0B5_aHxJ1DuMpvFga4RuLg5r0WDmFiZlXh8JZRfTcaZ9BcPP59WVShfhw73MAjw2ibLJJ7zU1Qm98auUuIpep2sX3yN2XTwDqVDg9m92QeDK5BvLZbs5bNauZDfVA0N53KymJ2VxAG4km4KnukKVRXrlEF1qQaRorSH4ICPe4YFHBPU088buqVVHO8xpXsNDZj1x5nfFY9NDeDpB_rOty5C-qjhoXvp0Yjb4A9KgcUJO6MvFKeHxmj6rdZJtkEmHN5IzeqdEBMfOLad9kROzg%3D%3D) **Source -[bestclassicbands.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1a61f5de35f3485b9910ceb50d66fbb3&_e=D0B5_aHxJ1DuMpvFga4RuLg5r0WDmFiZlXh8JZRfTcaZ9BcPP59WVShfhw73MAjw2ibLJJ7zU1Qm98auUuIpep2sX3yN2XTwDqVDg9m92QeDK5BvLZbs5bNauZDfVA0NY7xnuTfPjNOTGLeUMcmlly4SYSqUjewyWakVkF4Y-U6qrHOV5aXUbiykwEq32-A2iHjC-k6g7QmnIpzAItQFARJJtYsfYAKPo84MKyIK9a5vWj4_oD-Pu_enFWiMDroTzlG0qzXX6Ep4mYXSbmNuGQ%3D%3D)**

subject: First ➡️ then ➡️ now

body:
Please, help us start off July strong!
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=57%2E1163%2EOZvHrH)
**FIRST:** Lateefah launched her campaign to represent California’s 12th District in Congress. She’s committed to continuing her life’s work of changing the material conditions of all people for the better — fighting _against_ unjust systems and for a better life together.
**THEN:** California’s 12th District and _beyond_ rallied behind Lateefah: the most reliable progressive candidate who has the experience and the support to win this race, protect our rights, and push the boundaries to ensure that everyone in California’s 12th District can thrive.
**NOW:** We’re holding house parties to engage voters, growing our volunteer network, and securing major endorsements to ensure that California’s 12th District gets the representation it deserves. [**Our work isn’t slowing down and neither can our fundraising! Any amount you can give today will help make a difference as we continue to organize and fight for our beloved community.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230710-1?refcode=em20230710&refcode2=57_1163_OZvHrH&akid=57%2E1163%2EOZvHrH)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7216eef2d6d40689e59e542ab4ba6a4&_e=NDDMuuM8wTcL9dq0HRSRpM25oODy-2oUsHAi6Ut8aeZkg5EvcB-ceT4SuLTaDz-ODGLUc7D53PNQYovqBdS_PwXHOGuVz5AIKnMOyYChAfmTWVgLBV7Yf2m3dQ4F5MDOdctpRxoQH5o6vEbGOPEswwaTCERloDntduqXPIOaGp24qefDUe0eSA1F2KXTTakYXZ_S1wfce6YvoUWg4fMep3Hx0we4SUEL1sGgWO6pJDBDlADYI8hyB0fvVRxZ7AgEBMW49JOQpTzakgyYZsDdpw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: A GOP extremist, handpicked by Mitch McConnell, just launched his campaign to flip Nevada and the Senate red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Jacky Rosen needs your immediate grassroots support to fight back.
#
I had to reach out right away, Derek.
**Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat my friend and colleague Sen. Jacky Rosen in Nevada -- and according to analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ , this race is likely to decide Senate control.**
I’ve been in Jacky’s shoes before, so I can tell you firsthand: She needs every bit of grassroots support she can get -- and she needs it __right now.__
Because here’s the thing: McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada with over $55 million to flip this battleground state red. I was able to win the closest Senate race in the country by **7,928 votes** because of a dedicated team of grassroots supporters by my side. But the GOP is gearing up to spend even more this time around to _make sure_ their handpicked candidate defeats Jacky.
That’s why _The Washington Post_ is calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country -- and now, a recent poll shows her two points down. **The only way Jacky can overcome the GOP’s spending, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue is with your grassroots support, but she’s falling short of her critical $50,000 rapid-response goal.**
**[So please, Derek I’m personally asking: Will you give $5 or more to split between Jacky’s campaign and John Fetterman’s right now to help her win reelection in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230710-1?refcode=em20230710-1-8452&refcode2=8452_434096_SS2hTE&akid=8452%2E434096%2ESS2hTE)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230710-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230710-8452&refcode2=8452_434096_SS2hTE&akid=8452%2E434096%2ESS2hTE)**
Thank you, Derek.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine
Catherine Cortez Masto
U.S. Senator from Nevada

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230710-8452-footer&t=1&refcode2=8452_434096_SS2hTE&akid=8452%2E434096%2ESS2hTE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8452%2E434096%2ESS2hTE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8452%2E434096%2ESS2hTE)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
I know $1 might not seem like a lot, but when you’re building a grassroots team like ours, every dollar goes a long way.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66266311/415870918/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.10_b1_as_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWU2OTcyNi02ODFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou8HUYB_o2V2FQNc7_dDPYdbplHGSLnGuhK2x09e7EE=)

Hi friends, it’s Andrea.

Our campaign is powered by grassroots folks like you – so with our election being considered one of the _most competitive in the entire country_ , I’m going to need you by my side every step of the way to ensure I can keep fighting for Oregon’s hard-working families in Congress.

**That’s why today, I’m coming to you personally to ask for $1.** Yes, really only $1.

[**I know $1 may not seem like a lot, but when you're building a grassroots team like ours, even just $1 goes a long way. So please, will you chip in $1 or more to help us build the campaign infrastructure we need to keep fighting for Oregon?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66266312/415870919/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.10_b1_as_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWU2OTcyNi02ODFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou8HUYB_o2V2FQNc7_dDPYdbplHGSLnGuhK2x09e7EE=)

**As I always say, change _is_ possible in a single generation, but only if we work for it. **If we work together and stick together, I know we can continue to deliver on the issues that matter most and make the day-to-day just a bit easier for families throughout our communities.

I will never stop fighting for a stronger future for you and your family, but I need you with me to get the job done.

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: re: [WATCH] We just launched our ads! 📺🎶
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
Hi Peter, it’s Sen. Heidi Campbell. In case you missed it – our new ad is on TV!!!
Whether it's TV ads, mailers or door-knocking, my team and I are doing our best to share how I will get Nashville back in tune. And while it was really fun to sing and play guitar for this TV spot, my favorite line is about how I’ll “pick up the damn trash! ”
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
Here’s the deal, Peter. We just launched our TV ads, which are crucial to keeping on top of the pack with public polling showing the closest race in recent Nashville memory.
Will you take just 30 seconds out of your day to donate to our campaign for Nashville mayor so that we don’t have to scale back our ad program? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
GIVE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
It's about time we elect an experienced leader, mom, and former singer/songwriter who knows how to get things done.
With gratitude,
Heidi
------Begin forwarded message------
Hi Peter, it’s Sen. Heidi Campbell here with big news:
We just launched our TV ads! 🥳
We’re working hard to make sure that neighbors in every corner of this city can learn about how I plan to get Nashville back in tune! Check out this clip we pulled from one of our ads:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD_RS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD_RS]
I’m running in the most competitive race in Nashville, and it’s going to be a close one. That’s why it’s so critical we get our message in front of as many people as possible.
Peter, we want to run our TV ads as long as possible so that Music City voters can learn about my campaign before the election next month. We need your help to keep them on the air – can you chip in $15, $35, or any amount today to keep them up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD_RS]
KEEP OUR ADS UP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD_RS]
It’s crucial that we keep our hopeful message on the air so Nashville knows there's a candidate who has a positive path forward for our city.
With your grassroots support, our ads will continue to reach folks across Nashville and have our city running like a band in perfect sync.
Peter, even just $20 goes a long way toward spreading our message across Music City. Will you contribute $20 or whatever you’re able today to keep running our TV ads and give us the best shot at winning next month? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD_RS]
CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD_RS]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, it’s Sen. Heidi Campbell. In case you missed it – our new ad is on TV!!! Whether it's TV ads, mailers or door-knocking, my team and I are doing our best to share how I will get Nashville back in tune. And while it was really fun to sing and play guitar for this TV spot, my favorite line is about how I’ll “pick up the damn trash! ” [] Here’s the deal, Peter. We just launched our TV ads, which are crucial to keeping on top of the pack with public polling showing the closest race in recent Nashville memory. Will you take just 30 seconds out of your day to donate to our campaign for Nashville mayor so that we don’t have to scale back our ad program? >> [] GIVE NOW [] It's about time we elect an experienced leader, mom, and former singer/songwriter who knows how to get things done. With gratitude, Heidi ------Begin forwarded message------ Hi Peter, it’s Sen. Heidi Campbell here with big news: We just launched our TV ads! 🥳 We’re working hard to make sure that neighbors in every corner of this city can learn about how I plan to get Nashville back in tune! Check out this clip we pulled from one of our ads: [] I’m running in the most competitive race in Nashville, and it’s going to be a close one. That’s why it’s so critical we get our message in front of as many people as possible. Peter, we want to run our TV ads as long as possible so that Music City voters can learn about my campaign before the election next month. We need your help to keep them on the air – can you chip in $15, $35, or any amount today to keep them up? [] KEEP OUR ADS UP [] It’s crucial that we keep our hopeful message on the air so Nashville knows there's a candidate who has a positive path forward for our city. With your grassroots support, our ads will continue to reach folks across Nashville and have our city running like a band in perfect sync. Peter, even just $20 goes a long way toward spreading our message across Music City. Will you contribute $20 or whatever you’re able today to keep running our TV ads and give us the best shot at winning next month? [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] With gratitude, Heidi Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill. [] As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves. Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment. Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote. Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream. Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Campbell for Mayor P.O. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0c9688e26474579b5cc49eae56271fe&_e=aQPXblukDThD0G0sNiDlFUOsjOUe89a3gE7MqG37-KFQcInIK7Un4f171S5msJFf5KRXQVRLNEfmpaLI3JqGLAtVrPLX5I9Y_aYUwRVtEBn30VhLBLqzKmLgpbtBbzLx2WdCRajHYKS1NWgIyo0pMlnLDg_u3Dq2QNxZPRzDrKAZ3JWOi-q6clrBgKc03W8iqK-QVX8aRrDrAD08jaw4ZB27ARTy2bFbO5WpbjNEmaOIfFuvm2iaR7pao0k1wN_cNrdYZY4oO9sUY1CHliRopA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0c9688e26474579b5cc49eae56271fe&_e=aQPXblukDThD0G0sNiDlFUOsjOUe89a3gE7MqG37-KFQcInIK7Un4f171S5msJFf5KRXQVRLNEfmpaLI3JqGLAtVrPLX5I9Y_aYUwRVtEBn30VhLBLqzKmLgpbtBbzLx8b3goHQht5IKPVQQGevO0F9Z-88KOWE9PutVDqNKOrD9Ey7eqaTZjZJYJA-IZ0hRgAt2PknYAnwMUyo4O-LaX-6kHhaNWrIwUjBRsqQXl1WW1BxVixMY1ngzM28piBxAS5Nv27Ny4_-KSWiSK4U9tQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0c9688e26474579b5cc49eae56271fe&_e=aQPXblukDThD0G0sNiDlFUOsjOUe89a3gE7MqG37-KFQcInIK7Un4f171S5msJFf5KRXQVRLNEfmpaLI3JqGLAtVrPLX5I9Y_aYUwRVtEBn30VhLBLqzKmLgpbtBbzLxOx1XaSyIfuLzi0nqg5CTmbFojKy3hhArcuzWNAy2YispUJipCyrDLznUp15X8HK3fNVbDHZA0IB0luQh4R2O5KGU3nXIJNbAunhqPMedPkvjlV9hK4NWNPCpqN7Rsg7z1R7ti9PaejWRRK77Q54EuA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

body:

Peter, can I tell you a story?

When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public
service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between
pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=541%2E35263%2E9XoVNL ]Picture of young Tammy

Seeing others in the LGBTQ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming
out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they
love — I came to realize that I could do both. I could run for office and
be honest about who I am. And that’s exactly what I did.

When I became the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history, I
understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a
difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to
protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, I’ve
worked hard every day since to do just that.

That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but
to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted
to make a difference, too. Now, I'm asking you again:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=541%2E35263%2E9XoVNL ]Will you help me continue to make a difference by pitching into my
reelection campaign today? I’m gearing up for my most competitive race
yet, Peter.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jul23.4Adudz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=541%2E35263%2E9XoVNL ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

Despite the incredible progress we’ve made in the fight for equality,
we’re still facing constant attacks on our freedoms.

Last year, when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, Justice Clarence
Thomas called for Obergefell v. Hodges — the case that established
nationwide marriage equality — to be “reconsidered.”

And just last week, the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority ruled that
businesses can discriminate against LGBTQ Americans.

It’s going to take all of us to counter these right-wing attacks so that
everyone in the LGBTQ community knows they belong — and that kindness and
inclusion, not hatred and division, are American values.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=541%2E35263%2E9XoVNL ]I promise to keep up the fight as long as I can, and I’m hoping you’ll

name: Josh Harder
subject: A story about my childhood
body:
Fresh, homemade dolmas. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66266572/415871727/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBkNzcxZjQtNjgxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7sxgh0zt95tYhhLKZdeCYxO69GEfY2h_nsLRPvyirAE=) | Hi Peter, I want to tell you a story about my childhood. One of my all-time favorite memories from when I was little was spending time after school with my Assyrian neighbor. Her name was Nana, and she was like a grandmother to me. My brother and I would help her pick grape leaves in her backyard and make fresh, homemade dolmas. And over plates of her delicious dolmas, she would tell us stories: about how Assyrians have made incredible contributions to global art and culture, how they were the first people to domesticate crops, and how they – quite literally! – invented the wheel. She would also tell us about how Assyrians have sadly faced centuries of persecution, which caused many of them to come to the United States for a new future to pursue their own American dreams. I think about Nana every time I work on immigration issues. I’ll never understand what it’s like to be an immigrant, but Nana’s stories drive me to action. Immigrants are our friends, our classmates and our neighbors. They have so much to teach us. And they are some of the most resilient people I know. It’s why the vilification of immigrants hurts me so much. It’s not just Republican rhetoric that is infuriating - it’s also their blocking of common sense immigration reform. As I write this, over 10,000 Dreamers in my community are forced to live in the shadows because they don’t have a path to citizenship. Passing the DREAM Act is the least we can do to give them a future here. I was proud to cosponsor that bill, and I continue to push with all my heart to make it into law. I do this work for Nana. For her family and the tens of thousands of families like hers. Thanks for listening and sharing Nana’s story, \- Josh [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66266573/415871728/590255291?&refcode=E3305-20230711-NeighborStory-SB-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBkNzcxZjQtNjgxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7sxgh0zt95tYhhLKZdeCYxO69GEfY2h_nsLRPvyirAE=)
---

body:
Glenn Youngkin’s irresponsible political agenda is leaving billions of dollars in jeopardy.

| Peter,

Hi, it’s Rhena with Freedom Virginia. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss our important message about the Virginia budget.

Glenn Youngkin’s irresponsible political agenda is leaving billions of dollars in jeopardy. Virginia schools are waiting to make important investments in teachers, education programs, and resources for students across the Commonwealth, but Glenn Youngkin’s inability to pass a budget is stalling their progress and putting our children’s education in jeopardy.

This is unacceptable, Peter. We are more than halfway through the year, and _**we do not have a 2023 budget yet.**_ [_**Will you add your name today to demand Glenn Youngkin pass the budget?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66266668/415872038/832174636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgyNjcxZS02YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5WmiCI8MLqd2Lqtd9BjF1kUQaTaFENFIvhmHaOliag=&emci=6482671e-6a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7282671e-6a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6782597)

The budget in the Commonwealth is still undecided, and it’s putting Virginia in the national spotlight.

Glenn Youngkin and his band of extremist Republicans continue to prioritize special interest groups ahead of Virginians.

_**Here’s the deal, Peter:**_ Governor Youngkin and House Republicans are set on adopting a budget that contains massive tax cuts for corporations and wealthy Virginians. While our public schools need a much-needed $1 billion allocation to invest in our teachers and children’s education. [_**Will you add your name to demand Glenn Youngkin pass a budget that puts Virginians first?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66266671/415872041/832174636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgyNjcxZS02YTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5WmiCI8MLqd2Lqtd9BjF1kUQaTaFENFIvhmHaOliag=&emci=6482671e-6a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7282671e-6a1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6782597)

clean_body: Glenn Youngkin’s irresponsible political agenda is leaving billions of dollars in jeopardy. | Peter, Hi, it’s Rhena with Freedom Virginia. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss our important message about the Virginia budget. Glenn Youngkin’s irresponsible political agenda is leaving billions of dollars in jeopardy. Virginia schools are waiting to make important investments in teachers, education programs, and resources for students across the Commonwealth, but Glenn Youngkin’s inability to pass a budget is stalling their progress and putting our children’s education in jeopardy. This is unacceptable, Peter. We are more than halfway through the year, and we do not have a 2023 budget yet. | Read more from our team here: | | Virginia budget negotiations collapse, leaving $3.6 billion in limbo -The Washington Post | Peter, The budget in the Commonwealth is still undecided, and it’s putting Virginia in the national spotlight. Glenn Youngkin and his band of extremist Republicans continue to prioritize special interest groups ahead of Virginians. Here’s the deal, Peter: Governor Youngkin and House Republicans are set on adopting a budget that contains massive tax cuts for corporations and wealthy Virginians. While our public schools need a much-needed $1 billion allocation to invest in our teachers and children’s education. | There’s so much at stake, but Glenn Youngkin continues to put his political aspirations before the well-being of our public education system and Virginians. body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=281%2E552475%2EFz3Alk)
Hi, Peter, nice to meet you!
I’m Bob’s Digital Director, here with some exciting news: We’re celebrating Bob’s love of maps with a new sticker!
[**Donate any amount at this link now to get our brand-new ‘I ❤️ MAPS’ sticker. Whatever you can chip in will help fuel our campaign to defend PA’s Senate seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230710-sticker?refcode=em20230710-sticker&refcode2=281_552475_Fz3Alk&akid=281%2E552475%2EFz3Alk)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230710-sticker?refcode=em20230710-sticker&refcode2=281_552475_Fz3Alk&akid=281%2E552475%2EFz3Alk)
**[Claim Your Sticker ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230710-sticker?refcode=em20230710-sticker&refcode2=281_552475_Fz3Alk&akid=281%2E552475%2EFz3Alk)**
These stickers are union-made right here in our Commonwealth, and are the perfect way to show your support for our campaign (and maps).
I’m debating between putting mine on my water bottle or my laptop (maybe I’ll get two and do both?), but I hear they also look great on notebooks, cell phone cases, car bumpers, directly on your wall — you name it!
For as little as $1, you can claim your sticker before we run out. [**Don't miss your chance — chip in now and we’ll send one your way!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230710-sticker?refcode=em20230710-sticker&refcode2=281_552475_Fz3Alk&akid=281%2E552475%2EFz3Alk)
**[Claim Your Sticker ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230710-sticker?refcode=em20230710-sticker&refcode2=281_552475_Fz3Alk&akid=281%2E552475%2EFz3Alk)**
Thanks for showing your support,
Gabrielle Fink
Digital Director, Bob Casey for Senate

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=281%2E552475%2EFz3Alk)

Bob Casey for Senate

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State."

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3536c258c08140168e78736321048ecc&_e=Vcc8VHN6kSCe7gVNoq62LlwXIDXlRQlUQ1UAwj9tiw1JF3lSfzrIlHMlO9scLhrKeiEJkfI2WL6MVqBU3jvK8L8lMxqaDfn-J86E1TwlDoABZ55JsWtB3eadx_mdxBrXtPQxdNKCxcGDUbVVv6RRLDkSDAUpB_f1-a4kWCxyWLc9loDo5OU2-JHyTcbhzWNX53TyDP-iZ6uJssNpnxL5QJ8e_NPUs-242aIuqWpI-uBrKwCy0KnnuAKodx9bhZr-hiK3vv6PiPWIKplyR2E2_duZUS8GEupA2jPfXwxvfwMJJ4RdEIL8ExreG71ubeaSE4fv8NNapnmRRpt-zfPWnqHiccJKwWS8uRDGt1DqngvhrwZftuCVoP5Y_9D1RjreAKcwScq-bhVzjCnzpLHY8XSCJisv-ndi-Zwz1DaIzak%3D)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3536c258c08140168e78736321048ecc&_e=Vcc8VHN6kSCe7gVNoq62LlwXIDXlRQlUQ1UAwj9tiw1JF3lSfzrIlHMlO9scLhrKeiEJkfI2WL6MVqBU3jvK8L8lMxqaDfn-J86E1TwlDoABZ55JsWtB3eadx_mdxBrXtPQxdNKCxcGDUbVVv6RRLDkSDAUpB_f1-a4kWCxyWLc9loDo5OU2-JHyTcbhzWNX53TyDP-iZ6uJssNpnxL5QJ8e_NPUs-242aIuqWpI-uBrKwCy0KnnuAKodx9bhZr-hiK3vv6PiPWIKplyR2E2_QswInnxC6x30ZQkWgd6FpZ3O7Ypx7weUmiR8e5UpIkbdzLx3ObLBujFDQm0n3nojRaIENCUcrYQ8_WS8xRfQthKsBuY9_bbD9hkBMezSG29C15Wep3BjwE7Utixc6thwSzM-lmvS_2X5QSMxzHFv_w%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3536c258c08140168e78736321048ecc&_e=Vcc8VHN6kSCe7gVNoq62LlwXIDXlRQlUQ1UAwj9tiw1JF3lSfzrIlHMlO9scLhrKeiEJkfI2WL6MVqBU3jvK8L8lMxqaDfn-J86E1TwlDoABZ55JsWtB3eadx_mdxBrXtPQxdNKCxcGDUbVVv6RRLDkSDAUpB_f1-a4kWCxyWLc9loDo5OU2-JHyTcbhzWNX53TyDP-iZ6uJssNpnxL5QJ8e_NPUs-242aIuqWpI-uBrKwCy0KnnuAKodx9bhZr-hiK3vv6PiPWIKplyR2E2_RI6o70HNcZcnM9o0LW6QnYHMlolkAuMazdSuvd9AAoh3IWwfrCLLlq7pbWJHTVX8jQ1-klkfIsI0n7OByqAYiVOPgMWINxHFS6sBmYx9ST_hlM3wL1EN2GGlZsCkUHzmIM0o3pXNFp5CzF5EDdqZW0%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3536c258c08140168e78736321048ecc&_e=Vcc8VHN6kSCe7gVNoq62LlwXIDXlRQlUQ1UAwj9tiw1JF3lSfzrIlHMlO9scLhrKeiEJkfI2WL6MVqBU3jvK8L8lMxqaDfn-J86E1TwlDoABZ55JsWtB3eadx_mdxBrXtPQxdNKCxcGDUbVVv6RRLDkSDAUpB_f1-a4kWCxyWLc9loDo5OU2-JHyTcbhzWNX53TyDP-iZ6uJssNpnxL5QJ8e_NPUs-242aIuqWpI-uBrKwCy0KnnuAKodx9bhZr-hiK3vv6PiPWIKplyR2E2_V07SdWqecCUyPrB6x_8FlpsiJ8THLs8lgl1VoPD5fTIedLVbERDr2trcncjlPAXhC5p8ahXFEfNH7jtqXP62vUBHSjrR8coVaFBTcYfsYXUMyBYaIpEeDsI0P0u05mZh4ZnQBc0fWUny012S6A0s4w%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: re: McConnell’s handpicked candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I needed to reach out directly: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada. |
#
Hi, this is Nevada Senator Jacky Rosen. I needed to reach out directly: **GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me.** Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his _rubber stamp_ in the Senate, voting for anything **including a national abortion ban.** I’m fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can’t do it alone. **[Will you chip in $10 or more now to split between my campaign and Tina’s to help me keep Nevada blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66268158/415873206/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTA3ODdjNy02YjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vVzZxcFIxHCeAfI6KbqgPXCMSHL4PrtzXPG3toW1nA=)** With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, McConnell and his GOP allies are coming after me as a top target. Now, _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – **and a recent poll shows me 2 points down.** **This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far.** I simply cannot compete with the GOP’s massive war chest unless supporters like you chip in. **In a race this close, every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing – so please, I’m humbly asking:** **[Will you chip in $10, $25, or as much as you can spare to split between my campaign and Tina’s? I’m counting on your urgent support to keep Nevada and the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66268159/415873207/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTA3ODdjNy02YjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vVzZxcFIxHCeAfI6KbqgPXCMSHL4PrtzXPG3toW1nA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jacky Rosen and Tina Smith will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66268160/415873208/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230710_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTA3ODdjNy02YjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vVzZxcFIxHCeAfI6KbqgPXCMSHL4PrtzXPG3toW1nA=)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Catastrophic flooding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Over the weekend, the Hudson Valley was hit with torrential rainfall that led to catastrophic flooding and dangerous conditions.

We’ve seen this before. During Hurricane Ida, I lost several of my constituents to flooding. It’s why I fought so hard to pass the Inflation Reduction Act, the single-largest climate action the United States has taken to stop global warming.

As a candidate, Congressman Mike Lawler, a former oil and gas lobbyist, opposed the Inflation Reduction Act. No surprise there.

I voted for it anyway—to lower the cost of clean, renewable energy, to create millions of good-paying, green jobs, and to protect our planet for generations to come.

It’s been devastating seeing this destruction happen in our own backyard. But the Hudson Valley is strong and I know we'll get through this together as a community.

And while I'm feeling for our communities, I'm also fed up with Congressman Lawler. Flooding doesn’t happen in a vacuum, and Lawler knows that. Climate change is making natural disasters worse—it's just a fact. And while he tweets his "concerns," he's not apologizing for his past as a Big Oil lobbyist who voted against vital climate legislation every chance he got.

Maybe it’s because he’s too busy writing letters to Eric Adams about wood- and coal-fired pizza ovens in New York City, which he proudly tweeted about on Friday.

There's so much more work to do. We've got the immediate cleanup, and we have to act rapidly on the big picture to stop these natural disasters from getting worse. With Lawler in office, we're not going to make progress.

We’re in this together.

–Mondaire

name: Mark Robinson
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth.

| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I'd be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f53b7b545ce44b79ae2e1e399f2cace9&_e=_Cx_eqolwPYlATYLpQWIMj7MD2OhzkZuhEwRrtRvFWHeFP3QeuK88c8M0gWv7_VHX39NqII7CL32e3T0tTGmw0qLOO9-S_dHI0DKJgycuAL4lIglOU8xl_k4j9vAZCnKyXeBvVqDGguAKd9dq7Sw0n2w-OzatwUZMLq53404Mw9K9el8Sq-dL8-pyUIBt7WjuosH93RacT82Qv7n2_tEnJ--lqDcOi36xa3aOmbxtPOuvu_7qwDUnfInxpj-G_bgEwOGXnIjfBd6jBxhmQLkuZB2GHFNfmIVhYrlzsoRRfRHeofpOGxNUG7hYfA0lIbXx7wrtBapWngbW6NEFodphyNU869kHcTvdeOp5iKVy6zTiMC14O9dPf6GFT8R71TNth-5PGUrtxwPkkAcmyYcSqmEW_MzrfMB0G1xOZ1yFGMQAFyFsHBc5eiXhwMqHO25_1AHiV4Sjpagagsep-fTDDXjUQIKfs6PmPO1Qi0NCfk%3D)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom's friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn't my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn 't just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f53b7b545ce44b79ae2e1e399f2cace9&_e=_Cx_eqolwPYlATYLpQWIMj7MD2OhzkZuhEwRrtRvFWHeFP3QeuK88c8M0gWv7_VHX39NqII7CL32e3T0tTGmw0qLOO9-S_dHI0DKJgycuAL4lIglOU8xl_k4j9vAZCnKyXeBvVqDGguAKd9dq7Sw0n2w-OzatwUZMLq53404Mw9K9el8Sq-dL8-pyUIBt7WjuosH93RacT82Qv7n2_tEnJ--lqDcOi36xa3aOmbxtPOuvu_7qwDUnfInxpj-G_bgEwOGXnIjfBd6jBxhmQLkuZB2GHFNfmIVhYrlzsoRRfRHeofpOGxNUG7hYfA0lIbXgnJ0KHcva7XlnANWEMap1BW0CFFVH6eE3tqlzNdlybvBscFTUYF9ZiLjL8dBc1Mlc543Y6XDWJReLj8oUk48UdIx-s1frNrzKonbmOQiJtU_FkhFL-c2dHa4OaQLzs-tA6wpdp4ixo7crq2PnQZYpxDkPxLCmunr7mDVyhWI9c0%3D)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that's in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f53b7b545ce44b79ae2e1e399f2cace9&_e=_Cx_eqolwPYlATYLpQWIMj7MD2OhzkZuhEwRrtRvFWHeFP3QeuK88c8M0gWv7_VHX39NqII7CL32e3T0tTGmw0qLOO9-S_dHI0DKJgycuAL4lIglOU8xl_k4j9vAZCnKyXeBvVqDGguAKd9dq7Sw0n2w-OzatwUZMLq53404Mw9K9el8Sq-dL8-pyUIBt7WjuosH93RacT82Qv7n2_tEnJ--lqDcOi36xa3aOmbxtPOuvu_7qwDUnfInxpj-G_bgEwOGXnIjfBd6jBxhmQLkuZB2GHFNfmIVhYrlzsoRRfRHeofpOGxNUG7hYfA0lIbXx_6bVHJdEaHW1IB933UpeDeMEFs1jUvLDaH2dBRqB2WgAO9EDLIRP0soueeenaMpuI77HckFFrTee2IiuD7ThdXrMqP6icnDGlgIQE7tkMT-v0AuPfrLjEyfTWMxlqBwv3EE7Qe2t_2WeY70tkjJIpTf6pIri0525hHGOIJUwEA%3D)
---

Now, I've thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don't want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn't fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That's what I'm fighting for. And that's why I'm running for Governor.

Now, I'm asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor 's race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. clean_body: I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. | | | | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I'd be in five years. Would I be in a shelter? In foster care? Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters? | A few days after my father died, my mom's friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything. But that wasn't my mom. As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. She didn 't just rise to the challenge, she excelled. She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything. Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles. My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA. We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy. I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills. But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids. | In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral. A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education. It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that's in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school. | Now, I've thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor. My campaign for Governor is not about want. IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE. Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don't want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn't fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That's what I'm fighting for. And that's why I'm running for Governor. Now, I'm asking for your help. This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor 's race in the country. As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. "Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history." | | | Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers. | Mark Robinson | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson Business donations are not allowed. subject: re: the Student Debt Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jirair Ratevosian For Congress 321 N
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66269649/415874741/1599712309?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE4NWI1MmYtNmQxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L7DShUeTDUTAB7trXa4zlGKdFRc5cZqJlWupCGoweq4=)
---
**Last week, the Supreme Court callously rejected student loan relief for millions of middle and working-class Americans.**

I’m deeply disappointed — the corrupt Supreme Court sided with right-wing special interests and in one swift motion forced 43 million Americans back into the broken student loan system that is in the hands of for-profit student loan servicers and debt collectors.

In the richest country in the world, I believe higher education should be a ladder, not a lifelong sentence of debt. Yet, as of today, 43 million Americans – both recent graduates and seniors – owe $1.6 trillion in student debt.

[**Will you join me in fighting for a fair system to address the student debt crisis? Add your name below >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66269676/415874744/-1744262381?refcode=JRFC_20230710_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE4NWI1MmYtNmQxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L7DShUeTDUTAB7trXa4zlGKdFRc5cZqJlWupCGoweq4=&emci=83f268e1-551f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1a85b52f-6d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1770913) | [SIGN NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66269683/415874776/-1744262381?refcode=JRFC_20230710_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE4NWI1MmYtNmQxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L7DShUeTDUTAB7trXa4zlGKdFRc5cZqJlWupCGoweq4=&emci=83f268e1-551f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1a85b52f-6d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1770913)
---
I am heartened by President Biden's announcement that his efforts will not slow down — his plan is to invoke the Higher Education Act to find relief in the wake of the SCOTUS decision. But we must keep all options on the table.

Everyone deserves an equal chance to succeed – but the predatory practices of lenders and for-profit colleges have left thousands of students struggling to keep their heads above water.

Poll after poll shows that the American people support debt relief for the working and middle class. Such relief not only stimulates the economy, but allows Americans – many of whom are still struggling from the pandemic – to afford rent, pay their medical bills, open businesses, and start families.

Because of hard work and access to federal grants and scholarships that allowed me to get a quality education, I have been able to get jobs that have served our country at the highest levels of government. Like many others, I still have student loans to pay.

Pursuing higher education should not put so many borrowers back financially for decades. _That is not the American dream._

[**Join me in supporting cancellation of student debt for working and middle class borrowers. Sign now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66269684/415874779/-1744262381?refcode=JRFC_20230710_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE4NWI1MmYtNmQxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L7DShUeTDUTAB7trXa4zlGKdFRc5cZqJlWupCGoweq4=&emci=83f268e1-551f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1a85b52f-6d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1770913)
[SIGN NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66269685/415874780/-1744262381?refcode=JRFC_20230710_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE4NWI1MmYtNmQxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L7DShUeTDUTAB7trXa4zlGKdFRc5cZqJlWupCGoweq4=&emci=83f268e1-551f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1a85b52f-6d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1770913)

Poll after poll shows that the American people support debt relief for the working and middle class. Such relief not only stimulates the economy, but allows Americans – many of whom are still struggling from the pandemic – to afford rent, pay their medical bills, open businesses, and start families. Because of hard work and access to federal grants and scholarships that allowed me to get a quality education, I have been able to get jobs that have served our country at the highest levels of government. Like many others, I still have student loans to pay. Pursuing higher education should not put so many borrowers back financially for decades. That is not the American dream. Thank you, Jirair | | Paid for by Jirair Ratevosian For Congress 321 N. Pass Ave., Box 133, Burbank, CA 91505 www.jirairforca.com Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State."

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=539e5cd6e6ab499285ab814bfefd996d&_e=R1A2rkYdeCTgvyqRKLmkZfbQ3gZeZhm8MhCxfsxlbULz8a5zCA6KUAHzamBGkjMsde_LtCQTr6C-LO4djPDmvS5my7r498RgVvPHeRSWFTbeRkLUrQZ0e-PKj9GIjB754OT-aHWHGTo16x5jUbZYN1vN65HPAYPQj7HJwdofo7kayzEwe0shOCDI4xF4cNeNYzz3iiIFHWOlX9nUhUhfbD1JXFfHbS4749UbNnJWmcHRZept4oL6LO534GzF8_zphcrJ1IWdwE71WjQYh-gU3JGehS8XrVnA2bKXwessQ8aovT1g-vSrWCFKiEjxG9oeF1919v9h9d8FBIV6p3nZQGEo3GZPQuSgzVjwmLz8I2bpRaQepXfyVtrE8a9aTJ0gO3yl1B047zZy3t3z3-POgGDxzR6BwS6CMpAlB0SCh3c%3D)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=539e5cd6e6ab499285ab814bfefd996d&_e=R1A2rkYdeCTgvyqRKLmkZfbQ3gZeZhm8MhCxfsxlbULz8a5zCA6KUAHzamBGkjMsde_LtCQTr6C-LO4djPDmvS5my7r498RgVvPHeRSWFTbeRkLUrQZ0e-PKj9GIjB754OT-aHWHGTo16x5jUbZYN1vN65HPAYPQj7HJwdofo7kayzEwe0shOCDI4xF4cNeNYzz3iiIFHWOlX9nUhUhfbD1JXFfHbS4749UbNnJWmcHRZept4oL6LO534GzF8_zphcrJ1IWdwE71WjQYh-gU3HqcOwBhfIGB51VJAkZvc6SvlFaB_jvCu2yRzOpIhqoW1ULUqBVg1Ok41yduc4Oyh096wyqZvmKj_3qmkZAnC0AiTeC2a-au7kvbNde42Bdfq_abcIssLVN8-R2wrfCi036AxdlXnQ8YjF90oMIvY3U%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=539e5cd6e6ab499285ab814bfefd996d&_e=R1A2rkYdeCTgvyqRKLmkZfbQ3gZeZhm8MhCxfsxlbULz8a5zCA6KUAHzamBGkjMsde_LtCQTr6C-LO4djPDmvS5my7r498RgVvPHeRSWFTbeRkLUrQZ0e-PKj9GIjB754OT-aHWHGTo16x5jUbZYN1vN65HPAYPQj7HJwdofo7kayzEwe0shOCDI4xF4cNeNYzz3iiIFHWOlX9nUhUhfbD1JXFfHbS4749UbNnJWmcHRZept4oL6LO534GzF8_zphcrJ1IWdwE71WjQYh-gU3Eli1UFoijM_1RhGsEOAWupUklFf-l_uAQuBogajyPkpbeB5IP09Vw4hauB0sJrpwiKL6OEl3YTtbUk6m9w3gW_UVQ_j15vctoNzD21h0bk_5UVOsCCForUsiMAUqDJvKstHhu_asLkRFegctKDqk-g%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=539e5cd6e6ab499285ab814bfefd996d&_e=R1A2rkYdeCTgvyqRKLmkZfbQ3gZeZhm8MhCxfsxlbULz8a5zCA6KUAHzamBGkjMsde_LtCQTr6C-LO4djPDmvS5my7r498RgVvPHeRSWFTbeRkLUrQZ0e-PKj9GIjB754OT-aHWHGTo16x5jUbZYN1vN65HPAYPQj7HJwdofo7kayzEwe0shOCDI4xF4cNeNYzz3iiIFHWOlX9nUhUhfbD1JXFfHbS4749UbNnJWmcHRZept4oL6LO534GzF8_zphcrJ1IWdwE71WjQYh-gU3GJ4_5w2pFoXWbyVL0KsxTqkRC174w2RJMNdJaqjaifk7V5oW-f2CwtH4LX5cgd8smi6IwvdX_U2zMjyil9MieUiDZYAYM57po0Kt-6caIgBHafxsPEPTPjykH85IbK57-WayrJe_drVJffHAnHz0NU%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=539e5cd6e6ab499285ab814bfefd996d&_t=Fkhfezi2PJB10zSpHZRMPz6t3QOUlUa9vrF3PSD32ydU0N6CziilK9jFnqQjmTOsgWyt0hZKVDYjp3hEa0T3gR8HdANKVebNMHT71bQA0eU%3D)

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hey folks, it’s Justin — Jason’s campaign manager.

I’m excited to be on board to help reelect Jason to Congress. Jason is the definition of a public servant, and he fights for Colorado every day.

Our team is working to build the strongest get-out-the-vote effort this district has ever seen. That’s why we’re launching our new ‘Crow in Every County Project’ today.

CO-06 encompasses five counties, and we’re working to earn every single vote. We’ve assigned every member of our grassroots team a county to help fund our work:

Will you sponsor Denver County and help us organize Democrats and unaffiliated voters across the district? Your gifts will help us win in all 5 of our counties >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-july-2023]

Assigned county for you: Denver County

body:
Well, Peter, it’s official: we finally have our first Republican challengers.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66271819/415876640/-1105104057?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230710-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFiOGE1MC02ZTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BfqErNUB5H4KgC0PTrhJdsla2o4G16Rt4R1f6OzYld0=)
---
| | | **_BREAKING NEWS:_
Maria Montero and Kevin Dellicker emerge as the first Republican challengers to Susan Wild in the 2024 PA‐07 Congressional Race**
---
Well, Peter, it’s official: **we finally have our first Republican challengers.**

**As a top target of the NRCC, Republicans are stopping at nothing to recruit candidates to try to flip this seat in 2024 and hold onto their House majority.**
| | | [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66271820/415876641/-1105104057?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230710-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFiOGE1MC02ZTFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BfqErNUB5H4KgC0PTrhJdsla2o4G16Rt4R1f6OzYld0=)
---
We have to be prepared for any attacks that come our way, and National Republicans have already set aside millions to try to defeat me.

In 2022, this was the most expensive House race in the state, and there’s no doubt that next year’s election will be anything less.

Regardless of who we face in the general election, we must ensure we have the resources necessary to win.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Practice What You Preach
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-acykht-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday![_Biden has spent 40% of his presidency on vacation_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-y/).**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-t/) **This War is a Drain on our National Security** Biden sat down for a recent interview in which**[he said the US is low on 155 mm artillery ammunition rounds](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-i/), **sparking outrage and questions of competency from conservatives on social media. **Unknown = China** The United States Air Force is **i[nvestigating nearly $1 billion in land purchases](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-d/)** from unknown investors near a California Air Force base. **Practice What You Preach** It turns out **[Ben& Jerry's headquarters is on stolen land](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-h/)**, and the Abenaki Tribe would like it back. _Do you think Ben & Jerry's will give it up?_ **Democrats are Horrified** Democrats have reacted angrily to the White House's **[decision to send cluster munitions to Ukraine](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-k/)** , with one congresswoman accusing Biden of stooping to the lows of Vladimir Putin.

**Fit to Serve** **[Younger 2024 candidates](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-u/)** \- and even some of the older ones - are on a mission to prove they are more physically fit than current President Joe Biden, 80, and Republican frontrunner Donald Trump, 76. **'Sound of Freedom'** UFC's**[Dana White encouraged all of his followers ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-o/)**to see "Sound of Freedom," insisting that it "must" be seen**.**_Have you seen this film about rescuing trafficked children?_ **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* [**Poor guy**!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-m/)
* **[They know.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-c/)**
* I'm not a**[liar](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-q/).**
* Everything is**[fried.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-a/)**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acykht-trhiujldw-e/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

Peter, this is important.

This Mississippi election is going to come down to the wire. Every move we make counts, and one mistake could derail everything.

That's why we’re reaching out.

We could really use your input as one of our most informed supporters.

Our main goal is to ensure Brandon reaches as many voters in Mississippi as humanly possible. There’s less than 4 months left until Election Day, and we're faced with some major decisions on how to best utilize our resources.

**Bottom line: We need your thoughts as we make these difficult calls.**

This isn’t just another election. It’s an opportunity for Mississippi to stop the never-ending corruption scandals and lousy leadership from Tate Reeves and his cronies.

But it’s going to take some serious strategy and hard work to win this election.

[We’re a team, Peter. So we need to make sure we’re on the same page — especially as we head into the final stretch to Election Day. So before the end of today, click here and take our brief strategy survey to help Brandon!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66272016/415876814/-1921980157?refcode=ea.a98e4796-6e1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.a98e4796-6e1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk4ZTQ3OTYtNmUxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ry02E7UyDkrPjb-wg2BZQSW5d-opN1Xubwzz-iRmE_Q=&emci=b2b9a6a8-5f1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a98e4796-6e1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782)

name: Roland Gutierrez
subject: I have big news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
It’s time for us to change things, and that starts with making sure we’re electing a leader that will actually work for the people instead of becoming a puppet for special interests and corporations.

| Hi Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.

I have big news to share with you: I’m running for the United States Senate to fix our broken system and defeat Ted Cruz.

After last year’s massacre in Uvalde, the families of the victims and I fought hard to raise the age to purchase assault-style weapons to 21, but Republicans in the legislature refused to even hold a debate. The politicians in Texas have let these families down. They have let all of us down.

I am the son of immigrants. Growing up in San Antonio, my parents taught me that if you work hard for this country, it will work hard for you. Texans are working hard, but Texas leaders aren’t working for them. Our system is broken.

I’m running for the United States Senate because these families deserve better, and ALL of Texas deserves better. From our public schools to healthcare, we’re suffering from a completely broken system, and working-class folks keep getting the short end of the stick.

It’s time for us to change things, and that starts with making sure we’re electing a leader that will actually work for the people instead of becoming a puppet for special interests and corporations.

Unlike Ted Cruz, I’m not a Washington politician that has become corrupted by greed and power. I got into public service to fix things and to build with the communities I serve. We can’t possibly do this alone. That’s what government **should be all about:** securing a strong future for all our families. And I promise to do just that.

[_**I know we can defeat Ted Cruz, but we can’t do it without your support. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and BACKROADS PAC to become a founding donor of our campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66272479/415877064/802152240?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230710-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGU5ZjMwYi02ZjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NrZ1TqM_G1H_T8A8n9wgE5bl3_ERk6kU0FXvAQ1wZi8=)

body:
In 2024, we choose an America about community or an America about chaos. |
---
