Team, ICYMI, I was on MSNBC this weekend exposing MAGA Republicans and explaining the state of our country in 2024. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66272510/415877082/1975272244?&refcode=E3302-20230710-MSNBC-Image-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGNjZTMwNS02ZjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0RrFSFrsS5NR9GpKhBIpSEfV9dhwuDzzjifhkD9cng=) Week after week, my MAGA colleagues continue to embarrass themselves. And this week won’t be much different as Jim Jordan plans to haul in the FBI to testify on his own extremist agenda items. Look, my plan to continue fighting MAGA clowns like Jim Jordan is simple. We must first continue to **_discredit_** any of these conspiracy theories and grievances that lie at the heart of their agenda. Second, we must also _**defend**_ any claims they make against the Biden administration and the work Democrats are doing for everyday Americans. And then finally, we can continue to _**deliver**_ on the issues Americans are most concerned about. | [DISCREDIT, DEFEND & DELIVER »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66272511/415877083/1975272244?&refcode=E3302-20230710-MSNBC-SB-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGNjZTMwNS02ZjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0RrFSFrsS5NR9GpKhBIpSEfV9dhwuDzzjifhkD9cng=)
---
**While my vision may be easier said than done, our country has the chance to go one of two paths in 2024. We can choose an America about _community_ or an America about _chaos._ **
Friend, I am choosing an America that's about community and I invite you to join me. **[Can you chip in today so I can continue to work day and night to expose MAGA Republicans, their chaos agenda, and help build an America in 2024 that is about community?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66272512/415877084/1975272244?&refcode=E3302-20230710-MSNBC-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGNjZTMwNS02ZjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0RrFSFrsS5NR9GpKhBIpSEfV9dhwuDzzjifhkD9cng=)**

They want to bury mom-and-pop shops in regulations and rules that will price them out of the competition and force them to close their doors and give way to woke corporations.

The Left HATES small businesses because small business stands for the values that they’re trying to attack: freedom, the power of the individual, and capitalism.

Our small businesses are the GEM of Florida, and I need your help to protect them.

name: Callie Barr
subject: Jerky in her purse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66273556/415877918/-1515957801?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230710jerky_cb_90DA_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg4NjQyYWEtNmYxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y9AfARZSk5Xk969Hj7K43nebmm9vSfbdVuIjrSRXDM0=)
---
Dear Peter, The other day, I watched my nine-year old daughter pack her purse to go outside. The contents? **5 jerky sticks, chapstick, and rainbow sunglasses.** As a mom, I’m proud of my daughter for having the foresight to bring snacks. And her Dad and I got a kick out of her choice of sustenance. (The dog was also thrilled to follow her around the yard.) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66273557/415877920/-1515957801?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230710jerky_cb_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg4NjQyYWEtNmYxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y9AfARZSk5Xk969Hj7K43nebmm9vSfbdVuIjrSRXDM0=)
---
_Pictured: 2 generations of strong Michigan women_
But it also got me thinking – about how our children are always watching us, and how, as adults, we have a responsibility to set an example for the next generation.
**I hope that someday, my daughters can look back and see that their mother never just accepted the status quo or backed down from a worthwhile fight.**
I’m running for Congress to show them that they don’t just have to accept the way things are. **I know that we can do so much better – for our veterans, for our working families, and for everyone else that feels left behind and forgotten.**
At times it can be hard to balance being a candidate and a mom. But moments like these remind me that this is a worthwhile fight – because if I’m lucky, my daughters will inherit more than just my love of jerky.
[If you’re with me in this fight, can you chip in your first donation of $5? I'm relying on people like our family to fuel our work – working parents, military families, teachers, folks who $5 means a whole lot to.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66273561/415877921/-1515957801?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230710jerky_cb_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg4NjQyYWEtNmYxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y9AfARZSk5Xk969Hj7K43nebmm9vSfbdVuIjrSRXDM0=)

clean_body: | = Dear Peter, The other day, I watched my nine-year old daughter pack her purse to go outside. The contents? 5 jerky sticks, chapstick, and rainbow sunglasses. As a mom, I’m proud of my daughter for having the foresight to bring snacks. And her Dad and I got a kick out of her choice of sustenance. (The dog was also thrilled to follow her around the yard.) | = Pictured: 2 generations of strong Michigan women But it also got me thinking – about how our children are always watching us, and how, as adults, we have a responsibility to set an example for the next generation. I hope that someday, my daughters can look back and see that their mother never just accepted the status quo or backed down from a worthwhile fight. I’m running for Congress to show them that they don’t just have to accept the way things are. I know that we can do so much better – for our veterans, for our working families, and for everyone else that feels left behind and forgotten. At times it can be hard to balance being a candidate and a mom. But moments like these remind me that this is a worthwhile fight – because if I’m lucky, my daughters will inherit more than just my love of jerky. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Gratefully, Callie Callie Barr Candidate for Michigan’s 1st Congressional District | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

body:

| | | **ALERT: House Republicans BLOCK crucial gun safety reforms! **

[**Add your name _right now_ to make your voice heard and show you support commonsense gun safety reforms >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/13069?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230710-ActionNeeded-WarnockGunSafetyQuoteHybrid-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230710-ActionNeeded-WarnockGunSafetyQuoteHybrid-ETG-sl1&akid=11294%2E9716520%2EUi-Pcy)

We need your help, team.

Right now, House Republicans are _**blocking**_ widely popular and CRUCIAL commonsense gun safety reforms. They're willing to put their far-right agenda over the safety of our communities -- **but Senator Warnock says we can WIN the fight for progress if our voices are heard!**

To heed his call, we launched a nationwide petition to prove to America we’re ready to fight for safety and justice -- and if we hit our goal of 100,000 signatures by midnight, our message will be _crystal clear._

But we’re still a few signatures short in Pennsylvania -- and yours could be the one we need to _hit 100,000!_ **Please, let us tell Senator Warnock that you joined the fight:**

[**Add your name before midnight to make your voice heard and show you support commonsense gun safety reforms >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/13069?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230710-ActionNeeded-WarnockGunSafetyQuoteHybrid-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230710-ActionNeeded-WarnockGunSafetyQuoteHybrid-ETG-sl1&akid=11294%2E9716520%2EUi-Pcy)

Team DSCC

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b4b99022b4c46f2824b28fe8eeaecfe&_e=gRA80VgFsnsAX7v_0djr3yj99Ly9QEX6FsPdb69MLwIuyatp9CqlHQIritfjZitk0msXSadj2clszdcbB28FAs_GlR-aGAIOkFxfA5hyBWE9R70gzPUI_5lQTuP2SlB4M0B62QfpzG6B6qQJpifwlCJUr89Sh2k5rBmpEqUBjcN2Xtaw-C4ytpwJQSf6xYpVtNyZ9WdhTWS6EgiTsTjQ3JGMBUqZK26Maz-ugFStFkWJzPWjQlLMQsE1FRjT6YxQdx6xNTmCTmefQpqVzqBtbQ0XRDoLAb0P6obyKCKyskiCKd8CqCZ0SzzsTb1OvdKcue56JofHnnA4d6P1vO8xDpYnpj3UuS5cUQJzd2XsUJvhv6HJerlXU3_y7trJa75pKQcKRlZkRii7cU4WzXwYhw%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b4b99022b4c46f2824b28fe8eeaecfe&_e=gRA80VgFsnsAX7v_0djr3yj99Ly9QEX6FsPdb69MLwIuyatp9CqlHQIritfjZitk0msXSadj2clszdcbB28FAs_GlR-aGAIOkFxfA5hyBWE9R70gzPUI_5lQTuP2SlB4M0B62QfpzG6B6qQJpifwlCJUr89Sh2k5rBmpEqUBjcN2Xtaw-C4ytpwJQSf6xYpVtNyZ9WdhTWS6EgiTsTjQ3JGMBUqZK26Maz-ugFStFkWJzPWjQlLMQsE1FRjT6YxQthhJnhp1nz5-H5bXsb7bjWVSC4zzIf5OIcJOHUwchNbcRuZFaql0jt_fVS3BKtxSGfbmnBP-Vhs8tIuAV5UhOOE7tZsOXybvSBvZh1ks4kZMfXUiVzfmvzDtQ5119OXkQKa1lACM4pKBDFZ9kjrCOA%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b4b99022b4c46f2824b28fe8eeaecfe&_e=gRA80VgFsnsAX7v_0djr3yj99Ly9QEX6FsPdb69MLwIuyatp9CqlHQIritfjZitk0msXSadj2clszdcbB28FAs_GlR-aGAIOkFxfA5hyBWE9R70gzPUI_5lQTuP2SlB4M0B62QfpzG6B6qQJpifwlCJUr89Sh2k5rBmpEqUBjcN2Xtaw-C4ytpwJQSf6xYpVtNyZ9WdhTWS6EgiTsTjQ3JGMBUqZK26Maz-ugFStFkWJzPWjQlLMQsE1FRjT6YxQS1Jbd-vfYxc5h4aAtiG6SW1FoeVwjatozLBY4idQDgIvDEr9ZnImsQ_pqPrm56T3W2NVEKDsKU5kmF_8f1gXK7PCfIUa-8-CmaeTgfdC7HZ6oY2K1-JK5XBC_b1GwBkXIpDTIpeTYN7y3nn4g9GxOg%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b4b99022b4c46f2824b28fe8eeaecfe&_e=gRA80VgFsnsAX7v_0djr3yj99Ly9QEX6FsPdb69MLwIuyatp9CqlHQIritfjZitk0msXSadj2clszdcbB28FAs_GlR-aGAIOkFxfA5hyBWE9R70gzPUI_5lQTuP2SlB4M0B62QfpzG6B6qQJpifwlCJUr89Sh2k5rBmpEqUBjcN2Xtaw-C4ytpwJQSf6xYpVtNyZ9WdhTWS6EgiTsTjQ3JGMBUqZK26Maz-ugFStFkWJzPWjQlLMQsE1FRjT6YxQSulmSdhjTBaUfXXgzrE90MY8hWx5cG3xv7ZDAIpfLi5RczmqdykuAeiCQR2zsKnthW0wVfZsYFQ3bklnl77oeY7IvYJRfafpoC9z2PXBngTYePlQHg8tI2RQo9b1pQbJee19AroF6N41P57YM69PNg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b4b99022b4c46f2824b28fe8eeaecfe&_e=gRA80VgFsnsAX7v_0djr3yj99Ly9QEX6FsPdb69MLwIuyatp9CqlHQIritfjZitk0msXSadj2clszdcbB28FAs_GlR-aGAIOkFxfA5hyBWE9R70gzPUI_5lQTuP2SlB4M0B62QfpzG6B6qQJpifwlCJUr89Sh2k5rBmpEqUBjcN2Xtaw-C4ytpwJQSf6xYpVtNyZ9WdhTWS6EgiTsTjQ3JGMBUqZK26Maz-ugFStFkWJzPWjQlLMQsE1FRjT6YxQnVdSKspsafLDTApwCw19myrH0t_ifri5SMRn09JsBVX_aTrRhkzpEMYwmFCrZDChn_tQWYgVclTo-nHW0a5T5VhPSpJ1hi3UfMw1Le2pM7OL2Y_jDb7Rpa49HtuP8AHBVZZUBhbzxIDGt6pjl5bS7g%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=7b4b99022b4c46f2824b28fe8eeaecfe&_t=stK1CwYijVlVYE-rEFT9JV3sxLk5FL8eDKhPWOUeFykmCQlzmlVDloJcrXSVl7zvWvD0pLtBIPoO7RUuMkM6J9yzpXS23uqJ84Rh-6wShshY30kooepsFFSDMdGJrc9F03LwYNw2Qm_ZUEIuvV2iWG6bVKeIda8mG_OTp4AyJno%3D)

Especially at this point in the cycle – fundraising slows down, and voters tend to tune out.
So we must work harder than ever – recruiting _more_ volunteers, engaging with _more_ voters, and investing in _more_ races – to rise above the summer lull and help Democrats build power in statehouses nationwide.

clean_body: The GOP will not go unchallenged, and it’s up to us to make our point crystal clear: Democrats will not be silenced. | | | | | A crucial battle for democracy is underway in Tennessee. Special elections are rapidly approaching, and it’s imperative our Democrats come out on top. FIRST: Three Democratic state legislators courageously joined activists in a peaceful rally, demanding sensible gun safety laws. THEN: Extremist Republicans chose to expel two of the representatives – Reps. Jones and Pearson – instead of heeding the calls of their constituents. NOW: Republicans are doubling down on their anti-democratic scheme,pouring in money to Rep. Jones’ GOP opponent. The GOP’s actions will not go unchallenged, and it’s up to this movement to make our point crystal clear: Democrats will not be silenced. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Special elections, particularly in Republican-dominated states like Tennessee, are never easy. Especially at this point in the cycle – fundraising slows down, and voters tend to tune out. So we must work harder than ever – recruiting more volunteers, engaging with more voters, and investing in more races – to rise above the summer lull and help Democrats build power in statehouses nationwide. Hi, I’m James O’Keefe. You may not know me, but you’ve seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet.

If you tuned in to the late, great Rush Limbaugh’s show five years ago, you heard him say I was “an intrepid ‘guerrila journalist’ “whose undercover reporting has shown the light of truth on leftist organizations' slimy secrets.”

I can’t tell you how exciting and encouraging it was hear my hero say that to me!

**Rush and I talked about how important it was to expose the bad guys ... to bypass the lies and spin of the liberal media ... and get the truth to the American people.**

And we talked about the steep price I paid to do that – the attacks, smears, and lawsuits.

Well, the lawsuits haven’t stopped.

In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with – people I wish only the best for.

**Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting.**

The people who filed it don’t just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher.

**I don’t know why they’re doing it ... but they’re playing for keeps.**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxk0cGSnCAQBuCnaW9a2oygBw87MSZVW9l7ctlCaGfYgDgIZXz7lNYkh-T68_UPRUu3WDPtHYgrIN6NXgER2AsgPr5vLqQP9_olv9I1f_A3Vx-H-AkQ477QX_ksKchJY49U9JnuJJcT6Yy6ijdtiQ1rRXbvVItCVrqkupkubV3pSpfNARRr2ppjZjoskZWiKhEZq-pCtTSSmNg0SjEyIeFSnhcVstpkCN67QnmX2e4e47KeLxoAh5VUClTImbSPhwAcrBkpxD2_JRk04DDTllu5rcnE3P8kmih3Y-4dsCFF9776FBQB6_93gPwQjrRJDlh_1J-Jkm6R5jYD690IyKXzaY7AeqyfIlI4JraAf0b8HOk0s7K5-voNb4-3X3wH5O-zNRpY_0947on1nz9-DJeX8TULnV42Y61ZuYBLeTu_R3n3OwAA__-sMJfx)** that will quickly pile up.

Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more.

But I remember what Rush told me in that interview:

**“You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it.”**

[**Friend, will you help me defend myself in court and keep getting the truth to our fellow Americans with your critically important gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away?**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxkkT2PnDAQhn_N0LFix2BDQXEbQiKdFClpoqQ5-WPY9cXGrLGFNr8-Al1S5NrHz_t6NCP94uz06EFcAPFmzQqIwJ4A8f5j8zG_-udP5YUu5Z1_8c3-iB8AMT0W-me-lZzIS-t2KobC9JLLiUxB_Zm3XYUt60Rx64lQd6qpFddoOuwqybFtW81lZZq6EoXtsUJWiXOFyNi5OemOFImJTUoKxYSEujo-OsnzJmMMwZ908IXrbykt6zHRCDiupHOkk5zJhLQbgKOzimJ6lNcsowEcZ9pKJ7c121SGX0QTlV6VwQMbc_Iva8hRE7DhvQfId8OTsdkDG_b6g2jpF2mvM7DBK0AufchzAjZg82Ykintii_g3EuZEhzNrV37F7_lb0vffnwH5y-ysATb8B487seHj68-xflLPRezNslnn7MoF1NX1WI8O_k8AAAD__3tAmN4)

I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES!

I can’t do it without you.

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

**P.S. Friend, this new lawsuit could not only silence me, it could smash me flat.[Please help me defend myself in court with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxkkcFunDAQhp9muIHMeNeGA4dsKZEaqffkEhl72HViY2Lson37CrTtob1-_v7foxnlF2enewfyAog3a1ZABP4EiF-vm4_5w788lxe6lF_ipz_vj_gNENN9ob_mo6Qir6zbqewL0ymhJjIFdbVoWoYNb2Vx6xo8N8haw3itUTFhlKapFqeaS0bUtIXtkCFnsmaInNfnSrc0kpz4NCo5cqngxI6PKlVvKsYQfKWDL1x3S2lZj4kGwGElnSNVaiYT0m4ADs6OFNO9vGYVDeAw01Y6ta3ZpjJ8Ek1U-rEMHviQk39fQ46agPf_e4BiNzwZmz3wfq8_iFZ-UfY6A-_9CCiUD3lOwHs8P4xEcU9sEf9EwpzocGbtytvngq9vz_nXD0DxPjtrgPf_wONOvP_-8TacnsaXInZm2axzdhUSTux6rEcH_zsAAP__GtWYkw) **Thank you!

name: Exclusive Letter for Top Democrats (VPP)
subject: SIGN: Thank Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
She's a HERO!
| **BREAKING: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s Passionate Defense Sways Conservative Justices to Protect Voting Rights Act** Folks, thanks to Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the Supreme Court shot down Alabama’s attempt to heavily gerrymander the state and silence Black voters.

[**We’re hand-delivering an urgent thank you card to her office at 9 AM tomorrow – so we only have 108 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49263?t=6&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49263?t=7&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf) | [DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE CARD! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49263?t=8&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf)
---
TO: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You're a hero! **_Dear Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson — THANK YOU._**

Your impassioned defense of voting rights convinced even the most conservative Justices to uphold the Voting Rights Act and stand up to Alabama’s blatant discrimination.

I know going up against Donald Trump’s far-right majority on the Court isn’t easy, so I applaud your outstanding resilience to defend our democracy.

**I couldn’t be happier that President Biden nominated you!**

[**So I’m signing this card to thank you for all your courage and hard work over the last year, and will chip in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect incredible Democrats who will save our right to vote from corrupt Republican gerrymandering! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49263?t=9&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49263?t=10&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf) | [DONATE $3 TO SIGN NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49263?t=11&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9094%2E878179%2EaxsPFf)

body:
Wow! I finally have a moment to catch my breath after a whirlwind two weeks! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66276525/415879021/1585783201?refcode=fl_em_20230710eoqty_sm_natl_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTM1MDUzYS03MzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8rBeoTRAgyoy9s_sUGndRAA5_Ury0C9GT-NSKufNM4=&emci=0b55829e-6d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1935053a-731f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=36397936)
---
Hey team! Wow! I finally have a moment to catch my breath after a whirlwind two weeks! I am still riding on a high, but as we start another week, I wanted to say thank you for all of your support. I can hardly believe it was just a few days ago that I launched my campaign to represent the great people of Delaware in the U.S. House. **In just the first two weeks, we’re already building a campaign that can win:**
* 600 Delawareans from every corner of this state chipped in to support our campaign
* Altogether, we raised over $400,000 in just five days before our first end-of-quarter deadline
* 22 Delaware elected officials - and counting - have endorsed our campaign

I am so grateful for your overwhelming support for this campaign. Yet again, we’re showing that **small states can do big things, whether that’s passing a game-changing paid leave program or launching a history-making campaign for Congress.** You’ll hear more from Team McBride and me soon about our recent legislative wins here in Delaware and how you can help us reach out to voters in Delaware. But in the meantime, I could not do this without you. **Thank you for everything as we continue to build this campaign together.** \- Sarah [P.S. If you missed the EOQ deadline, no worries – we still need your support! Even if it’s $5.00.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66276526/415879022/279091928?refcode=fl_em_20230710eoqty_sm_natl_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTM1MDUzYS03MzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8rBeoTRAgyoy9s_sUGndRAA5_Ury0C9GT-NSKufNM4=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: The biggest issue facing CA is the cost of housing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie isn’t afraid to say it
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)
The high cost of housing is the biggest problem facing California. For too long the federal government has passed the blame onto state and local governments and refused to invest in affordable housing. [**Katie’s top priority in the Senate would be to change this—watch this recent interview to learn more.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230710-1?refcode=EMAJ10_1_HOU_20230710_V1_F&refcode2=26291_3422442_lJaAm-&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230710-1?refcode=EMAJ10_1_HOU_20230710_V1_F&refcode2=26291_3422442_lJaAm-&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)
Before being elected to Congress, Katie spent her career as a consumer protection attorney. That included fighting for families whose homes were being foreclosed upon, sometimes without proper documentation from the Big Banks. **There are solutions to the housing affordability crisis, but we need to elect leaders willing to take it on.[Can you pitch in to our campaign to send Katie Porter to the Senate to fight for affordable housing?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230710-1?refcode=EMAJ10_1_HOU_20230710_V1_F&refcode2=26291_3422442_lJaAm-&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230710-1?refcode=EMAJ10_1_HOU_20230710_V1_F&refcode2=26291_3422442_lJaAm-&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)**
Thanks for your support, Derek. **[While you’re here—has the high cost of housing affected your life? You can share your story with Katie and our team here.](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em20230710-housing-share-your-story/?source=EMAJ10_1_HOU_20230710_V1_F&t=2&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)**
**[Share your story ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em20230710-housing-share-your-story/?source=EMAJ10_1_HOU_20230710_V1_F&t=3&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)**
—Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ10_1_HOU_20230710_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=26291_3422442_lJaAm-&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=5&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=26291%2E3422442%2ElJaAm-)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: A GOP extremist, handpicked by Mitch McConnell, just launched his campaign to flip Nevada and the Senate red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] I had to reach out right away, friend. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat my friend and colleague Sen. Jacky Rosen in Nevada – and according to analysts at FiveThirtyEight, this race is likely to decide Senate control.
I’ve been in Jacky’s shoes before, so I can tell you firsthand: She needs every bit of grassroots support she can get – and she needs it right now.
Because here’s the thing: McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada with over $55 million to flip this battleground state red. I was able to win the closest Senate race in the country by 7,928 votes because of a dedicated team of grassroots supporters by my side. But the GOP is gearing up to spend even more this time around to make sure their handpicked candidate defeats Jacky.
That’s why The Washington Post is calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – and now, a recent poll shows her two points down. The only way Jacky can overcome the GOP’s spending, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue is with your grassroots support, but she’s falling short of her critical $50,000 rapid-response goal.
So please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you give $5 or more to split between Jacky's campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's right now to help her win reelection in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Jacky Rosen and Kirsten Gillibrand:
DONATE NOW: $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?refcode=XXX&express_lane=true&amount=15]
DONATE NOW: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?refcode=XXX&express_lane=true&amount=25]

DONATE NOW: $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?refcode=XXX&express_lane=true&amount=250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
>
Thank you, friend .
¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!
Catherine

subject: Republicans ONLY

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6225bbd31abb4b03a6f5ec25527b33b8&_e=qnGpXgXnNWyUr6_nFkhOS-nl90YA7hJYBIGntE8YPX3JcYhBccC6NswxpFV5Bn0Ub5Q_ViaKzrizLIeZ5m-RyIl4jqDngDq-ADXVt7Z2jNZ2A0BfaGGRyotriwoZtEhhw6_y-iyJf9t1NPhBI0iXZpXDQcP-9YKMm_PJ-KRDAkkqamNIQRnCG0ItmhOadG01fnuGOD9NVdPzOFD8PNk34FGmKK1nwV_HdqOfPUZ3TeFPW9fCq0F0_JpF3KWd9BrXONLC4-hePca2xgg0UweqSR4IXruagcAQ8Z2zq3utTkBw4IhLplemVERzHPXAmpDRi-60CMRGCTQvqRP90-OEbqsMcqsieov88q2QQpfLWlgzz0o2GyTru07tmEH4pNLxf8S7NtzrTADfpeca64zCW4yHGBz04uaAcMfuhgw6AcQ%3D)

[**FOR GOD AND COUNTRY

**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6225bbd31abb4b03a6f5ec25527b33b8&_e=qnGpXgXnNWyUr6_nFkhOS-nl90YA7hJYBIGntE8YPX3JcYhBccC6NswxpFV5Bn0Ub5Q_ViaKzrizLIeZ5m-RyIl4jqDngDq-ADXVt7Z2jNZ2A0BfaGGRyotriwoZtEhhw6_y-iyJf9t1NPhBI0iXZpXDQcP-9YKMm_PJ-KRDAkkqamNIQRnCG0ItmhOadG01fnuGOD9NVdPzOFD8PNk34FGmKK1nwV_HdqOfPUZ3TeFPW9fCq0F0_JpF3KWd9BrX4nh_R40QivL0m8-ZD_F4Q6_HG0sXM6aQoQ2dPlQ4fPwWixRN6SQ7TJsrburaF_Epu0PxlbbMbVcgSLeMx9tz2TP83V6PIBO9OmeGDCK2k5-G-Gcacy4BHDGxUAAAAvSqlHoHp_I4V6AEW07Q7R6s-2r7XSECToZ2naPq-9CPxiU%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6225bbd31abb4b03a6f5ec25527b33b8&_e=qnGpXgXnNWyUr6_nFkhOS-nl90YA7hJYBIGntE8YPX3JcYhBccC6NswxpFV5Bn0Ub5Q_ViaKzrizLIeZ5m-RyIl4jqDngDq-ADXVt7Z2jNZ2A0BfaGGRyotriwoZtEhhw6_y-iyJf9t1NPhBI0iXZpXDQcP-9YKMm_PJ-KRDAkkqamNIQRnCG0ItmhOadG01fnuGOD9NVdPzOFD8PNk34FGmKK1nwV_HdqOfPUZ3TeFPW9fCq0F0_JpF3KWd9BrXwod-L5TedBwfko73shX3oTC9GmVCFO6sGZ0WTIYeRbWoVy2JRKYYDy8I__AkqG-MnqeR4EG_cIiBTLkwVY1tBglqHN4gECbqQvN9DpHYML4IeYWqxgWUljQIq-SAQXIG4hxdXOFBo1_Q9b-6EBZ_WTNWiKBoXHm5PmvsE1lPj5Y%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual.

Hooyah,

This is completely deranged** - **[**PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION OF ANY AMOUNT TO HELP ME COMBAT THIS VIOLATION OF THE U.S. CONSTITUTION. >> **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1d5db5372dfb4210bf365da50b18c214&_e=VgU-yXDBFJ_v60G43fEuPsEM-dyiPRFJkxwi_9Uk2YSvUoDF_5-MgDhvO5xgRCkfR9bnng1KLwljqxkMmYvmOIow3MUYHlq1AHXA82QBh33cHDbuuI_tC8JFDXQYWVP1eNjH_nBqVZoFgB1mZ91CzzaeurOLCWLB4rGkhH6lobPYUEzWtGr4ls02PbMwos6c_bQyX5Re7bBJDtj-T99DCCuFijyYy4FQBck5GLEC6dJIN5drZz29M-5gDrXEXT0AW8Wim-Yk-aa_jlmqGu8MczGky43qHuapi5Mugo6ggog%3D) Not only is this unconstitutional, but it's also an incredibly dumb and silly idea - I'm sorry to be so frank with you, but that's the truth. Anytime anyone wants to cause trouble or get in the news, they can pick some obscure pronouns for the day and then start fining and suing others left and right. What has this country come to? China is silently taking our country down from the inside out, we're facing an unprecedented cost of living and inflation crisis, opioid overdoses have reached record highs, and our southern border remains wide open. And this nonsense is what the Michigan House is most concerned about? It's time we elect representatives who will focus on the issues that actually impact EVERY American - and not representatives who play partisan games in order to pander to the 1%**.** [_**Please make a contribution of any amount to help me win my Congressional race so that I can bring common sense back to the policy-making process. >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1d5db5372dfb4210bf365da50b18c214&_e=VgU-yXDBFJ_v60G43fEuPsEM-dyiPRFJkxwi_9Uk2YSvUoDF_5-MgDhvO5xgRCkfR9bnng1KLwljqxkMmYvmOIow3MUYHlq1AHXA82QBh33cHDbuuI_tC8JFDXQYWVP1eNjH_nBqVZoFgB1mZ91CzyaKtnPyIyxeLJDoflU05nla1Tt9rAuyYhf_yHu5dqLVt-fv_XL-2D-vZ692jCc23E7QHzNp2Y9sFvrIDfe0BvVbf45C1ufaBy-umixPesF9Rr_RYiPMDbj8bBeaoQmZKOF2SrLq2A7I2sThdHQyO0s%3D)

clean_body: You're being fined for simply saying the words he or she. | | | | You're being fined for simply saying the words he or she. Hey Friend, did you see this? I can't believe this is real news, but check this out. . . This is completely deranged - Not only is this unconstitutional, but it's also an incredibly dumb and silly idea - I'm sorry to be so frank with you, but that's the truth. Anytime anyone wants to cause trouble or get in the news, they can pick some obscure pronouns for the day and then start fining and suing others left and right. What has this country come to? China is silently taking our country down from the inside out, we're facing an unprecedented cost of living and inflation crisis, opioid overdoses have reached record highs, and our southern border remains wide open. And this nonsense is what the Michigan House is most concerned about? It's time we elect representatives who will focus on the issues that actually impact EVERY American - and not representatives who play partisan games in order to pander to the 1%. | | | | | | Thank you, Michael Markey Republican for Congress, MI-03 | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
It will only get worse.

| Peter, last week we hit a very sad milestone:_**the hottest day ever recorded on Earth.**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66280694/415882265/-474076175?refcode=MTFC_20230710_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2JjMmE2NC03NzFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48NdnXzSyztG7YukNaf7ut5cW78sCTj5oz_L5DKZ0tg=&emci=337b4644-e41c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8cbc2a64-771f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602) **Heat Records Are Broken Around the Globe as Earth Warms, Fast** Climate change is hurting our planet, killing wildlife, and threatening our future. Millions of people are being displaced around the world.

**We’ve seen it right here in California, with raging wildfires that destroy forests and homes, threaten our air quality, and harm ecosystems.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dbfc7b11557420493160e5063d16cfc&_e=UO68AbtmTIv8Wd-xYuT-ruTdV6omtx2YIiwNpP1680D_nXFT40N_2Bb71K3GayP7r-rrVgPNiCyXrtHImI4DzaNgQA3n-CHeFh50JlG0-f2AEPOomSbJ3t6jpb1AOBCrWcqBgHL1UchThGN6mrB6wSUsneHhFqyZvqYkkRXDlHgeZ1w09SfZ9NdTy_y3usZ67n-N6gm9ygo_sWl09gat6CGTPNqQj6yazqcFyYjA69X6ws31uxPH51l60aFIDq16B5zf5X7IlbiwqYO4iMUWdRUlf2ZxOML81jbox30IlCPqaJV76XDqk4AdWr7eIiQLZDEjwzo99yg30pxmSj-fARWFhxZdgdAXle_w2wHKjkIjjF_DKC3Yy8zKnNzQXMK_cRvKp-GC9BmfcaJ8zwbKzRJxENlf0_m1pENGb7vSn_w%3D)

My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dbfc7b11557420493160e5063d16cfc&_e=UO68AbtmTIv8Wd-xYuT-ruTdV6omtx2YIiwNpP1680D_nXFT40N_2Bb71K3GayP7r-rrVgPNiCyXrtHImI4DzaNgQA3n-CHeFh50JlG0-f2AEPOomSbJ3t6jpb1AOBCrWcqBgHL1UchThGN6mrB6wSUsneHhFqyZvqYkkRXDlHgeZ1w09SfZ9NdTy_y3usZ67n-N6gm9ygo_sWl09gat6CGTPNqQj6yazqcFyYjA69X6ws31uxPH51l60aFIDq16B5zf5X7IlbiwqYO4iMUWdWXgO2QxubLAQaJ4-VV920UOHh4SCvLpbWB2p29yUouq4rcAq-ffFZsttpxHeTUPcuEHqDZtfclKGP43Tmi_qqgmKYUgN3yVmQzh3MfHAFkwev8DeGqChNB6JjVneSx2jLxxlRfPlwjpn9BjcIvkMwE%3D) — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dbfc7b11557420493160e5063d16cfc&_e=UO68AbtmTIv8Wd-xYuT-ruTdV6omtx2YIiwNpP1680D_nXFT40N_2Bb71K3GayP7r-rrVgPNiCyXrtHImI4DzaNgQA3n-CHeFh50JlG0-f2AEPOomSbJ3t6jpb1AOBCrWcqBgHL1UchThGN6mrB6wSUsneHhFqyZvqYkkRXDlHgeZ1w09SfZ9NdTy_y3usZ67n-N6gm9ygo_sWl09gat6CGTPNqQj6yazqcFyYjA69X6ws31uxPH51l60aFIDq16B5zf5X7IlbiwqYO4iMUWdcGpvntzM0ybWNmio7B-4QyRouls8kqGcCWzw6yfOvdgJNtkPK452ZJvDG0r9tD6NmFixrzIuBda1q8y_tdCNkc3uRfA61C-rOARmJO5MT4fFvj8Cv70WIxMOx-3ENKn9vM0qKv3TVv2L9tZzfWjpNY%3D)

Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dbfc7b11557420493160e5063d16cfc&_e=UO68AbtmTIv8Wd-xYuT-ruTdV6omtx2YIiwNpP1680D_nXFT40N_2Bb71K3GayP7r-rrVgPNiCyXrtHImI4DzaNgQA3n-CHeFh50JlG0-f2AEPOomSbJ3t6jpb1AOBCrWcqBgHL1UchThGN6mrB6wSUsneHhFqyZvqYkkRXDlHgeZ1w09SfZ9NdTy_y3usZ67n-N6gm9ygo_sWl09gat6CGTPNqQj6yazqcFyYjA69X6ws31uxPH51l60aFIDq16B5zf5X7IlbiwqYO4iMUWdUrHa7d_ltf8b49ljk6bar809V6E2uvSHesT4V1pAgPLQUBbIGSkxKLP4e32F6s-HO0WadoRXwwvp0TuqLb5kUD-mgYQ6poOS_xUhPCsfbV3mxPDMPluyREUAwJvIUCz4pqB_mp5LoPMZCIDITwGUQY%3D) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dbfc7b11557420493160e5063d16cfc&_e=UO68AbtmTIv8Wd-xYuT-ruTdV6omtx2YIiwNpP1680D_nXFT40N_2Bb71K3GayP7r-rrVgPNiCyXrtHImI4DzaNgQA3n-CHeFh50JlG0-f2AEPOomSbJ3t6jpb1AOBCrWcqBgHL1UchThGN6mrB6wSUsneHhFqyZvqYkkRXDlHgeZ1w09SfZ9NdTy_y3usZ67n-N6gm9ygo_sWl09gat6CGTPNqQj6yazqcFyYjA69X6ws31uxPH51l60aFIDq16B5zf5X7IlbiwqYO4iMUWdcdyuAaplfq2AXtZyA7U-O2PChxWbdsjJ-yRstcW7KqmN7OIuH0FxLbRfevh4g9Xts8Y04zLJ2azju-UtvVN0JFrb5rCJExPbMBLjUpMSjbVlCYIeCpUg5tRyiMPsTzOCAb8Pf9IJ4o2CraTriAzYXo%3D) Duty First,

Fellow conservative,

During my time working for President Trump, I saw firsthand the mess Washington D.C. insiders have made of our country.

We need to stop electing career politicians and send more outsiders to represent us in Congress, and that’s why I’m proud to share with you that I’m endorsing **Bernie Moreno** to become the next conservative U.S. Senator from Ohio.

**Bernie Moreno is the outsider we need in the Senate and is the key to taking back the Senate majority for Republicans.**

Fellow conservative, Bernie needs your help if he's going flip Ohio and help Republicans take back the Senate. [**He has my full support, but he needs your help today.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=046c20dca1324f0b8038c4658acb3a15&_e=gf04yxuzcrS0xhVWHwr_1d_TpVxror_VB4Ia15d7ZXMTLzVlYzm2zgkFDW5p8g_FEJoGibxARETUqVjjH398FXto7oYx9xVCbCIVXS60FYMLDSIRVrcJ4gucG_XIqQs1ItfqDc1Zq2iJVHYNgxeou8fmjLp7hXoRPgzj7z_c9-oA9opgfKiJO6mUpfnngSdlEEb34ichLXf6LvJcypcHNHCk__MVVO-Nk024N3hJNoGrSZ9uYqD93fLzmjh9E5TmE095JdzYmEJ_AaJsV9alIDufu_bWqG1pCYNrBTUWKx0ICgETZiJpBAmtOMiluaWh0cNhjpYMWby3zRDwyfobzeUXICojES-OY7Wmmwj1KFw34_PpVo0l-3tJrTWvkzap541zNwxh0YeDw7-AjeZAJuca6m-5mwvfNp1zKCTuBdU%3D)

When he was five years old, Bernie's family came to the United States from Colombia. His family believed in the American Dream and they bet it all to start a new life. From there, he grew up to become a successful executive in the auto industry and has created thousands of jobs in Ohio.

Now, Bernie is running to lead the fight for freedom and take on the far left and political insiders that have sent our nation down the wrong path. He has the qualifications and the experience to be an effective United States Senator right away. He recognizes that the things that make our country great are under assault by Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer and Sherrod Brown.

[**Can I count on you to support one of the strongest candidates I've ever known in his fight to flip this Ohio Senate seat and fix the mess the Left created?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=046c20dca1324f0b8038c4658acb3a15&_e=gf04yxuzcrS0xhVWHwr_1d_TpVxror_VB4Ia15d7ZXMTLzVlYzm2zgkFDW5p8g_FEJoGibxARETUqVjjH398FXto7oYx9xVCbCIVXS60FYMLDSIRVrcJ4gucG_XIqQs1ItfqDc1Zq2iJVHYNgxeou8fmjLp7hXoRPgzj7z_c9-oA9opgfKiJO6mUpfnngSdlEEb34ichLXf6LvJcypcHNHCk__MVVO-Nk024N3hJNoGrSZ9uYqD93fLzmjh9E5TmvEGSxgKoXWKOniq_NuLoteymmbmPQTvDysacegDJC2NDK2_-RF6M52MnGEFvXYoPiOqJlO1GcXe7M3hH5wDxdO_Ni1VQuwuaJQ-VvGZbHcVAjvvgp08l0rLI86k-Wn8j3h-6PabtxkQORalgqOCbbsHb6U1fCvU7rQL-Ax9jfK0%3D)

Ohio’s Democrat Senator and career Washington insider Sherrod Brown is vulnerable, and one of Republicans' top targets to defeat in 2024. This is one of our best opportunities to take back the Senate majority, and **I believe Bernie can get the job done.**

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: Bernie is the outsider we need in the Senate and is the key to taking back the Senate majority for Republicans. | | Fellow conservative, During my time working for President Trump, I saw firsthand the mess Washington D.C. insiders have made of our country. We need to stop electing career politicians and send more outsiders to represent us in Congress, and that’s why I’m proud to share with you that I’m endorsing Bernie Moreno to become the next conservative U.S. Senator from Ohio. Bernie Moreno is the outsider we need in the Senate and is the key to taking back the Senate majority for Republicans. Fellow conservative, Bernie needs your help if he's going flip Ohio and help Republicans take back the Senate. When he was five years old, Bernie's family came to the United States from Colombia. His family believed in the American Dream and they bet it all to start a new life. From there, he grew up to become a successful executive in the auto industry and has created thousands of jobs in Ohio. Now, Bernie is running to lead the fight for freedom and take on the far left and political insiders that have sent our nation down the wrong path. He has the qualifications and the experience to be an effective United States Senator right away. He recognizes that the things that make our country great are under assault by Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer and Sherrod Brown. Bernie is the candidate Ohio needs to fight for the American freedoms that brought his family here. He knows first-hand how great the America Dream is and will fight to make sure we don't lose it. Ohio’s Democrat Senator and career Washington insider Sherrod Brown is vulnerable, and one of Republicans' top targets to defeat in 2024. This is one of our best opportunities to take back the Senate majority, and I believe Bernie can get the job done. Thank you, Ambassador Richard Grenell Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia.
